name: Don Huffines
subject: The Cost of Illegal Immigration in Texas by Don Huffines
body:
One group estimated the 2022 costs of illegal aliens to Texans at $9.9 billion.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-vliikiy-yuddtktydi-x/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliikiy-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## **The Cost of Illegal Immigration in Texas by Don Huffines**
[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliikiy-yuddtktydi-y/) DALLAS, TX, September 22, 2023 -- In July, U.S. border arrests of illegal aliens along the Mexican border surged to 132,652, up from 99,539 in June. The news was so bad that the federal government appears to have delayed the release of the numbers until late Friday afternoon, August 18, when fewer people would be paying attention.According to Todd Bensman with the Center for Immigration Studies, the surge of illegal crossings in the last few years has been caused by immigrants who "pulled the trigger on crossing journeys in direct response to immigration-related policies and court rulings that they realized were advantageous." This points to the fact that illegal immigrants come to America for two primary reasons. First, because the United States government under the Biden Administration has essentially eliminated our national border, making the final leg of their difficult journey much easier. Second, because of the benefits of living in America instead of where they came from.Many of the benefits illegal aliens take advantage of in the United States come from the government in the form of services and welfare. The costs of these add up very quickly for Texas taxpayers who, because they live in a border state, bear a disproportionate amount of these costs. Additionally, Texas taxpayers must pay for security at the Texas-Mexico border because the federal government has abandoned its constitutional obligations.Government expenditures because of the presence of illegal aliens can be broken down into three general categories: education, border security and criminal justice, and medical and welfare. This paper catalogs some of these expenditures in Texas.While the costs are, at times, difficult to quantify, they are nonetheless substantial. One group estimated the 2022 costs of illegal aliens to Texans at $9.9 billion. Add in the children of illegal aliens, and the costs expand to $13.3 billion. The Huffines Liberty Foundation estimates that the cost of educating illegal aliens in Texas public schools was $6.6 billion for the 2022-23 school year. Texas' border security costs are about $2.6 billion, while criminal justice costs run about $1.7 billion. These costs make it clear that the lack of control of the Texas-Mexico border by both the federal and Texas governments must be addressed. [Read Paper](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliikiy-yuddtktydi-j/) **ICYMI from DON HUFFINES in The Telegraph: ****[An invasion of the US is under way. It's time to invoke the Constitution](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliikiy-yuddtktydi-t/)** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliikiy-yuddtktydi-h/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of **liberty** , **prosperity** , and **virtue** in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.###
### _Help us advance liberty and prosperity in Texas:_
[Donate](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliikiy-yuddtktydi-k/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliikiy-yuddtktydi-u/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliikiy-yuddtktydi-o/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliikiy-yuddtktydi-b/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliikiy-yuddtktydi-n/) | [ Share ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-fb-vliikiy-yuddtktydi-c/) | [ Tweet ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-tw-vliikiy-yuddtktydi-q/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-vliikiy-l-a)
---|---|---
[www.HuffinesLiberty.com](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vliikiy-yuddtktydi-p/)[info@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:info@huffinesliberty.com)
(214) 526-3000 The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization. Contributions are tax-deductible.
By completing forms on this website, you agree to receive marketing and communications from the Huffines Liberty Foundation. name: Chuck Morse
subject: Join Team Morse for our Harvest Fest & Campaign Kick-Off!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse, PO Box 106, North Salem, NH 03073
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMzA5ODMxOTk1NDIyNjc3NDAyJmM9dTR6OSZlPTAmYj0xMjEwNjc1MTA2JmQ9bzhoM3Qxeg==.3t6V075FkBQx-2DSvRPRJ7ueMLvtzwIDcG5zOo8DP7Q)
| | | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMzA5ODMxOTk1NDIyNjc3NDAyJmM9dTR6OSZlPTAmYj0xMjEwNjc1MTIyJmQ9bTlsMW41eg==.eZwiHCv2Q9fQ80kGUkhX952XOct7O0fRy5BVa04OV8U)
---
| |
---
| Friend, **__** I'm excited to invite you to an event taking place next Thursday, **September 28th** , which holds immense significance for our community and our beloved Granite State. For years, I've proudly organized Harvest Fest as a way to unite our community and celebrate the spirit of our Granite State. This year, however, marks an extraordinary milestone as we kick off our campaign for New Hampshire Governor! When I say "we," I truly mean it. This campaign is not about me; it's about every individual and business that contributes to the uniqueness of our state. It's about the aspirations of our students, the well-being of our families, the growth of our economy, and the preservation of our cherished freedoms – everything that makes New Hampshire so exceptional. I firmly believe that together, we can bring about the strong, conservative leadership that our great state deserves. But I can't do it alone; I need your support and involvement to make this vision a reality. Your presence and support at this event will be invaluable in shaping the path forward - **[Join us!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMzA5ODMxOTk1NDIyNjc3NDAyJmM9dTR6OSZlPTAmYj0xMjEwNjc1MTM3JmQ9ZzJzMWM5Yg==.NJDXCaeeSXEa9BUpd3dDz8fhgCzYVhJ2iwqvMfIONeI)**
Best, Chuck Morse

name: Barbara Boxer
subject: I still remember this conversation [📎photo enclosed]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53241?t=6&akid=10597%2E878179%2EkbdA9w) Friend, I still remember this conversation I was having with Will last Summer. We were talking about the fight ahead and with so much on the line, just how important it was to defeat Ken Calvert.

Flash forward to this month, and even I never could have imagined just how low Calvert and his MAGA allies would stoop in their bid to damage the President and stoke division.

They’re pushing the government to the brink of shutdown.

They’re launching an impeachment investigation into President Biden.

And all the while, they’re waging an unprecedented assault on voting rights to keep power.

These people aren’t interested in governing. Instead, they’re focused on putting petty personal grievances over people and actual policies. **The good news is we can crush their chances of seizing power, and it starts here in CA-41.**

[**That’s why I’m asking you to send in a donation to support Will Rollins -- one of the finest candidates for Congress that I have had the privilege of supporting. Will tells me he's just about $15,000 short of his critical end-of-quarter fundraising goal, and $10 from you would go a long way.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53241?t=7&akid=10597%2E878179%2EkbdA9w) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Will Rollins and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53242?t=8&akid=10597%2E878179%2EkbdA9w)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53243?t=9&akid=10597%2E878179%2EkbdA9w)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53244?t=10&akid=10597%2E878179%2EkbdA9w)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53245?t=11&akid=10597%2E878179%2EkbdA9w)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53241?t=12&akid=10597%2E878179%2EkbdA9w)
With the majority hinging on five seats, the road to winning back the House runs straight through CA-41.

**And there is no question in my mind that this time around, with the presidency on the ballot, Will has what it takes to flip this seat and end Ken Calvert’s 30 year career.**

But with Kevin McCarthy and his super PAC allies already threatening to spend millions of dollars to effectively _buy_ this seat, I know that every dollar is going to matter here. That’s why I’m asking:

[**Can you send in $10 to Will's campaign before his FEC deadline in 8 days? We can’t afford to fall short -- not with so much at stake.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53241?t=13&akid=10597%2E878179%2EkbdA9w)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Will Rollins and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53242?t=14&akid=10597%2E878179%2EkbdA9w)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53243?t=15&akid=10597%2E878179%2EkbdA9w)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53244?t=16&akid=10597%2E878179%2EkbdA9w)

Thanks,

Barbara Boxer
Former U.S. Senator

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=10597%2E878179%2EkbdA9w). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=10597%2E878179%2EkbdA9w).**

name: Your Personal Invite
subject: Please be honest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
AXIOS: Record number of Americans say they're politically independent Listen, we need to know if it's true or if the media is once again wrong... | AXIOS:
_Record number of Americans say they're politically independent_

In 2020, Gallup polling was used by the liberal media to assert Republicans were "leaving the party in droves."

Now, a softer version of the same story is making the rounds. This time...it's all about a record number of "independent" voters.

Listen, we need to know if it's true **or** if the media is once again wrong...

Please be 100% honest.

| Have you left the Republican Party?

clean_body: AXIOS: Record number of Americans say they're politically independent Listen, we need to know if it's true or if the media is once again wrong... | AXIOS: Record number of Americans say they're politically independent In 2020, Gallup polling was used by the liberal media to assert Republicans were "leaving the party in droves." Now, a softer version of the same story is making the rounds. This time...it's all about a record number of "independent" voters. Listen, we need to know if it's true or if the media is once again wrong... Please be 100% honest. | Have you left the Republican Party? Has something changed to draw you away? Please, either way, let us know before tomorrow morning. This really matters. Waiting on your response, --Senate Republicans | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions to the NRSC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. NRSC, 425 2nd Street NE, Washington D.C. 20002 |

body:
I’m raffling off one of my favorite pistol to one lucky individual.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=94bb707245bb445398c99a9e9e83bd67&_t=jYD0wq0eljNhcTs3Kxv2mJ--YGiMK9gWHZtnIViD434uv8HuiWTuJg7nIifJtQLjmPmkJWF3up0lKXZzzX2tHi5WEMqOOFLUqEIKmeX9ZkE%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=94bb707245bb445398c99a9e9e83bd67&_t=jYD0wq0eljNhcTs3Kxv2mJ--YGiMK9gWHZtnIViD434uv8HuiWTuJg7nIifJtQLjmPmkJWF3up0lKXZzzX2tHi5WEMqOOFLUqEIKmeX9ZkE%3D)

| **_“An armed man is a citizen; an unarmed man is a victim.”_
- Allen West**
* * *

Fellow American,
**_
It’s time for me to give away another gun!_**

If you recall, I held a similar raffle back in June and gave away my favorite BTE-USA Taner Carbine AR-15. That raffle raised a considerable amount of money for my campaign at a time when we really needed an infusion of cash.

With the announcement that my race is about to get a bit more crowded, **we’re once again in need.** So, I’ve decided to raffle off a cool gun – _**one of my favorites**_ – a Kimber 1911 stainless II!

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=94bb707245bb445398c99a9e9e83bd67&_e=bhIc1bpC2B2sbtEylj_oH9sE2UTwiekyFAgltJ3Wg3_nNXG5GDTNb4zp-VmEDkY-zPeXgi6I1wZFYDQba6RgCV6rztiEK3CEDEktfDOFtFE_F92Cow4JLUX9dwGMcB61p2Yu7u6_nAvzPhH_nvbYzq3nEQFpedazS-e_IdeL8_WEE-uS2E93CA_gG8vuTNcvolBmkXoH--G9ecWdGQy98SQOC-yJwLuQ9_FVDADTQ16Dj-xUG8mtgWOYTYK37YJwPEhLMrXnZ0wlerNWkytnqTGTym4CEhg8Ny3JgYDULkjB3A5QbrJPMZ7nXf22fe2DnluCd2Jk2kTDI-LTqAWHAQo-TtW5NhY2AUjyuvlbP2bVhi6B4M3NrPnlTbc0GHoU1_7K5BY0-AxesQ1yGctZcA%3D%3D)
Have you ever wanted to own a handgun used by an American Sheriff? Well, **[now is your chance.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=94bb707245bb445398c99a9e9e83bd67&_e=bhIc1bpC2B2sbtEylj_oH9sE2UTwiekyFAgltJ3Wg3_nNXG5GDTNb4zp-VmEDkY-zPeXgi6I1wZFYDQba6RgCV6rztiEK3CEDEktfDOFtFE_F92Cow4JLUX9dwGMcB61p2Yu7u6_nAvzPhH_nvbYzq3nEQFpedazS-e_IdeL8_WEE-uS2E93CA_gG8vuTNcvolBmkXoH--G9ecWdGQy98SQOC-yJwLuQ9_FVDADTQ16Dj-xUG8mtgWOYTYK37YJwHUyl5WiTju_JZKmu4kjOuNw4A0F57K9_oLgVzOFbbEO0XAYpWZ3IiwRjDk0v63reCJACivg7IY8cv9CWb1tec1BQAtXDE4mdA5_tgtLCvi3VCH67RUma1k0ELQ57is3rv-UA4rtnAMEwF4MBqKyFtg%3D%3D)**

Some of you reading this right now might be asking yourselves, “Why are you giving away a beautiful handgun with a 5.25” barrel and rosewood grip?”

It’s simple: **[The $9.11 donation that I’m asking you to make right now](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=94bb707245bb445398c99a9e9e83bd67&_e=bhIc1bpC2B2sbtEylj_oH9sE2UTwiekyFAgltJ3Wg3_nNXG5GDTNb4zp-VmEDkY-zPeXgi6I1wZFYDQba6RgCV6rztiEK3CEDEktfDOFtFE_F92Cow4JLUX9dwGMcB61p2Yu7u6_nAvzPhH_nvbYzq3nEQFpedazS-e_IdeL8_WEE-uS2E93CA_gG8vuTNcvolBmkXoH--G9ecWdGQy98SQOC-yJwLuQ9_FVDADTQ16Dj-xUG8mtgWOYTYK37YJw99069rM_AR2_TjCWHX1oda26il2CPumP6TUO0WuRwh2thYhzola-fS_s69eWOCPpJ-rljDTnvq5nszE7UxdqvvcrzdPdnWgSO7q4lvSaVgw1NSngfUDlEFBBxjWaG6phij7bNjQv8pDiL0tcbJsDsg%3D%3D)** for a chance to win this American-made handgun will help my U.S. Senate campaign become bullet-proof come Election Day 2024.

**Donate $9.11 right now and you could win a handgun valued at $1,021! With the barrier to entry that low, how can you afford not to enter? **

[**ENTER FOR YOUR CHANCE TO WIN TODAY »**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=94bb707245bb445398c99a9e9e83bd67&_e=bhIc1bpC2B2sbtEylj_oH9sE2UTwiekyFAgltJ3Wg3_nNXG5GDTNb4zp-VmEDkY-zPeXgi6I1wZFYDQba6RgCV6rztiEK3CEDEktfDOFtFE_F92Cow4JLUX9dwGMcB61p2Yu7u6_nAvzPhH_nvbYzq3nEQFpedazS-e_IdeL8_WEE-uS2E93CA_gG8vuTNcvolBmkXoH--G9ecWdGQy98SQOC-yJwLuQ9_FVDADTQ16Dj-xUG8mtgWOYTYK37YJwTIvKYXUBu3k_p-ea45hYmd_Kn-9O-CMB9u7X4RQwNJcVvuwVmaWDK3vs8tpvlxLZRPUFFvX0ejTPgtQkZVbrBuH8Ni0A-yRgYCvIM6kzhUxs8wGa0Ss5HdY5iXks7K9nBbjNffwh1jWjAyiEsOXsRg%3D%3D) [**CHIP IN $9.11
ENTER THE RAFFLE »**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=94bb707245bb445398c99a9e9e83bd67&_e=bhIc1bpC2B2sbtEylj_oH9sE2UTwiekyFAgltJ3Wg3_nNXG5GDTNb4zp-VmEDkY-zPeXgi6I1wZFYDQba6RgCV6rztiEK3CEDEktfDOFtFE_F92Cow4JLUX9dwGMcB61p2Yu7u6_nAvzPhH_nvbYzq3nEQFpedazS-e_IdeL8_WEE-uS2E93CA_gG8vuTNcvolBmkXoH--G9ecWdGQy98SQOC-yJwLuQ9_FVDADTQ16Dj-xUG8mtgWOYTYK37YJwoLmNS1e26yBTyeJZJBHYMWtnjaZdVv7hTznSiCpsqEbsrqsdIwske2J8nHaNXkPWmVZrDnsSXx9x--TaENc7lCOc3hXj8pAjIxu0nKK2q9u_zJwpYyXSqa7VfjsYKz4QrKRVoWcd356wPSy6x2HeYw%3D%3D)
As the top law enforcement official in Arizona’s third largest county and candidate for the U.S. Senate, I believe it’s my responsibility to show the Left that most gun owners are responsible, law-abiding citizens.

Responsible gun owners pay their taxes on time.

Responsible gun owners use their Second Amendment right to protect themselves and those they love from those who would wish harm upon them.

Responsible gun owners obey the law.

Raffling off my Kimber 1911 not only gives me the opportunity to connect with other gun enthusiasts like you, but it also opens another avenue in which to **[secure your support for my Republican U.S. Senate campaign.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=94bb707245bb445398c99a9e9e83bd67&_e=bhIc1bpC2B2sbtEylj_oH9sE2UTwiekyFAgltJ3Wg3_nNXG5GDTNb4zp-VmEDkY-zPeXgi6I1wZFYDQba6RgCV6rztiEK3CEDEktfDOFtFE_F92Cow4JLUX9dwGMcB61p2Yu7u6_nAvzPhH_nvbYzq3nEQFpedazS-e_IdeL8_WEE-uS2E93CA_gG8vuTNcvolBmkXoH--G9ecWdGQy98SQOC-yJwLuQ9_FVDADTQ16Dj-xUG8mtgWOYTYK37YJwU7duAV5oSO2KIIZchG3SJelgOHI7p3rGVk4e24THCkqwd3CBYYYaC276r9mSLbrUJKUe_oQ1LmDiaITYi5-ZAuI5MbDeZkBDUcBHvpnes_sohVBnwXyi1kVYxXXP26LI3JaOWsQTAfypoWLTzM9Q8w%3D%3D)**

**This contest, like my campaign, is likely to get hot! So, don’t wait to make a donation of $9.11 now which guarantees you entry into the raffle.**

If you want my gun, then you’ll need to make sure you enter by 11:59 p.m. on September 30th. So don’t wait – if you’re reading this right now, **[enter this very moment!](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=94bb707245bb445398c99a9e9e83bd67&_e=bhIc1bpC2B2sbtEylj_oH9sE2UTwiekyFAgltJ3Wg3_nNXG5GDTNb4zp-VmEDkY-zPeXgi6I1wZFYDQba6RgCV6rztiEK3CEDEktfDOFtFE_F92Cow4JLUX9dwGMcB61p2Yu7u6_nAvzPhH_nvbYzq3nEQFpedazS-e_IdeL8_WEE-uS2E93CA_gG8vuTNcvolBmkXoH--G9ecWdGQy98SQOC-yJwLuQ9_FVDADTQ16Dj-xUG8mtgWOYTYK37YJwQiRggNI_CzrlklPhDa6DYu_aNcEmHWE9cQGxzRW2v_s3ZVfDUiU42avnDOiDRv2q6UMZ0IVz6pdrJw9s847RrQEQ1jtJ7R1EDTHNLqOYSC09WHL5eWd7enyd4qhazlgOPc_XGGZJPnHIgY5DckbInQ%3D%3D)**

[**CHIP IN $9.11 »**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=94bb707245bb445398c99a9e9e83bd67&_e=bhIc1bpC2B2sbtEylj_oH9sE2UTwiekyFAgltJ3Wg3_nNXG5GDTNb4zp-VmEDkY-zPeXgi6I1wZFYDQba6RgCV6rztiEK3CEDEktfDOFtFE_F92Cow4JLUX9dwGMcB61p2Yu7u6_nAvzPhH_nvbYzq3nEQFpedazS-e_IdeL8_WEE-uS2E93CA_gG8vuTNcvolBmkXoH--G9ecWdGQy98SQOC-yJwLuQ9_FVDADTQ16Dj-xUG8mtgWOYTYK37YJwjIaDdPBvDfy4NGQk5whxQPSKL0ho6IYbBSrTW8mur5Dx81V3EtyhkXWPrIkXg5Lu6CRR8VtqTWVjuTiDJftyWP35dbproDxXO7hFjBakr0vNMsbHoFrhFJdV0R3fHUcKizdLq1AQspuBNUICikcpWQ%3D%3D)

Good luck - and thank you!
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=94bb707245bb445398c99a9e9e83bd67&_e=bhIc1bpC2B2sbtEylj_oH9sE2UTwiekyFAgltJ3Wg3_nNXG5GDTNb4zp-VmEDkY-zPeXgi6I1wZFYDQba6RgCV6rztiEK3CEDEktfDOFtFE_F92Cow4JLUX9dwGMcB61p2Yu7u6_nAvzPhH_nvbYzq3nEQFpedazS-e_IdeL8_WEE-uS2E93CA_gG8vuTNcvolBmkXoH--G9ecWdGQy98SQOC-yJwLuQ9_FVDADTQ16Dj-xUG8mtgWOYTYK37YJwmdgDW_z9SBCdi6A7yzyQ3pifW5g8pWoPuUvUzrQCqGHacwP7hdOaW3J_Krx77SuZy3ZZZxSeXx4IGQmDOL1peGFchw-A3gRVWgKaRddu4d89MKcEEGOilBocRWLs4EhUef5Zg6MfrU6-rr4rIqg6jQ%3D%3D)

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

[ ** HELP ME FLIP ARIZONA'S SENATE SEAT RED ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=94bb707245bb445398c99a9e9e83bd67&_e=bhIc1bpC2B2sbtEylj_oH9sE2UTwiekyFAgltJ3Wg3_nNXG5GDTNb4zp-VmEDkY-zPeXgi6I1wZFYDQba6RgCV6rztiEK3CEDEktfDOFtFE_F92Cow4JLUX9dwGMcB61p2Yu7u6_nAvzPhH_nvbYzq3nEQFpedazS-e_IdeL8_WEE-uS2E93CA_gG8vuTNcvolBmkXoH--G9ecWdGQy98SQOC-yJwLuQ9_FVDADTQ16Dj-xUG8mtgWOYTYK37YJwtB_xwVhb6nPJ-DkNv9iV958M6ejiIvseCB7r70tS9qPh-4LRAGuLxxFYUUYUrxEQComSEBmLF1cySQYgbTgDgZzukwW-eVLHrSHnzyVcaE6t2VaBw8wQax4XCqk6Z4Gz2SPwm7y_XVPams1MOJ8D3A%3D%3D)

clean_body: I’m raffling off one of my favorite pistol to one lucky individual. | | “An armed man is a citizen; an unarmed man is a victim.” - Allen West Fellow American, It’s time for me to give away another gun! If you recall, I held a similar raffle back in June and gave away my favorite BTE-USA Taner Carbine AR-15. That raffle raised a considerable amount of money for my campaign at a time when we really needed an infusion of cash. With the announcement that my race is about to get a bit more crowded, we’re once again in need. So, I’ve decided to raffle off a cool gun – one of my favorites – a Kimber 1911 stainless II! Have you ever wanted to own a handgun used by an American Sheriff? Well, Some of you reading this right now might be asking yourselves, “Why are you giving away a beautiful handgun with a 5.25” barrel and rosewood grip?” It’s simple: for a chance to win this American-made handgun will help my U.S. Senate campaign become bullet-proof come Election Day 2024. Donate $9.11 right now and you could win a handgun valued at $1,021! With the barrier to entry that low, how can you afford not to enter? As the top law enforcement official in Arizona’s third largest county and candidate for the U.S. Senate, I believe it’s my responsibility to show the Left that most gun owners are responsible, law-abiding citizens. Responsible gun owners pay their taxes on time. Responsible gun owners use their Second Amendment right to protect themselves and those they love from those who would wish harm upon them. Responsible gun owners obey the law. Raffling off my Kimber 1911 not only gives me the opportunity to connect with other gun enthusiasts like you, but it also opens another avenue in which to This contest, like my campaign, is likely to get hot! So, don’t wait to make a donation of $9.11 now which guarantees you entry into the raffle. If you want my gun, then you’ll need to make sure you enter by 11:59 p.m. on September 30th. So don’t wait – if you’re reading this right now, Good luck - and thank you! Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. P.S. name: Riley Gaines
subject: Join Me in Standing Up for Women’s Sports and American Values
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews._kYu3liAlpExnUoIWw)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you’d like to give online, here’s a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://trk.readactnews._9P0eudPZGknOKrl1FX5bA)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity’s show that I’ve partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I’m the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths – that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types – patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left’s cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America’s freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you – that’s when you know you’re saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America’s founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone – because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://trk.readactnews.)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women’s identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://trk.readactnews._sKrrf0EjM8XLQS7Q)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyNjYtNTBmNDM5OTU2MGMzNGNhNDkxNGRkYjc4ZDZhMzllOTkiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/8RoFdQLjTvZXstC5_pfSDg) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: A hope-filled study of the book of Revelation
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjY2LTc2NzIzYjg3MzYzOTRlZjFiMmFkZjY4MmRlY2Q0MjZlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5wdHYub3JnL2ZpbmFsLWNvbnF1ZXN0LWdlbmVyb3VzLWdpZnQta2l0LTE_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9V0VCJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249ZmluYWxfY29ucXVlc3QmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfTExPNDMwNjgifQ/cH-tDjfEjbeNJpiqUaXsEQ)
---
Hello Friend,Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?_When we all get to Heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be!__When we all see Jesus, we'll sing and shout the victory!_ The words of this old hymn say it perfectly ... Christ's return is going to be glorious!**But between now and then, how should we live**? What does God's Word say about end times? As the world grows increasingly sinful ... **what should our response be?**
---

name: First Lady Casey DeSantis
subject: The largest movement of parents in political history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore America, and mamas everywhere are joining him.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zl0duo7mo3ctri3i47kgo8pa1iemo02net7e3da0_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hm4pj2clh2bs)
---
Hi, Friend, Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America. His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are respected and protected; and where the American people are sovereign in their own nation once again. Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. **We 're not just fighting to secure our future _ -- we're fighting to secure a future for our children._ ** That's why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We're the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor's Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida's families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...**and now, we're taking our mamas movement national!** The parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the rights of parents. As the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and win. We beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas' army kicks into gear across the country, we'll beat them on the national stage, too. **Friend****,[will you join our historic movement of mamas today or send this message to your favorite mamas in your life who would be interested in joining?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zho7edkmrrsrj9172b0aavdsofhl1spr0n8o2hq0_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hm4pj2clh2bs "will you join our historic movement of mamas today?") ** Together, we will fight for our children. We will defeat Joe Biden. We will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback. And we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America.

In Freedom,
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9rjogi7p3vcdsgs9vl1jbco858gsjgf0qt8lpgg_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hm4pj2clh2bs)
---
Casey DeSantis
First Lady of Florida

---
| | [Join Mamas for DeSantis Today!](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2rc9qupltphfb7u5rv8mmu1jj167q40ut0r9qjg_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hm4pj2clh2bs)
---

name: Lady Casey DeSantis
subject: Fighting for the Future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
The first Republican presidential primary debate marked just the beginning. We fought, and we will continue to fight. We will never back down.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze6v5o8hgcklqlqc15mdvn8af2d5d5iplpvp401o_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmcoj1cjh2bs)
---
Friend, The first Republican primary debate was an opportunity for the nation to hear directly from their future President. To earn YOUR support, I stood up, weathered the attacks, and now I know that we are one step closer to stopping the decline of this country. **If you 're just tuning into the race, I'd like to take a moment to tell you a little bit about myself so you know why I'm running for President, what I plan to accomplish, and why I'm asking for your support.** _**Here 's my story**_: I was a blue-collar kid born and raised in Florida who went on to work my way through Yale University where I was Team Captain of our baseball team, before going on to graduate from Harvard Law School. After earning my degrees and witnessing the horrific attack on our nation's freedom on September 11th, 2001, I knew I had to stand up. I volunteered for the Navy and went on to serve in Iraq as a JAG Officer in support of SEAL Team 1.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z91gkr97gla6fmiluur5aludsv1fcrfs0nlvtvbg_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmcoj1cjh2bs)
---
Since my time serving in the Navy, I have taken on the role of prosecutor, Congressman, proud Governor of the free state of Florida, father to three young children, and husband to my wonderful wife, Casey.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9gbnc14hu975tuigfok72rtfuqu9pm4dfnbpsog_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmcoj1cjh2bs)
---

As Governor, I have made it my mission to lead with conviction, unwavering energy, and with a refusal to back down. That's why, in Florida, we held the line when freedom hung in the balance. When Covid policies across the country made commonsense an uncommon virtue, our state became a refuge of sanity and a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans. Leadership matters and I believe my record speaks for itself. Since I took office as Governor, Florida now:
* Ranks as the number one economy in the country by CNBC;
* Ranks number one for new business formations;

* Ranks number one for net in-migration;
* Ranks number one for economic growth amongst large states;
* Has an unemployment rate that is a percentage point below the national average and even lower than other large states like California and New York;
* Ranks number one in education by US News and World Report;
* Has NO state income tax;

* Has a crime rate at a 50-year low.

I have worked tirelessly to transform a once purple state to a deep red blueprint for freedom.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvcu7ig4294kut6l0qh0u4o33ogimmli12fs0dno_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmcoj1cjh2bs)
---
But here's the problem, Friend. Failing leftist policies across the country are shoving a radical ideology down your throat. They're telling you that men can get pregnant, want to impose a social credit score on you, and let Mexican drug cartels cross our border freely and continue to murder Americans. This is NOT okay. Riots and disorder have infested some of this nation's oldest cities and turned places like Chicago, Philadelphia, and San Francisco into crime slums. I am NOT willing to accept this decline. We have a President who is floundering and bowing down to his own party instead of doing what is right for the American people. He has consistently bent the knee to the woke mob. These radical policies across the nation are making it nearly impossible for hardworking families to achieve the American Dream, and as a father of three young children and husband to my wife Casey, I cannot sit idly by while their future hangs in the balance. _**This election is not about me. It 's about YOU and the American children who are being subjected to the woke mob's fraud.**_
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt1l71r65ppf212e6ndb6eroe5t1tk24b3hmo918_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmcoj1cjh2bs)
---
Our nation is facing a critical choice in 2024: Freedom or Decline. That is why I am running for President; I will not stand by while Joe Biden sends this nation into deeper decline for another four years. I'm not running to be President. I am running to DO things as President and from Day One we are going to rip up disastrous policies that are harming American families and REVERSE the decline Joe Biden has let fester in this country. The time to act is NOW.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8q9lg23pg84lt75ptub0kq9e8t8anjh2a0uq5pg_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmcoj1cjh2bs)
---
| | [Chip in to my campaign here](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrucbnu6lltpr10ok1hls1hfmithtglnsph9n4so_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmcoj1cjh2bs)
---
I believe that decline is choice, success is attainable, and freedom is worth fighting for. I fought with everything I had on that debate stage on August 23rd and took my vision for restoring this nation directly to the American people. I know that no one is entitled to anything in this world, so I am fighting to earn your support and lead when it matters most. Starting on Day One as President of the United States, these are just some of the plans I am promising to you:
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zot0jl3e8hlrah3957g9bphm0giqlqbbf97s7ue0_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmcoj1cjh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq6s3ubq66231mmrpdfu1d25ufvbq6c8hmd1u12o_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmcoj1cjh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z97kt7ap3m279t2j72ci0ob2m58hur1qt46ahrug_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmcoj1cjh2bs)
---
Friend, together, we will restore sanity to our society, normalcy to our communities, and integrity to our institutions.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlprfpjrtc3vtae469erqa9gpjc3le5thr77jv00_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmcoj1cjh2bs)
---
I stood up for the needs of the American people on the debate stage, and I made sure you know that I will never back down from being your voice and your fighter. _**[Please, join me in fighting for the future--because freedom is always worth fighting for.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6nj0i5890slhcsngteqqehij45nphrfm1at1nd0_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmcoj1cjh2bs "Please, join me in fighting for the future—because freedom is always worth fighting for.")**_ In Freedom,
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zijsm15qlhte846pu4vtcfrgmkggv02c1lcu9vhg_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmcoj1cjh2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn8492ajtjv44icrjsucfe0jjm7or7eh2s67plqo_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmcoj1cjh2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---
| Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
---
| PO Box 3696
Tallahassee, FL 32315

---

Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. name: First Lady Casey DeSantis
subject: Fighting for the Future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
The first Republican presidential primary debate marked just the beginning. We fought, and we will continue to fight. We will never back down.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvrbnpos4evafv55h8klcjlg6sk672kaiviftcu0_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hm2p30cdh2bs)
---
Friend, The first Republican primary debate was an opportunity for the nation to hear directly from their future President. To earn YOUR support, I stood up, weathered the attacks, and now I know that we are one step closer to stopping the decline of this country. **If you 're just tuning into the race, I'd like to take a moment to tell you a little bit about myself so you know why I'm running for President, what I plan to accomplish, and why I'm asking for your support.** _**Here 's my story**_: I was a blue-collar kid born and raised in Florida who went on to work my way through Yale University where I was Team Captain of our baseball team, before going on to graduate from Harvard Law School. After earning my degrees and witnessing the horrific attack on our nation's freedom on September 11th, 2001, I knew I had to stand up. I volunteered for the Navy and went on to serve in Iraq as a JAG Officer in support of SEAL Team 1.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znl2iolr0f5p23pdj1f822hui95beopfdkla4dbg_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hm2p30cdh2bs)
---
Since my time serving in the Navy, I have taken on the role of prosecutor, Congressman, proud Governor of the free state of Florida, father to three young children, and husband to my wonderful wife, Casey.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3s4lm7jlvhj1rnlfojkc6kiuhnn9jiiqrbpv368_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hm2p30cdh2bs)
---

As Governor, I have made it my mission to lead with conviction, unwavering energy, and with a refusal to back down. That's why, in Florida, we held the line when freedom hung in the balance. When Covid policies across the country made commonsense an uncommon virtue, our state became a refuge of sanity and a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans. Leadership matters and I believe my record speaks for itself. Since I took office as Governor, Florida now:
* Ranks as the number one economy in the country by CNBC;
* Ranks number one for new business formations;

* Ranks number one for net in-migration;
* Ranks number one for economic growth amongst large states;
* Has an unemployment rate that is a percentage point below the national average and even lower than other large states like California and New York;
* Ranks number one in education by US News and World Report;
* Has NO state income tax;

* Has a crime rate at a 50-year low.

I have worked tirelessly to transform a once purple state to a deep red blueprint for freedom.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv848pdmqofeqhfbgpughbno8k7gvenjpuhh9rso_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hm2p30cdh2bs)
---
But here's the problem, Friend. Failing leftist policies across the country are shoving a radical ideology down your throat. They're telling you that men can get pregnant, want to impose a social credit score on you, and let Mexican drug cartels cross our border freely and continue to murder Americans. This is NOT okay. Riots and disorder have infested some of this nation's oldest cities and turned places like Chicago, Philadelphia, and San Francisco into crime slums. I am NOT willing to accept this decline. We have a President who is floundering and bowing down to his own party instead of doing what is right for the American people. He has consistently bent the knee to the woke mob. These radical policies across the nation are making it nearly impossible for hardworking families to achieve the American Dream, and as a father of three young children and husband to my wife Casey, I cannot sit idly by while their future hangs in the balance. _**This election is not about me. It 's about YOU and the American children who are being subjected to the woke mob's fraud.**_
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zisldmd4ispho0sqdql0dac4ggrv00oh3pbhq0j8_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hm2p30cdh2bs)
---
Our nation is facing a critical choice in 2024: Freedom or Decline. That is why I am running for President; I will not stand by while Joe Biden sends this nation into deeper decline for another four years. I'm not running to be President. I am running to DO things as President and from Day One we are going to rip up disastrous policies that are harming American families and REVERSE the decline Joe Biden has let fester in this country. The time to act is NOW.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsj74a7cse5q2odrb4rc30tnph4005n4ehi1sjuo_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hm2p30cdh2bs)
---
| | [Chip in to my campaign here](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt3gddsgj85b0nbguggjli8fk4q1rbfct52ccutg_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hm2p30cdh2bs)
---
I believe that decline is choice, success is attainable, and freedom is worth fighting for. I fought with everything I had on that debate stage on August 23rd and took my vision for restoring this nation directly to the American people. I know that no one is entitled to anything in this world, so I am fighting to earn your support and lead when it matters most. Starting on Day One as President of the United States, these are just some of the plans I am promising to you:
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlbi8j535v1s3301jcej080i145qdrjlcr7v61ag_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hm2p30cdh2bs)
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za4a90qrhfpj3vn78kl4p44jpqegol4qvvc6rli8_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hm2p30cdh2bs)
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrt95ea4d840tvjll81vak66ij6qb6naaamn1sm8_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hm2p30cdh2bs)
---
Friend, together, we will restore sanity to our society, normalcy to our communities, and integrity to our institutions.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7i341bis7ohdr2hkbic9l16o0fi4ecqlcksi020_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hm2p30cdh2bs)
---
I stood up for the needs of the American people on the debate stage, and I made sure you know that I will never back down from being your voice and your fighter. _**[Please, join me in fighting for the future--because freedom is always worth fighting for.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zje85ftag6kfsp4ip7lhl4pp7vf3b2llo157f5og_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hm2p30cdh2bs "Please, join me in fighting for the future—because freedom is always worth fighting for.")**_ In Freedom,
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z63o9mcib2edkkl4id1i6hdg29mnv0nch5ad6bn0_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hm2p30cdh2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zefvr7i7mg5ri7sj72imin0blssta7mtjcaptdug_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hm2p30cdh2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules

* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.

He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
