name: First Lady Casey DeSantis
subject: Millions of moms mobilize
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
The first Republican presidential primary debate marked just the beginning. We fought, and we will continue to fight. We will never back down.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zo16qnjkkrf7ju2853lkshbqeq19if299gporl88_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmao30c3h2bs)
---
Friend, The first Republican primary debate was an opportunity for the nation to hear directly from their future President. To earn YOUR support, I stood up, weathered the attacks, and now I know that we are one step closer to stopping the decline of this country. **If you 're just tuning into the race, I'd like to take a moment to tell you a little bit about myself so you know why I'm running for President, what I plan to accomplish, and why I'm asking for your support.** _**Here 's my story**_: I was a blue-collar kid born and raised in Florida who went on to work my way through Yale University where I was Team Captain of our baseball team, before going on to graduate from Harvard Law School. After earning my degrees and witnessing the horrific attack on our nation's freedom on September 11th, 2001, I knew I had to stand up. I volunteered for the Navy and went on to serve in Iraq as a JAG Officer in support of SEAL Team 1.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znioa1v6hlkqg657jmnd09k3jqgq4povsjadank8_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmao30c3h2bs)
---
Since my time serving in the Navy, I have taken on the role of prosecutor, Congressman, proud Governor of the free state of Florida, father to three young children, and husband to my wonderful wife, Casey.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm2db7ul744uteagj0gnedr2c39tbllai1dintvo_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmao30c3h2bs)
---

As Governor, I have made it my mission to lead with conviction, unwavering energy, and with a refusal to back down. That's why, in Florida, we held the line when freedom hung in the balance. When Covid policies across the country made commonsense an uncommon virtue, our state became a refuge of sanity and a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans. Leadership matters and I believe my record speaks for itself. Since I took office as Governor, Florida now:
* Ranks as the number one economy in the country by CNBC;
* Ranks number one for new business formations;

* Ranks number one for net in-migration;
* Ranks number one for economic growth amongst large states;
* Has an unemployment rate that is a percentage point below the national average and even lower than other large states like California and New York;
* Ranks number one in education by US News and World Report;
* Has NO state income tax;

* Has a crime rate at a 50-year low.

I have worked tirelessly to transform a once purple state to a deep red blueprint for freedom.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1i4f5ff5mg1l1s611ibamlv0hhb4e604v81pa08_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmao30c3h2bs)
---
But here's the problem, Friend. Failing leftist policies across the country are shoving a radical ideology down your throat. They're telling you that men can get pregnant, want to impose a social credit score on you, and let Mexican drug cartels cross our border freely and continue to murder Americans. This is NOT okay. Riots and disorder have infested some of this nation's oldest cities and turned places like Chicago, Philadelphia, and San Francisco into crime slums. I am NOT willing to accept this decline. We have a President who is floundering and bowing down to his own party instead of doing what is right for the American people. He has consistently bent the knee to the woke mob. These radical policies across the nation are making it nearly impossible for hardworking families to achieve the American Dream, and as a father of three young children and husband to my wife Casey, I cannot sit idly by while their future hangs in the balance. _**This election is not about me. It 's about YOU and the American children who are being subjected to the woke mob's fraud.**_
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmuj8mhafumdotf1sk80p1rsi32k5fle6fhqimo8_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmao30c3h2bs)
---
Our nation is facing a critical choice in 2024: Freedom or Decline. That is why I am running for President; I will not stand by while Joe Biden sends this nation into deeper decline for another four years. I'm not running to be President. I am running to DO things as President and from Day One we are going to rip up disastrous policies that are harming American families and REVERSE the decline Joe Biden has let fester in this country. The time to act is NOW.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfifqudfs7p8losq6tr5m89oi5708rkfng2293j8_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmao30c3h2bs)
---
| | [Chip in to my campaign here](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvmes2s1mlgv9ri6mafcijbch9i5khbf8l5vnhb0_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmao30c3h2bs)
---
I believe that decline is choice, success is attainable, and freedom is worth fighting for. I fought with everything I had on that debate stage on August 23rd and took my vision for restoring this nation directly to the American people. I know that no one is entitled to anything in this world, so I am fighting to earn your support and lead when it matters most. Starting on Day One as President of the United States, these are just some of the plans I am promising to you:
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zup7qr03h78ich55evf3bh8kl1sp56fo41cdh6ig_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmao30c3h2bs)
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zug9jrquhd8mkqun8rrd7o55eqsil43hit29kebo_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmao30c3h2bs)
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3gqtnsq95tcnce8gb4b4a74um737v91c10pf9c8_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmao30c3h2bs)
---
Friend, together, we will restore sanity to our society, normalcy to our communities, and integrity to our institutions.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlqpifqncc4n9i83ntg9882q96tjif829otgk95g_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmao30c3h2bs)
---
I stood up for the needs of the American people on the debate stage, and I made sure you know that I will never back down from being your voice and your fighter. _**[Please, join me in fighting for the future--because freedom is always worth fighting for.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zf1lu89ugleeadort8bje6ums46ccdet8768i4jo_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmao30c3h2bs "Please, join me in fighting for the future—because freedom is always worth fighting for.")**_ In Freedom,
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbbk93cts93hmkve1bksns5vjtvh07g3tlpn4m10_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmao30c3h2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrk7hh2vv90idr88ikg51u7fpmo9d769gkf07tjo_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmao30c3h2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

name: First Lady Casey DeSantis
subject: The largest movement of parents in political history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore America, and mamas everywhere are joining him.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c678593%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6iIpkAfKmP2z%2fQIHX%2bGbTQ&sysid=1)
---
Hi, Friend, Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America. His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are respected and protected; and where the American people are sovereign in their own nation once again. Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. **We’re not just fighting to secure our future _ -- we’re fighting to secure a future for our children._ ** That’s why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We’re the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor’s Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida’s families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...**and now, we're taking our mamas movement national!** The parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the rights of parents. As the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and win. We beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas’ army kicks into gear across the country, we’ll beat them on the national stage, too. **Friend****,[will you join our historic movement of mamas today or send this message to your favorite mamas in your life who would be interested in joining?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c678594%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T3rr%2bigdIQ9MPifWIoETng&sysid=1 "will you join our historic
movement of mamas today?") ** Together, we will fight for our children. We will defeat Joe Biden. We will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback. And we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America.

In Freedom,
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c678593%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6iIpkAfKmP2z%2fQIHX%2bGbTQ&sysid=1)
---
Casey DeSantis
First Lady of Florida

It 's about YOU and the American children who are being subjected to the woke mob's fraud.**_

Ron DeSantis

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7r3q70gjjr1tvcscn0u8jmpqkfifsh82um4g10g_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5hmap74c5h2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

name: First Lady Casey DeSantis
subject: Fighting for the Future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore America, and mamas everywhere are joining him.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23045%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mfqybHUddFTZh4Utzjl29Q&sysid=1)
---
Hi, Friend, Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America. His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are respected and protected; and where the American people are sovereign in their own nation once again. Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. **We’re not just fighting to secure our future _ -- we’re fighting to secure a future for our children._ ** That’s why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We’re the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor’s Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida’s families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...**and now, we're taking our mamas movement national!** The parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the rights of parents. As the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and win. We beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas’ army kicks into gear across the country, we’ll beat them on the national stage, too. **Friend****,[will you join our historic movement of mamas today or send this message to your favorite mamas in your life who would be interested in joining?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23046%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9nAiJ7Mna82xwQKa1uSEmA&sysid=1 "will you join our historic
movement of mamas today?") ** Together, we will fight for our children. We will defeat Joe Biden. We will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback. And we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America.

In Freedom,
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23045%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mfqybHUddFTZh4Utzjl29Q&sysid=1)

The current administration is not the solution. That’s why we need someone who can win. I’m the only one decisively defeating Biden in the polls. I’m surging in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina. We’ve gained so much ground since the first debate, but we have so much more left to accomplish. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=567e418e4fa94d4dd0d8686fa0558a134f5de04e7831204f8be1e222d6190936ded2726841da9ffb9aa23af55d25f1b642f1b8ced5d2aecc930d2670edce2d74 That’s why I’m asking you to step up with your most generous contribution today. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=567e418e4fa94d4dd0d8686fa0558a134f5de04e7831204f8be1e222d6190936ded2726841da9ffb9aa23af55d25f1b642f1b8ced5d2aecc930d2670edce2d74 DONATE I have my second debate in just 4 days. Then 3 days later, we’ll close the books on our third quarter. After that I’ll be gearing up for more swings across the country, continue to build out our ground game in early voting states, and do everything in my power to win the first-in-the-nation caucuses in just 114 days. But getting all of this done requires support. Whether it’s flying our road team out to New Hampshire and Iowa, booking venues at local mom and pop shops for town halls, renting chairs and mics for events, or placing orders for yard signs to show the momentum we have on the ground, every dollar is key. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=567e418e4fa94d4dd0d8686fa0558a134f5de04e7831204f8be1e222d6190936ded2726841da9ffb9aa23af55d25f1b642f1b8ced5d2aecc930d2670edce2d74 So if you can, will you step up with a donation today to help continue this surge of momentum and fund my campaign? Let’s win this! My very best, https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=567e418e4fa94d4dd0d8686fa0558a134f5de04e7831204f8be1e222d6190936ded2726841da9ffb9aa23af55d25f1b642f1b8ced5d2aecc930d2670edce2d74 Nikki Haley https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=567e418e4fa94d4ddb2a4588f199f066ed70df02536b970dbd24dc5a05589bda427b5c9c2b72adde1cd9e17fe769056a118d9e7d674a503d889c1ebace860b82 https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=567e418e4fa94d4ddb2a4588f199f066ed70df02536b970dbd24dc5a05589bda427b5c9c2b72adde1cd9e17fe769056a118d9e7d674a503d889c1ebace860b82 GET YOUR SHIRT https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=567e418e4fa94d4dde8d0d0187e8a59df3ca6e75aa906981785f66ff6518d7003fdb5dd3a2ffb0a42ada93c9b2eea0017e73707b1b03e002704b6d6be2243f0d https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=567e418e4fa94d4dde8d0d0187e8a59df3ca6e75aa906981785f66ff6518d7003fdb5dd3a2ffb0a42ada93c9b2eea0017e73707b1b03e002704b6d6be2243f0d VOLUNTEER More About Nikki Haley https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=567e418e4fa94d4d352c91ed235e3ca1442cbfd25c2a9230498e22e49c1e8bc947300d5a3e4d78bf9a5e0bb58d374a058e78712b067f896dd0adfb33abbaac49 My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=567e418e4fa94d4d352c91ed235e3ca1442cbfd25c2a9230498e22e49c1e8bc947300d5a3e4d78bf9a5e0bb58d374a058e78712b067f896dd0adfb33abbaac49 Will you join me today and help me save our country? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=567e418e4fa94d4d352c91ed235e3ca1442cbfd25c2a9230498e22e49c1e8bc947300d5a3e4d78bf9a5e0bb58d374a058e78712b067f896dd0adfb33abbaac49 DONATE Paid for by Nikki Haley for President. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=567e418e4fa94d4d10d6d2674f4a37a2b675ec5bc3d5038a09c8fc80ed70d17be4acbefd19501cac7703e1d0046646908d17d64aef475249522c4285488ce00e www.nikkihaley.com By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided from each of Nikki Haley for President, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, Team Stand For America, SFA Fund, Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. ### _Friday, September 22, 2023_
Once again we have reached Friday, we discuss the insanity in Washington D.C., comparing it to some of your favorite reality shows. It's 8:00 pm do you know where your F-35 is....the U.S. government didn't. We give our picks heading into College Football Week 4. ### _Wednesday, September 20, 2023_
Othram CEO David Mittelman, whose company specializes in identification of human remains from even trace amounts of DNA, returns to the show to discuss a new bill called "The Carla Walker Act" may help solve cold cases. Plus David shares a few stories of past cases solved. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/dhcjcmllcbrfbbwlfrrntfsbzcfdmzzbpmnwzprhhcjtgr_vjkggkkpkvpynfgyhkjrkrr.html)

### _Monday, September 18, 2023_
Author and political scientist Axel Kaiser joins today's show to give us a better understanding of economics. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/svvpmkzzmgctgghztccdbtlgwmtskwwgrkdhwrcvvmpbjk_vjkggkkpkvpynfgyhkjrkrr.html)

name: Team WisGOP
subject: America’s newest GOP Leader
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Have you heard?
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-pudkyjk-didthutlhu-c/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pudkyjk-didthutlhu-r/)
### Friend,
American cities need Republicans. Don't believe us? Hear it directly from Dallas Mayor Eric Johnson right [here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pudkyjk-didthutlhu-y/). Eric Johnson is a lifelong Democrat who **announced today that he was leaving his party to become a Republican. ** [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pudkyjk-didthutlhu-j/) Yes, you read that right. The mayor of Dallas realized that his support for law enforcement and fiscal conservatism reflected principles of the Republican Party, _**not**_ today's far-left radical Democratic Party. [SUPPORT REPUBLICANS](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pudkyjk-didthutlhu-t/) _" Our cities desperately need the genuine commitment to these principles (as opposed to the inconsistent, poll-driven commitment of many Democrats) that has long been a defining characteristic of the GOP," _said Eric Johnson. You know what, friend? He's right! America's major cities, including right here in Wisconsin, are facing record-high crime as Democrats run them into the ground. Meanwhile, Dallas has actually **LOWERED** their crime rates, from arrests to homicides. _**THAT sounds like Republican leadership!**_ [HELP US WIN](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pudkyjk-didthutlhu-i/) If there's one thing we've learned from Eric Johnson's story today, it's that _**getting a handle on crime, especially in major cities, requires Republican leadership.**_ Democrats just won't get the job done - and they haven't, for years and years. [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pudkyjk-didthutlhu-d/) If you want to see change, we need you to contribute to Republican efforts now. Help us elect Republicans who will deliver Dallas' results to your nearest Wisconsin city. It's what has to be done. Thank you for your support.
- Team WisGOP [CONTRIBUTE $5](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pudkyjk-didthutlhu-h/) [CONTRIBUTE $10](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pudkyjk-didthutlhu-k/) [CONTRIBUTE $25](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pudkyjk-didthutlhu-u/) [CONTRIBUTE $50](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pudkyjk-didthutlhu-o/) [CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pudkyjk-didthutlhu-b/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pudkyjk-didthutlhu-n/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pudkyjk-didthutlhu-p/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pudkyjk-didthutlhu-x/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pudkyjk-didthutlhu-m/) PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. Meanwhile, Dallas has actually LOWERED their crime rates, from arrests to homicides. THAT sounds like Republican leadership! If there's one thing we've learned from Eric Johnson's story today, it's that getting a handle on crime, especially in major cities, requires Republican leadership. Democrats just won't get the job done - and they haven't, for years and years. If you want to see change, we need you to contribute to Republican efforts now. Help us elect Republicans who will deliver Dallas' results to your nearest Wisconsin city. It's what has to be done. Thank you for your support. - Team WisGOP PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. WWW.WISGOP.ORG | Republican Party of Wisconsin148 E. subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8gjh9pc9aenhjl3g406omvomr3vav551o1f4elo_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5jm0ob2chh2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zub4k586vojj20dc26jqr2m6dj082g7nps7hsqqo_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5jm0ob2chh2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z63shb2hejfnodriseuh79un047knt4jpt0hu2go_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5jm0ob2chh2bs)**

name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Writing from the field . . .
body:
I touched down earlier this week and set up a basecamp for my team to go undercover in a story that America will need to see.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp8tuqmml2veudd3nvc1ruil02f25auq3829d7kg_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5jm0ob1chh2bs)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4t1d6ebji2q779he8bpo98eooj4p2ag1lv2ra4g_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5jm0ob1chh2bs)
Dear Patriot,

I touched down earlier this week and set up a basecamp for my team to go undercover in a story that America will need to see.

Our cameras are charged, and we're getting our brave sources wired up to go undercover.

As a journalist, these are the moments I live for. The adrenaline starts to pump as our teams walk into the unexpected.

Undercover journalism is an equal combination of art and ethics – and I've put together a Master Class on my profession to teach other brave Americans how to go undercover, get the story hidden in the darkness, and bring it into the light.

But I need your help finding, training, and equipping new journalists who can work independently and be trusted to present an honest and unbiased story to the public.

**[Will you chip in to cover these costs?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5jvlfmikbnh6s7061dh01fsjihid8cu0foc7ehg_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5jm0ob1chh2bs)**

This is not easy or cheap. This is a battle for America, and I'm training soldiers who will work hard, show the highest degree of integrity, and choose to be courageous.

Now, the Army spends an average of $50,000 to train a basic soldier, and our fighting men and women are worth every penny and more.

Training an undercover journalist costs my company thousands, and that's where you come in . . . **[please chip in to get more journalists in the field.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2ahufdgr7c2g98rip0g6vb9b2bi83hl9r3m787o_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5jm0ob1chh2bs)**

America needs to be swarming with journalists just like we had decades ago.

Today, corporate conglomerates have taken over local papers, and any remaining journalists never leave the comfort of their desks to write a story.

The 4th Estate, the press, is missing in America!

Help me bring it back, but better than ever. **[Please donate here.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1cjp8ok6fihvld2v7sapsnbu00isi2f2d8tg6co_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5jm0ob1chh2bs)**

Thank you for all that you do, and as always, stay tuned.

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpmkktdp1b82ra9rgfh7deej1m9vodi9i10aleeo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni68or4sdj64oh1k8gn48n24hhm9pb1ctg62ob4c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlcp9kh01qjeg1i2qo9peh7adis8d6oh4c5qnb38_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5jm0ob1chh2bs)_

name: First Lady Casey DeSantis
subject: The largest movement of parents in political history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore America, and mamas everywhere are joining him.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8nn588t6l739kf6bcj23863upj0a7sjep9maef8_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5jm8pj2cdh2bs)
---
Hi, Friend, Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America. His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are respected and protected; and where the American people are sovereign in their own nation once again. Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. **We 're not just fighting to secure our future _ -- we're fighting to secure a future for our children._ ** That's why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We're the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor's Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida's families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...**and now, we're taking our mamas movement national!** The parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the rights of parents. As the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and win. We beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas' army kicks into gear across the country, we'll beat them on the national stage, too. **Friend****,[will you join our historic movement of mamas today or send this message to your favorite mamas in your life who would be interested in joining?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6vkbh8dc3hi32ke3b0svk7th9rcj2km0qutsqdo_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5jm8pj2cdh2bs "will you join our historic movement of mamas today?") ** Together, we will fight for our children. We will defeat Joe Biden. We will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback. And we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America.

In Freedom,
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4i96na9mr8alu1q75p1r60ufi59jvar1akvh2ig_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5jm8pj2cdh2bs)

Casey DeSantis
First Lady of Florida

clean_body: Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore America, and mamas everywhere are joining him. | | | | | | | | | | Hi, Friend, Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America. His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are respected and protected; and where the American people are sovereign in their own nation once again. Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. We 're not just fighting to secure our future -- we're fighting to secure a future for our children. That's why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We're the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor's Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida's families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...and now, we're taking our mamas movement national! The parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the rights of parents. As the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and win. We beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas' army kicks into gear across the country, we'll beat them on the national stage, too. Friend, "will you join our historic movement of mamas today?" Together, we will fight for our children. We will defeat Joe Biden. We will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback. And we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Trophy hunters and Big Oil and Gas have done too much damage – stop them before it’s too late
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend, ** | **An entire pack of Yellowstone gray wolves is gone forever. Protect the remaining 89 wolves and the planet: Donate $27 today in honor of National Public Lands Day! ** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007031?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007032?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007033?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007034?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
I have devastating news to share. We thought gray wolves were recovering after receiving protections in Yellowstone. But a trophy hunter rampage violently wiped out 25 wolves just last year. **That’s an entire pack.** Now, **only 89 gray wolves remain in Yellowstone.** And the second a wolf sets its little paws over park lines, it’s fair game for brutal hunters to massacre them. [**Don’t let another wolf meet the same fate. Help protect the remaining Yellowstone wolves and the planet: donate $27 and help us reach our $60,00 goal before National Public Lands Day ends at midnight tonight! **](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007035?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
The Northern Rockies states bordering Yellowstone National Park have limited safeguards to keep gray wolves safe. Trophy hunters are targeting and gunning down these helpless creatures. What’s worse -- they use the most brutal methods imaginable. Choking wolves to death with neck snares. Chasing them down with helicopters. Even dynamiting nursing wolf mamas and their baby pups inside their dens. **And it’s all completely legal.**
All the while, hunters and Big Polluters are fighting against protections for wolves. Why? So they can keep killing for “fun” and take over the land for mining and logging. This system is broken, Friend. But it’s not too late to fix it. Thanks to members like you, we still have the chance to make real change happen. **Today is National Public Lands Day, and there’s never been a better time to act! We’ve set an ambitious $60,000 goal to fight for wolves and our planet before the loss is too great. Will you join us today? **
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007036?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
**These inhumane hunting practices can’t continue. Help protect wolves and the planet and donate $27 before National Public Lands Day ends at midnight tonight! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007031?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007032?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007033?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007034?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
When federal protections were cut for gray wolves, trophy hunters went on a _killing spree._ **Hundreds of wolves were murdered in a matter of days!** Colorado conservationists are working against the odds to protect wolves and the forests they call home. But Colorado’s wolves aren’t bound by state lines. They can legally be tortured and killed as soon as they leave the state.
Not to mention, trophy hunters and Big Oil lobbies are actively pushing against protections for these precious creatures. Their hope is to kill them for sport and invade their habitats. Big Polluters want to open up wolf habitat for mining and logging. All of this blood and destruction -- just for the sake of corporate greed.
These actions have contributed to the gutting of the Endangered Species Act and protections for wolves, bears, and other vulnerable species. Now, **only 6,000 wolves remain** in the lower 48 states. The time to act is now, while there are still wolves left to save!
**Help stop the slaughter before wolves are lost forever. Rush your $27 donation now to help us reach our National Public Lands Day goal for wolves and the planet. **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007031?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007032?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007033?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007034?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Believe it or not, wolves are vital to the ecosystems they live in. They help keep elk and deer populations in check, allowing other plant and animal species to thrive. What’s more, the remains of their kills redistribute nutrients and feed scavengers. They truly are a keystone species!
That’s why each death of this iconic species is a big deal. Since a recent rule rolled back federal protections for gray wolves, the trophy hunting lobby has pushed for even more cruel and inhumane laws throughout wolves’ natural habitats. And even worse, **the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service could reinstate federal protections for these creatures -- but has still failed to do so! **
We can’t stand aside while our wolves are under attack. If even young pups aren’t safe from brutal hunters, this majestic species won’t stand a chance. Friends of the Earth is fighting back to end the bloody violence against our last surviving wolf packs. That means we’re fighting with everything we have to protect the Endangered Species Act. These protections blocked greedy fossil fuel companies from exploiting the land they call home for profit. But it’s at risk to be opened up to fracking, drilling, and mining that create pollution and __harm wildlife and nearby communities, too. __
But we’re up against the powerful hunting lobby and their big industry allies, and we urgently need the help of activists like you to make sure we hit our crucial $60,000 National Public Lands Day goal. Please, Friend: if just 12 more generous supporters from your area make a $27 membership gift, we can reach our goal and help save wolves and the planet before time is up. Will you make your membership contribution in honor of National Public Lands Day before this opportunity expires?
**Protect the remaining wolves and our planet from greedy private interests. Donate $27 before the clock strikes midnight and help us reach our National Public Lands Day goal. **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007031?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007032?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007033?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007034?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia
Senior fossil fuels and lands campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Believe it or not, wolves are vital to the ecosystems they live in. They help keep elk and deer populations in check, allowing other plant and animal species to thrive. What’s more, the remains of their kills redistribute nutrients and feed scavengers. They truly are a keystone species! That’s why each death of this iconic species is a big deal. Since a recent rule rolled back federal protections for gray wolves, the trophy hunting lobby has pushed for even more cruel and inhumane laws throughout wolves’ natural habitats. And even worse, the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service could reinstate federal protections for these creatures -- but has still failed to do so! We can’t stand aside while our wolves are under attack. If even young pups aren’t safe from brutal hunters, this majestic species won’t stand a chance. Friends of the Earth is fighting back to end the bloody violence against our last surviving wolf packs. That means we’re fighting with everything we have to protect the Endangered Species Act. These protections blocked greedy fossil fuel companies from exploiting the land they call home for profit. But it’s at risk to be opened up to fracking, drilling, and mining that create pollution and harm wildlife and nearby communities, too. But we’re up against the powerful hunting lobby and their big industry allies, and we urgently need the help of activists like you to make sure we hit our crucial $60,000 National Public Lands Day goal. Please, Friend: if just 12 more generous supporters from your area make a $27 membership gift, we can reach our goal and help save wolves and the planet before time is up. Will you make your membership contribution in honor of National Public Lands Day before this opportunity expires? Protect the remaining wolves and our planet from greedy private interests. Donate $27 before the clock strikes midnight and help us reach our National Public Lands Day goal. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Standing with you, Raena Garcia Senior fossil fuels and lands campaigner, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

name: First Lady Casey DeSantis
subject: Millions of moms mobilize
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore America, and mamas everywhere are joining him.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze1gl6hdoo90suav0ao7k8mtj3k1imlb7h08sj68_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5jmcp32c1h2bs)
---
Hi, Friend, Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America. His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are respected and protected; and where the American people are sovereign in their own nation once again. Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. **We 're not just fighting to secure our future _ -- we're fighting to secure a future for our children._ ** That's why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We're the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor's Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida's families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...**and now, we're taking our mamas movement national!** The parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the rights of parents. As the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and win. We beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas' army kicks into gear across the country, we'll beat them on the national stage, too. **Friend****,[will you join our historic movement of mamas today or send this message to your favorite mamas in your life who would be interested in joining?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu4433115gp2vmd9ghp80mtn5dm0ncvimtc1blc8_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5jmcp32c1h2bs "will you join our historic movement of mamas today?") ** Together, we will fight for our children. We will defeat Joe Biden. We will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback. And we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America.

In Freedom,
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl3maoro4jsn57mk26os7i938l44jl4q0bfq7498_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5jmcp32c1h2bs)
---
Casey DeSantis
First Lady of Florida

---

name: Barbara Boxer
subject: This is a new low. Even for the GOP.
body:
Will has what it takes to flip CA-41
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5d556ed9-4f93-4999-9d81-dab53d57fbc7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T279711ac-b413-47f8-bdfd-7999089820e4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I still remember this conversation I was having with Will last Summer. We were talking about the fight ahead and with so much on the line, just how important it was to defeat Ken Calvert. Flash forward to this month, and even I never could have imagined just how low Calvert and his MAGA allies would stoop in their bid to damage the President and stoke division. They’re pushing the government to the brink of shutdown. They’re launching an impeachment investigation into President Biden. And all the while, they’re waging an unprecedented assault on voting rights to keep power. These people aren’t interested in governing, Peter. Instead, they’re focused on putting petty personal grievances over people and actual policies. The good news is we can crush their chances of seizing power, and it starts here in CA-41. [That’s why I’m asking you to send in a donation to support Will Rollins -- one of the finest candidates for Congress that I have had the privilege of supporting. Will tells me he's just about $15,000 short of his critical end-of-quarter fundraising goal, and $10 from you would go a long way.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc6e44037-7e8d-4b1a-a445-636e605321e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te12cb525-b57f-429b-ad30-f83803f7e7e9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| With the majority hinging on five seats, the road to winning back the House runs straight through CA-41. And there is no question in my mind that this time around, with the presidency on the ballot, Will has what it takes to flip this seat and end Ken Calvert’s 30 year career. But with Kevin McCarthy and his super PAC allies already threatening to spend millions of dollars to effectively buy this seat, I know that every dollar is going to matter here. That’s why I’m asking:

[Can you split a donation of $10 to Will's campaign and Blue Amp Action before the FEC deadline in a few days. We can’t afford to fall short -- not with so much at stake.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T037d5386-2aa8-4432-89e9-8cf39bfcab56/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T35298874-c526-4806-b4d8-18604aa42989/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _Thanks,_ _Barbara Boxer _ _Former U.S. Senator, California_
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---

name: First Lady Casey DeSantis
subject: Fighting for the Future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore America, and mamas everywhere are joining him.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh5pshlejju3194746l7ikvrh66d5ulq6bcld7e0_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5jm2p76chh2bs)
---
Hi, Friend, Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America. His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are respected and protected; and where the American people are sovereign in their own nation once again. Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. **We 're not just fighting to secure our future _ -- we're fighting to secure a future for our children._ ** That's why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We're the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor's Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida's families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...**and now, we're taking our mamas movement national!** The parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the rights of parents. As the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and win. We beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas' army kicks into gear across the country, we'll beat them on the national stage, too. **Friend****,[will you join our historic movement of mamas today or send this message to your favorite mamas in your life who would be interested in joining?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8ofkcsi0h30qf8app13q4rt020gc3vrd50dt62o_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5jm2p76chh2bs "will you join our historic movement of mamas today?") ** Together, we will fight for our children. We will defeat Joe Biden. We will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback. And we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America.

In Freedom,
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgnvgoskikb8ru0udpjmh540rkgls6fo685u1ki0_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5jm2p76chh2bs)
---
Casey DeSantis
First Lady of Florida

---
| | [Join Mamas for DeSantis Today!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp39dhkmqhv23etmcf62vvlrv7usbqiqc9b43qj0_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5jm2p76chh2bs)
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---

clean_body: Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore America, and mamas everywhere are joining him. | | | | | | | | | | Hi, Friend, Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America. His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are respected and protected; and where the American people are sovereign in their own nation once again. Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. We 're not just fighting to secure our future -- we're fighting to secure a future for our children. That's why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We're the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor's Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida's families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...and now, we're taking our mamas movement national! The parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the rights of parents. As the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and win. We beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas' army kicks into gear across the country, we'll beat them on the national stage, too. Friend, "will you join our historic movement of mamas today?" Together, we will fight for our children. We will defeat Joe Biden. We will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback. And we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America. name: John Kennedy
subject: all due respect

body:
I’ll do you the courtesy of cutting to the chase:

| |

---
| | | Hey folks -- John Kennedy here.

I respect you too much to beat around the bush. You’re busy. I’m busy. So I’ll do you the courtesy of cutting to the chase:

My Republican colleagues over there in the People’s House have a very, VERY big deadline coming down the pike, and they sent me a note saying they’re falling **DANGEROUSLY** behind their big End-of-Quarter goal.

They also made it abundantly clear to me that they’d have a real mess on their hands if they came up short.

_**[So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to send in a small contribution before time is officially out. We’ve only got a few hours left for a last-minute surge before the big deadline, so anything you can spare would be a HUGE help.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23152%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BvE6dz9EvjYLtpZ2gKVrHA&sysid=1 "So with all due respect,
I’m humbly asking you to send in a small contribution before time is officially
out. We’ve only got a few hours left for a last-minute surge before the big
deadline, so anything you can spare would be a HUGE help. ")**_

_Do you think you could do that? For me?_

Look, this deadline was important before... but now I’m hearing Biden and the Democrat National Committee are unloading 25 million bucks in the most competitive states in the country -- **yep, enough states for a DEMOCRAT SWEEP in the next election.**

And I’m afraid this much cash could be enough to push Liberals over the top...

With an ARMY of Liberal donors whipping out their credit cards every time they flip on CNN - and Conservatives missing their goal - it could be all over for us. **That's why I’m pleading for your help right here and now:**
---

---
I know Kevin McCarthy reached out...
I know James Comer reached out...
I know Kellyanne Conway reached out...
I know Jim Jordan reached out...
I know Steve Scalise reached out...

And I sure as heck know you’re probably tired of hearing from us, but we don’t have time to stand around - not if we want to win!!!

_**[So in the short time we have left before the deadline, I’m personally asking for your help to save our Republican friends and defeat every last Liberal in America.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23153%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O4mYrF2tJYy3poTOBXfvbQ&sysid=1 "So in the short time we
have left before the deadline, I’m personally asking for your help to save our
Republican friends and defeat every last Liberal in America.")**_

God bless you,

John N. Kennedy
