name: The Flyover
subject: Dirty Money and Shiny Gold, a Bewildering 911 Call, and a Surprising Supreme Court Justice
body:
Senator Bob Menendez (D-NJ) has been indicted for corruption. He's the chairman of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee, and documents unsealed on Friday revealed that he's accused of secretly aiding the Egyptian government...

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71uwyAUQOGngS0WXCDggaGLt3TtaPFziW-LA7JRqr59lc4dzvpJ5-O23gJVetzfw45-lLaGNOiJq5gvoC6gVuDZF0RAxdHL62y0Fc5IvnmNEKNNOTtrjJkDOLTKOiwiRydz5ORBgBLzK6OEnqQS0lqpEzgDJVqmBWYa7Zg-Gz3GhqX-tCceU2o7r34bo59MvTFYGCxnD8dX7VNqDJbOYDFa2pwFKMMPn_s31Urn9YXe90D1Dxn_P_0GAAD___sqSuo) | |
# Saturday, September 23, 2023
---|---
**Welcome to the weekend! **Quick trivia question: How many people received the first-ever edition of _The Flyover?

_The answer is 46, and it makes us incredibly grateful for the 430,000+ of you who spend a little time with us in the morning. This plane would crash (and would take a long time to find 😉) without you, and we're glad you're aboard.

In case you haven't signed up yet, [here is a link](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuxCAQBNCvge6sZRdsKCgiRe4ubUoL4-VMhI-TjzjK30dOmxTTjEZPmvfrdA255PvtLWzsW6pTiC0fPIG7IF2QJpSLT8zIJNmr3hk9gDVKrt5opfqgZ5uS1aAgukTJxBkDW5fiLLNHQAJ3xhDoThGoYVA6ojWY5kFo4CW3uncfNd_byql814P3LtZNFr-29ngKehE4Chz_Ts6exs-2CXrVIHe_PL5yKfnZn_JtC7n8Su3_Yz8BAAD__77lTcc) to get on our mailing list and ensure you don't miss our next edition. Want to help keep _The Flyover_ airborne? Could you use a little investment advice? Kill two birds with one stone: check out our sponsor, [The Average Joe](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71uwyAUQOGngS0WXCDggaGLt3TtaPFziW-LA7JRqr59lc4dzvpJ5-O23gJVetzfw45-lLaGNOiJq5gvoC6gVuDZF0RAxdHL62y0Fc5IvnmNEKNNOTtrjJkDOLTKOiwiRydz5ORBgBLzK6OEnqQS0lqpEzgDJVqmBWYa7Zg-Gz3GhqX-tCceU2o7r34bo59MvTFYGCxnD8dX7VNqDJbOYDFa2pwFKMMPn_s31Urn9YXe90D1Dxn_P_0GAAD___sqSuo), for free.
|
---
## Senator Accused of Trading Favors for Gold
Senator Bob Menendez (D-NJ) has been [indicted](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DGP4yAQBeBfgzssPNghLihOOrnL6botrQEGZ1YYIoMSZX_9yltv8ar3ik_v47bekBPn7R_uZFssK_rGT1rVLEFL0Ct0wUYiIN2RHS7zNBp1nYbubpX3aGJAoxyCU9ohuilihOj0GFXs2IICreYzk1ZjP2g1GDOMHq4TRGfEqChwK0f_WTi3O8X0Lk86el_2Ltl7a48q9B8Bi4AFnc_0qv1WzlrA8r8kbuyrgKVSlq44uVOmHOhLcg7sGwW5cWxVbiUF6fCo0uNx7ls53kIvHIT-Oyg9KjPrS3fY8HhxSlwvp23bkdOPpf1-zXcAAAD__ySAZUg) for corruption.

He's the chairman of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee, and documents unsealed on Friday revealed that he's accused of secretly aiding the Egyptian government, along with disrupting the prosecution of a friend--and that $100,000 worth of gold bars and envelopes stuffed with $480,000 in cash have been found in his home. The Senator will temporarily [step down](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtu6zAQRL9G6mSQS9IrFixu4863TSnwsbQ3oEhBImwkXx8odYopBlPMwfm4L3fPhevjv1_J9dwWHzu_aBF2AjWBWmBMLhMBqZGcvFqjUcxGjk8XiAxanJMSCrWcAwHmIILPYCxCGtmBACXsGaOEvkglJKLUEWYDOeCgBSXubb98Nq79Sbl8tRftl9jWsbhn79sxqH8D3Aa4-a3S-zins-ydY6EBbgdV39s-rVSpJvqeuCaOndKEYFPQJscMMmoIHgVGm4RUVmlLdtxd2t5cCh_XE-Wxei6_1_1vEz8BAAD__w8yXUk) from his committee chairmanship and will not be permanently removed from the post "until the matter has been resolved," according to majority leader Chuck Schumer. Menendez is the first U.S. Senator in history to be [indicted twice](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAUhH8N3rAeDxPCwNCFLV07WjY8x0Q2RIBipb--cqVuHU664XT36b5u422KW0z3z2kn25Y8Tr7FF41gOEqOcsQu2IUISXZkxcWoQcNViW61c1CTJu1F8JokoZwvCo0kBV4Q-WsXLQJKMKeUhKEXEoTWYvB4VbjMmg1AIbZc-keOqa20bO_8otL7vHebXVt7ViY_GDqG7jiOPuXS1geVSu8zw9DVlsuboUt0VIbuHGTowJweGbo5z3ynRCnQN08PXim1XHhMIfpGgft1KneqfI1_TRqMhEEbAM3QdcWG5xG3LdbLyXvfp7j98rX_7_oJAAD__-RkabI) for unrelated matters. He's up for re-election next year.
## 911 Audio Released from Ejected F-35 Pilot
The pilot who ejected from an F-35 last weekend landed in a South Carolina resident's backyard, and the ensuing 911 call has been released. "_We got a pilot in the house, and I guess he landed in my backyard, and we 're trying to see if we could get an ambulance to the house, please_," the homeowner [told the 911 dispatcher](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLuOwyAURL_G7rDg8jIFxTbusu2WFoZLTERMZEis_P3K0ZZbjHQ00xzNz2W-uJTTdv12d7Qtltn5ll44U0OAE-Az9MFGREDeo2XKSKHpKFm_WiZGb5wLmsWohAlKa7osyFQYwQiQfbJAgVNzRnIqBsYp05oJD6OEuOhOUAyplX24lbS1FWN-lxfugy_3Ptu1tUft-FcHUwfTcRzDtvgNj3ruHUwndjA9K_mjSLgkhjHiXc7kheRaGnmkXBpZy7Miqe5dPyXe0DcMZPebY0yCVP1uw-NIOaeqTrHr3aX8EWn___IbAAD__0rqYsA).

It took several minutes for the dispatcher to understand what was happening, and eventually, the pilot took the phone and said, _"I 'm not sure where the airplane is. It would have crash-landed somewhere. I ejected_." ## Amazon to Include Ads in Prime Video
The $139 yearly fee for Amazon Prime [will no longer ](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1uhTAMhuGrgS0ocfgdMnRhO107IpMYcAUJSnIOaq--olOHDpYsPcur7-MxPZB39us7HmTyEia0mV80yUGAFqAnKJ1ZiIB0SUa1Q1N3sm9UuZmuRph7Gpp-lgrUMHQ92r5D7dBpjbpkAxK0HO5rtKwrpaXqOlVb6BtY5q6oJTnOIVafgX3eaNm_wotiZcNR7mbL-UyFfitgLGC8rqvys_V0pdsLGOdnYk8p_XnFzQWMeOB38GKO7Ff2q0CXxBn5IPFiR0Gg9-HpLSWx8bpRvNGSE-jEEolEODMHL6L1qFTbt00ZjTsv3ndO7d29Hsj7b2f-f7afAAAA__993XCU)keep ads away from your streaming shows. Amazon announced that advertising will be added in early 2024 to increase revenues, but users will be able to get the ad-free version for $2.99 more each month.

The company says it's [planning on running](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtu6zAQRL9G6mSQu6QoFSxu4863TSksyZW9AfUARchIvj5Q6hQDnME0B_PxmB4kWdbnf1rY13mbKFY5eVJjB9gBTtAmPzMDY8te96M1Tg1Wty-vxhgQbI_AOvTBpKACJZu0GgmJXSseFKAar1hU5qZRaee0iTBYmINrjOIkdSu3z03W-uI5f20nl1vcljb7V6370eC_Bu4N3Glf-X1c01VKlZj5ooW-t7XbiyzcUTq5VDlkfXZHLUzLRVW4HB2j00gRNMWoTRgCDTjomRwFYxzbtvi0vyVnOfrL7LmQ5F-T-vcxPwEAAP__dotj9g) "_meaningfully fewer ads than linear TV and other streaming TV providers_."

Amazon isn't alone: Disney+ and Hulu will become more expensive in October, and Peacock raised its fee in August.

Quick trivia question: How many people received the first-ever edition of The Flyover? The answer is 46, and it makes us incredibly grateful for the 430,000+ of you who spend a little time with us in the morning. This plane would crash (and would take a long time to find 😉) without you, and we're glad you're aboard. In case you haven't signed up yet, to get on our mailing list and ensure you don't miss our next edition. Want to help keep The Flyover airborne? Could you use a little investment advice? Kill two birds with one stone: check out our sponsor, , for free. | Senator Accused of Trading Favors for Gold Senator Bob Menendez (D-NJ) has been for corruption. He's the chairman of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee, and documents unsealed on Friday revealed that he's accused of secretly aiding the Egyptian government, along with disrupting the prosecution of a friend--and that $100,000 worth of gold bars and envelopes stuffed with $480,000 in cash have been found in his home. The Senator will temporarily from his committee chairmanship and will not be permanently removed from the post "until the matter has been resolved," according to majority leader Chuck Schumer. Menendez is the first U.S. Senator in history to be for unrelated matters. He's up for re-election next year. 911 Audio Released from Ejected F-35 Pilot The pilot who ejected from an F-35 last weekend landed in a South Carolina resident's backyard, and the ensuing 911 call has been released. "We got a pilot in the house, and I guess he landed in my backyard, and we 're trying to see if we could get an ambulance to the house, please," the homeowner . It took several minutes for the dispatcher to understand what was happening, and eventually, the pilot took the phone and said, "I 'm not sure where the airplane is. It would have crash-landed somewhere. I ejected." . Amazon to Include Ads in Prime Video The $139 yearly fee for Amazon Prime ads away from your streaming shows. Amazon announced that advertising will be added in early 2024 to increase revenues, but users will be able to get the ad-free version for $2.99 more each month. The company says it's "meaningfully fewer ads than linear TV and other streaming TV providers." Amazon isn't alone: Disney+ and Hulu will become more expensive in October, and Peacock raised its fee in August. ➤ Eric Johnson, the mayor of Dallas, is leaving the Democratic party for the GOP. He announced the switch in an Op-Ed titled: America 's Cities Need Republicans, and I'm Becoming One. Johnson has been a vocal supporter of law enforcement. House Republicans are questioning the move's legality. The DeSantis, Haley, Scott, Christie, Ramaswamy, and Pence campaigns all say they meet the qualifications. body:

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can. Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore America, and mamas everywhere are joining him.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d43ac077d5dd49da8b7c4ca40ca46f54&_e=cFJEpea_iGOhvJV2xj0wZtExeEYN6QaJLxsSqJ71iGiy7MLqdNVGbpbK3OxJ-FRx2X7tzG09km-RCNO2QNJM_nAFAMXp7WNIgwolnTRc8vouiDY1Xsu0skw-Q32q9R6mF5UkfcVl5c_kXP5LdCrA6i-uGJQvD9biHdohGGOQOAOENblGQencgOBRih6yMzNhaVCth4qMZe_-WMZQtp0kzz1X6SymTRRU-7_q_M3nadTzXpHrspO_T89McirzkhCb7toDlskpsXmwweezi06g3Tuj9jGIrFibHWJ5Kca2dzBwWgBjG7TuGhvnP9cP5S9TByqAuIfpaS5-DUA9D-IJ-HrOsqM8Keex059LgEGvtIhc1gQFYJfBE9dxb9JbE0b9Z6MDtuqozbqXGZDKPxoP3C2qibfjDQvgL85EUj2gvUc%3D)

Hi, Friend, Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America. His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are respected and protected; and where the American people are sovereign in their own nation once again. Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. **We 're not just fighting to secure our future _ -- we're fighting to secure a future for our children._ ** That's why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We're the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor's Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida's families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...**and now, we're taking our mamas movement national!** The parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the rights of parents. As the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and win. We beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas' army kicks into gear across the country, we'll beat them on the national stage, too. **Friend****,[will you join our historic movement of mamas today or send this message to your favorite mamas in your life who would be interested in joining?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d43ac077d5dd49da8b7c4ca40ca46f54&_e=cFJEpea_iGOhvJV2xj0wZtExeEYN6QaJLxsSqJ71iGiy7MLqdNVGbpbK3OxJ-FRx2X7tzG09km-RCNO2QNJM_nAFAMXp7WNIgwolnTRc8vouiDY1Xsu0skw-Q32q9R6mF5UkfcVl5c_kXP5LdCrA6i-uGJQvD9biHdohGGOQOAOENblGQencgOBRih6yMzNhaVCth4qMZe_-WMZQtp0kzz1X6SymTRRU-7_q_M3nadTzXpHrspO_T89McirzkhCbgXm5BnQWcSJDFsYfmHhLTzvnDsp74ifnRzDKUddZISU0MRZYTuod_RsIjhkERGmnI5rLKcOZ5CO26r9oKeMp0tKEpgXBl4rzt79_kSecbWxTICVfD3DX1OHJMkAx8d6g9dsfVAgFfOVr6qf-N06a0S8YwMwUNQt19Oukb6QMejo%3D "will you join our historic movement of mamas today?") ** Together, we will fight for our children. We will defeat Joe Biden. We will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback. And we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America.

In Freedom,

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don't say this to shock or scare you - I say it because it's true. _What we see today didn 't happen overnight. It's the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **... and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I'd know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ - radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan - then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I've dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That's why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** - and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I'm asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I'll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fee5e33297da465d8e64ac2b630c2d78&_e=_YZvEU08b81HZjXT-QB6WRS65nhWnBn6QL0nrm_9UYCVQMNiCWOsnMkbYAktuNaSTg--97mwJZikSPyZNL892QDG7ufTjSYdeDCGv1M8bLmJfa31FKpbZ4zK32XQYL0r5YK-rtD1Kls7TVex_bgFsf-mk8yp-Xj5bSA560q1Ry-UE3x0c44VIpWF-yEhf95E_GJBuw198_qk8fSmJ6SayMPbbWwXlFdNGqUwhpwSTP-Q-cyEgpLKA1oV6jgk0MAkYnuGdYtGSXp36qyYJiBJm3P7votrPwAFT74YslgfPkJ4Jmrbd4f24baQY3UpivzdXxP6LpaFYBKL4P2Brqg-t8SlJeOESVmWZDVO-OZrcUkEQkSpP02iyzArsgwi1KW0pSpvJnEMnmoS7-gwBImUxA%3D%3D)** When you think of "the enemy within" you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn't be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making - but most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. **That 's why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state - and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as "white supremacists" and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... "A Great Book" - Dinesh D'Souza "_The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life." - Mark Levin "David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation." Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We've reached the point in our history that will decide our future - and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That's why I'll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left's evil agenda to every American patriot.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fee5e33297da465d8e64ac2b630c2d78&_e=_YZvEU08b81HZjXT-QB6WRS65nhWnBn6QL0nrm_9UYCVQMNiCWOsnMkbYAktuNaSTg--97mwJZikSPyZNL892QDG7ufTjSYdeDCGv1M8bLmJfa31FKpbZ4zK32XQYL0r5YK-rtD1Kls7TVex_bgFsf-mk8yp-Xj5bSA560q1Ry-UE3x0c44VIpWF-yEhf95E_GJBuw198_qk8fSmJ6SayMPbbWwXlFdNGqUwhpwSTP-Q-cyEgpLKA1oV6jgk0MAkHspUV5MsFqCGGPNNYEfRVIWZVjeOnHl_Yd8-kNVuPbZmefontl61K0whqY53P6Q9r_7F521PL1nqyHLhMMH47eeD2DsSbbCMfnuANp_g3uE4ZAdrKuF6Tmj-aB1TpvU1CPDSqZXOlR5pHBNDlOzoNQ%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don't simply disagree with us about how to make our country better - they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama's own words "radically transform" America. **And they don 't care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it's up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,

David Horowitz

clean_body: America is on the brink of destruction. | | | | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don't say this to shock or scare you - I say it because it's true. What we see today didn 't happen overnight. It's the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ... and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda. I'd know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts - radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan - then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I've dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That's why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America - and I want you to have your very own copy of it. When you think of "the enemy within" you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn't be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making - but most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. That 's why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state - and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as "white supremacists" and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... "A Great Book" - Dinesh D'Souza "The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life." - Mark Levin "David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation." Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We've reached the point in our history that will decide our future - and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don't simply disagree with us about how to make our country better - they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama's own words "radically transform" America. And they don 't care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it's up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. name: First Lady Casey DeSantis
subject: The largest movement of parents in political history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore America, and mamas everywhere are joining him.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9rc685cd71indp91v3dt17d36ujrcla2fghvlg8_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5jmeor2clh2bs)
---
Hi, Friend, Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America. His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are respected and protected; and where the American people are sovereign in their own nation once again. Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. **We 're not just fighting to secure our future _ -- we're fighting to secure a future for our children._ ** That's why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We're the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor's Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida's families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...**and now, we're taking our mamas movement national!** The parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the rights of parents. As the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and win. We beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas' army kicks into gear across the country, we'll beat them on the national stage, too. **Friend****,[will you join our historic movement of mamas today or send this message to your favorite mamas in your life who would be interested in joining?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8evsua87uuvteun2kaq420c318cef6bljopfgl8_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5jmeor2clh2bs "will you join our historic movement of mamas today?") ** Together, we will fight for our children. We will defeat Joe Biden. We will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback. And we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America.

In Freedom,
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztrcg7u5gms084v9qbt4r3fet30fpd5glcd82ve0_rp22sh2s8i66p75c5jmeor2clh2bs)

Casey DeSantis
First Lady of Florida

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

|

Peter, I wanted to bring a breaking story to your attention that each of our volunteer team should be pushing heavily on social media this weekend if possible. Democrat contender John Mannion reveals in a leaked video the deep-seated contempt he holds for conservatives like you and me. You can see the story on Fox News below:
---
[ ](https://d2z3Y104.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/I8+113/d2z3Y104/VWWMdV4Pz2SgW8TTLq_3T_CQZV1-ywc53PlJ2N8_nRF25nX80W50kH_H6lZ3l3W8fj71j4v9-kMW6VW9KK6gnDpvW2WDzN_16wF1xV-RWqs2-TGhdW4McKCM2FzCKqW2n-xql4TgWrZW4_DBbZ2KsmR_VCjMV55Hb2jQW2Szhmx21DjLNN3kHmhNX4HKrW2PhH0H83N9T7VhBZTN3ftcbyW53r_x-5pp7KxW2kBmls5khQVXVlWxmk3sLqRbW8_Mhvd8tPMBkW2LcRN56WnctPW7fJKSr5621-HW94zK7s62frMMW75_hX23Vk6XTW82hmNP4yXcq6VW1Tjx1fWzWkW5JnZDG4-KnJJW22z6WG90RKDzW915dkZ5YgVZvW1RCx3F6kZMyWW7-0y9V4LP10GW230WN89cK3-MW8SWCxR2WMHqCW6WRjVF6NWQ8hN65ZLBn2l_XTW3TgjCl4X-dF0f5Ygycb04)

**Key Points:**
* Sen. John Mannion is a key contender for the Democrat nomination against Congressman Brandon Williams in NY-22 for next year
* Mannion was caught in a leaked video privately disparaging Republicans as "ignorant."
* This was in response to genuine concerns about buses of undocumented migrants entering our communities.
* It is clear that Mannion doesn't just disagree with us; he loathes our views.

**Why This Matters:**
* This incident is a clear example of how far-left elements demonize common-sense conservatives.
* It shows a lack of willingness to engage in civil debate or even to address real concerns affecting our communities.
* We cannot afford to have representatives who disdain a significant portion of their constituents.
* He is dismissive of the major issues created by his party on immigartion and instead demonizes those who are discussing real solutions

**Our Commitment:**
* As your Congressman, Brandon Williams will continue to represent all voices in our district.
* Congressman Williams is committed to solving the border crisis and enhancing the security of our communities.
* Together, we can ensure that this dismissive and divisive rhetoric has no place in our public discourse.

Please share the Fox News link on socials and help us highlight how extreme, disrespectful, and out of touch John Mannion really is. For victory, Aaron Evans Campaign Strategist Brandon Williams for Congress P.S. Fellow Conservative,

**I won’t mince words:** if we don’t pick up the pace for our online fundraising today, we’re not going to hit our goal before next week’s end of quarter fundraising deadline.

We all knew August would be slow with everyone enjoying the end of summer but as it turns out, **September has been the most troubling month for our campaign**.

_**Who knew?**_

I certainly didn’t expect all our fundraising appeals to fall flat this month, so now I'm using what time we have left ahead of next Saturday’s fundraising deadline to shore up our position and end the quarter on a strong note!

I spoke with our team and here is where things stand as of today:

name: First Lady Casey DeSantis
subject: Fighting for the Future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore America, and mamas everywhere are joining him.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f92e7ff01ae4daeb79a4dfd6cfa3450&_e=Cc3Bf6kC3PbXN_hmfbi8yvT9AGbJdqYbeJ2I0CxF0szTAZnMOnbGwXmppu2RS8Tbator-H58ZS9A16HCS-qixNSg9FLkllq2xKSHM6FLBztfT3VK6ps1DK7ORQbhD54qFsAGZqQ2pWa5LHUUZ4CPh9Yk9S9ruOuKAUu4ndv1A_PbKpdY90aScQaVbVDOfcIW4OjPFVSdlqHNRU0SXW5mukcTbof-vwNvc8blrJi5yP6GFwJp_b_llhErlm4TWbE3j9cu_77eKa4mokk1_KBwArl-6V5iOlxEnux6nFsQpeerrTD8_RWA1wzxdqlmohwv4hqBQH1FzpDI_d2sTu4gFWY3XVQxMiPJQyXRM7glDFu6_f2on30F0BPvI9qg5d9ocwUHYlcVKxkGPToJiuI-4oa2ntw3oqGiSsAooMykuW0%3D)
---
Hi, Friend, Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America. His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are respected and protected; and where the American people are sovereign in their own nation once again. Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. **We 're not just fighting to secure our future _ -- we're fighting to secure a future for our children._ ** That's why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We're the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor's Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida's families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...**and now, we're taking our mamas movement national!** The parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the rights of parents. As the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and win. We beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas' army kicks into gear across the country, we'll beat them on the national stage, too. **Friend****,[will you join our historic movement of mamas today or send this message to your favorite mamas in your life who would be interested in joining?](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f92e7ff01ae4daeb79a4dfd6cfa3450&_e=Cc3Bf6kC3PbXN_hmfbi8yvT9AGbJdqYbeJ2I0CxF0szTAZnMOnbGwXmppu2RS8Tbator-H58ZS9A16HCS-qixNSg9FLkllq2xKSHM6FLBztfT3VK6ps1DK7ORQbhD54qFsAGZqQ2pWa5LHUUZ4CPh9Yk9S9ruOuKAUu4ndv1A_PbKpdY90aScQaVbVDOfcIW4OjPFVSdlqHNRU0SXW5mukcTbof-vwNvc8blrJi5yP6GFwJp_b_llhErlm4TWbE3eC2BD-WYPyAWlu6HlApMjc_2b_uvKED-NoKN-Lmd1XWmBvPms5Nw3CvSKcCHYrin48nSiAeiM6udWjlGmJIHwPeRDJA3TDAZhy1j29yzrnSPgkfx7MPdNFktW3mSe9K8jDC4xzNT-k0KSEBMzTRISjoZu4Cc1u60gOuzhBufxGo%3D "will you join our historic movement of mamas today?") ** Together, we will fight for our children. We will defeat Joe Biden. We will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback. And we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America.

In Freedom,
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f92e7ff01ae4daeb79a4dfd6cfa3450&_e=Cc3Bf6kC3PbXN_hmfbi8yvT9AGbJdqYbeJ2I0CxF0szTAZnMOnbGwXmppu2RS8Tbator-H58ZS9A16HCS-qixNSg9FLkllq2xKSHM6FLBztfT3VK6ps1DK7ORQbhD54qFsAGZqQ2pWa5LHUUZ4CPh9Yk9S9ruOuKAUu4ndv1A_PbKpdY90aScQaVbVDOfcIW4OjPFVSdlqHNRU0SXW5mukcTbof-vwNvc8blrJi5yP6GFwJp_b_llhErlm4TWbE39xZzH6YgDAzUbsuldWKby5HGSKTRAVv0q53UsPh7Nf3B77xNTBweXxH8QNtJF1vZiuRz5TITT-JMhR-G3KzcEnLJrbLwodxM5q0Fulm00H06rYyWvReQlSGaXVesxuFjefp9JqyHXDFA5NZ8uNgA1LYd7MEjUKLnP142-iWJ9bU%3D)

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. name: Rand Paul
subject: Constitutional convention?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
Peter, did you hear about the Democrats’ plans to... | | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this _[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=108db37f8218483e9e1ef978df4d915a&_t=S2mZub8DgqFOXFhQEvA_6VL6RLdmvQAiWWXbPHgDnCIv53RPGwJ1fkr4jf8CVBqWpeeJ3I3R9J3zsRdmUmExV6Y4GF5pONQboVbXRmPQkqA%3D)_.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=108db37f8218483e9e1ef978df4d915a&_e=ZNt6BLA_NsjjXxxuaw0pHSWjkbleOaY7mYNeQtZT7BW6JBbn16lcqoR7AMjs2pfzMAcMD2n1pLpqe8cK3Q5EUXXF9xqqoPtgVNRLaHlnN12MdK41kBZ4PvFshFbhkZ4ruURsSclu1Ew8CvYpSNULvbMMCtQpry8gd96QtRKqTUJkQUMbS51q8ImKtoftYQP73CDxroFygxzWQWMP3HmoW-q05CU6etKwiL-6-R3IujUpuO0npI_T-lDsaWmTHj-JsEXXd35en9dnl_hAKhZ8V7t09Arpk0eci5pO1Gkmx9sjURzIOpXZ3Ld0ViZ9inbJjUHy5Vcp5cazZ2aqP3WKz3bs8v51_PyYgU9HuYEBTUs%3D)
---
Peter, Democrats have tried for years to do away with our God-given right to keep and bear arms. They’ve tried to pass gun control legislation, but they’ve been mostly unsuccessful, both in Congress and the Courts. Now, they’re changing strategies. The Democrats realized that as long as the 2A exists, their gun control wishlist will never come to fruition. That’s why Gavin Newsom is now calling for a constitutional convention to rewrite the Constitution and interject their gun control agenda into our founding documents. **_Peter, our Founding Fathers would be floored._** They wrote the Second Amendment as a way of ensuring Americans would NEVER be ruled by tyrants again. They were adamant we had the same firearms as the government. We must defend the Second Amendment and protect our Constitution as it’s currently written, Peter. **I set up an _[emergency fund](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=108db37f8218483e9e1ef978df4d915a&_e=ZNt6BLA_NsjjXxxuaw0pHSWjkbleOaY7mYNeQtZT7BW6JBbn16lcqoR7AMjs2pfzMAcMD2n1pLpqe8cK3Q5EUXXF9xqqoPtgVNRLaHlnN12MdK41kBZ4PvFshFbhkZ4ruURsSclu1Ew8CvYpSNULvbMMCtQpry8gd96QtRKqTUJkQUMbS51q8ImKtoftYQP73CDxroFygxzWQWMP3HmoW-GtLP565URGunXu3FBC-2LmJOKldtrRT3Oqw0seQAM6dJi6lDMGR9GSU3TprNPMCAJQvQTLzPCtYiw6mU7M8NKVGwPF6SyAEMtUyJHfNt80S2bITIhDtLSF67r9H4wvzaUVAd9vjUep0aTpbEGAuLo%3D)_**** to help defend ****EVERY****one of our rights, including our right to keep and bear arms.** _**[>> STAND WITH RAND: RUSH IN NOW <<](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=108db37f8218483e9e1ef978df4d915a&_e=ZNt6BLA_NsjjXxxuaw0pHSWjkbleOaY7mYNeQtZT7BW6JBbn16lcqoR7AMjs2pfzMAcMD2n1pLpqe8cK3Q5EUXXF9xqqoPtgVNRLaHlnN12MdK41kBZ4PvFshFbhkZ4ruURsSclu1Ew8CvYpSNULvbMMCtQpry8gd96QtRKqTUJkQUMbS51q8ImKtoftYQP73CDxroFygxzWQWMP3HmoW2TQJnJ9J5_-lLa_dm1OZpcws1gHcwDKvp9QnhFkuDjcec-o2GDTZwNZpsUSghVyndHH2t2jyoFrUTUJEHWpEJeXZvrMxrOCEVRU2qH87oZVR5vlfpGm9C5U555vGlvjJB69RgOhV77bvg6GGl_MJYw%3D)**_ **Stand with me and against the attacks on the Constitution._[Donate here.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=108db37f8218483e9e1ef978df4d915a&_e=ZNt6BLA_NsjjXxxuaw0pHSWjkbleOaY7mYNeQtZT7BW6JBbn16lcqoR7AMjs2pfzMAcMD2n1pLpqe8cK3Q5EUXXF9xqqoPtgVNRLaHlnN12MdK41kBZ4PvFshFbhkZ4ruURsSclu1Ew8CvYpSNULvbMMCtQpry8gd96QtRKqTUJkQUMbS51q8ImKtoftYQP73CDxroFygxzWQWMP3HmoWwrw67A-pdp57bpLvk0fuhDu_wCelNpwXFoPyg_hLYjE15au1FK7-RuPThl-K5x15ReoYeWmfG_YYvOjmWMfM_6Q2DveefwXN4IhUEkikeKvg1B1DW9n4yL7FspHF4xTBjybxqgjkHLAf2JE0RaNdNQ%3D)_** In liberty,Rand Paul

Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore America, and mamas everywhere are joining him.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=80571cd0855741149df2c6120f892ca7&_e=ZCmB5HHA5KQ92OfnKNYkK48ei5_Hk56inY9fPb_6sPLZVntuwIRbp1BPPr6rbJ2EMo64T1OvehhNhVxEaa7GgLXQHzuybkLykix_UH3_g-2VzF1wDXOTcXcNVvbTo5AO71iNI6RT0EwQyFb7HDxZdltjsVvPHK_cRdb3dLyj5g2x2Y1j2SQ_ClbdUjsKb5xTQ6htGrxrNhNN9HOBmElBnqu8Amo1L9WS5rry8Ml7lA0oYwGwfoSXXibose1HLOnkNZCOKYYUnKT1FPeulHgwxvm64OCQsPVOmoGH1pDCDfB6v4q3CsXpLSCnIJputRCfLZzAg4WAbu9_VJjKs2O5D28mWmvtBbvRaW4ZsFekFPfMsbXRfsE0A9ROw16G-QlgODNdE5Y-Ruw63MZDCh7xMEispm8fdwd6PFkXClkR2QQ%3D)
---
Hi, Friend, Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America. His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are respected and protected; and where the American people are sovereign in their own nation once again. Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. **We 're not just fighting to secure our future _ -- we're fighting to secure a future for our children._ ** That's why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We're the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor's Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida's families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...**and now, we're taking our mamas movement national!** The parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the rights of parents. As the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and win. We beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas' army kicks into gear across the country, we'll beat them on the national stage, too. **Friend****,[will you join our historic movement of mamas today or send this message to your favorite mamas in your life who would be interested in joining?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=80571cd0855741149df2c6120f892ca7&_e=ZCmB5HHA5KQ92OfnKNYkK48ei5_Hk56inY9fPb_6sPLZVntuwIRbp1BPPr6rbJ2EMo64T1OvehhNhVxEaa7GgLXQHzuybkLykix_UH3_g-2VzF1wDXOTcXcNVvbTo5AO71iNI6RT0EwQyFb7HDxZdltjsVvPHK_cRdb3dLyj5g2x2Y1j2SQ_ClbdUjsKb5xTQ6htGrxrNhNN9HOBmElBnqu8Amo1L9WS5rry8Ml7lA0oYwGwfoSXXibose1HLOnksGRjswr9tK_vJM3O3PEgYvA_qp8-Hs4jUllcuwrRt-LGcsXzGn2iHdlm3_8G2CKOQ7jgeCpkABX_8IqPlXqP5lZuiIkPWqBBL_qdXOT5HZiOGXBPivPdOe0ORImRbasnpVMnjAseVPoYeTgCpscIRnXc9nyhinWGNEReSs5r0bU%3D "will you join our historic movement of mamas today?") ** Together, we will fight for our children. We will defeat Joe Biden. We will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback. And we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America.

In Freedom,

Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. We 're not just fighting to secure our future -- we're fighting to secure a future for our children. That's why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We're the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor's Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida's families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...and now, we're taking our mamas movement national! The parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the rights of parents. As the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and win. We beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas' army kicks into gear across the country, we'll beat them on the national stage, too. Friend, "will you join our historic movement of mamas today?" Together, we will fight for our children. We will defeat Joe Biden. We will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback. And we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America. In Freedom, | Casey DeSantis First Lady of Florida | | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: How big a threat is China?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-11571169?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**China is going to become the world’s number one economic superpower, we were told. **And as China takes off economically, they said, she is going to become just like the rest of us.

**This is what I call the China fallacy, and neither of the assumptions that underpin it are true.**
---
|
---
The Chinese Communist party - not as charming as they look.
| China has indeed had three decades of double-digit growth. Her take off has been so spectacular, China went from being a largely agrarian economy that accounted for less than 2 percent of world output in 1980 to almost a fifth of output now.

**But far from becoming more like us, China under President Xi seems to be becoming not just un-Western but actively anti-Western.**

Twenty years ago, around about the time that China was admitted to the World Trade Organisation and President Clinton talked of China as a ‘strategic partner’, all the clever people said that China would move our way.
---
|
---
Rapid rise in output.
| **By letting China join the international system, the experts said, China would become part of it. **Think of all those tens of millions of middle class Chinese, they assured us. Soon, like the middle classes in America and Europe, they would be demanding all the trappings of liberal democracy.

**Two decades later China is busy trying to subvert the international order.** Chinese foreign policy seems to be all about creating rival structures and processes. Chinese government agents engage in the kind of espionage activities you might expect from a hostile foe.

**Those that perpetuated the China fallacy used to tell us that following the British handover of Hong Kong, China would grow to become more like Hong Kong. Instead, the opposite has happened.** Hong Kong has been brought into line with the rest of China, and what limited freedoms her people had have been taken away.
---
|
---
Hong Kong beaten into submission.
| **Far from taking her place at the international table, China behaves as if she wants to overturn it.** China amasses troops in the western Pacific, bullying Taiwan and making little secret of her plan to invade the island. **This is the moral equivalent of the United States threatening to annex Vancouver Island. **

Rather than becoming more Western, China’s government continually seeks new ways to restrict her citizens from accessing the internet. **Digital technology has been harnessed to monitor the day to day activities of her own people.** The autocrats that preside over China are so thin skinned and morally bankrupt, then actively clamp down on the Falun Gong movement. **This is the moral equivalent of the US government trying to shut down yoga classes.**

The assumption that China, under the communist party, is ever going to emulate the West is wrong. Wrong, too, is the other side of the China fallacy – the assumption that China is destined to be a great superpower.

**For as long as I can remember, highbrow magazines have been publishing articles forecasting that China’s economy will overtake America’s.** At one time, we were told this would happen in the 2020s. Then it was the 2030s. Now I read it is supposed to happen in 2050.

**I predict that China’s economy will never overtake America’s. **

Only last year, China ceased to be the most populous country on the planet, as India overtook her. China’s demographic future looks ominous.

Today there are 1.4 billion people in China. **By the end of this century, some estimate that China’s population will have fallen about 40 percent to 800 million.**
---
|
---
The demographic consequences of communism?
| The next few years will see a significant fall in China’s economic growth, I suspect.

**It is relatively easy to produce big gains in economic output when you move farm workers into factories (see Soviet Russia in the 1950s for details). **

China was able to accelerate economically as a consequence of Deng Xiaoping’s reforms. Deng’s policies were not only market-friendly. Under Deng, decision-making was relatively decentralized. Maritime provinces had lots of autonomy. Beijing did not try to pre-empt every decision.

**Under Xi China has abandoned the Deng reforms, and reverted to what you might call the Ming tradition of top down control. It is not an encouraging precedent.**

Far from being an economic dynamo, China is on course to becoming the next Japan. Like China, Japan was once supposed to overtake America. **Instead, a previously thriving, export-driven economy has been reduced to stagnation by demographics and debt. **
---
|
---
Japan is no longer a rich country compared to the United States.
| The China fallacy is based on wishful thinking. **China is not going to be the world’s undisputed economic superpower. But this does not mean that China is not a threat.** Quite the opposite, I would argue.

**Just over a century ago, a recently industrialized power, Germany, started to challenge the international order.** Economically and militarily powerful, Germany nonetheless sensed that other powers were not so far behind. Among German’s leaders there was a sense that if Germany was serious about rearranging the furniture in Europe, she had a limited window of opportunity to do so. **The consequences of that mindset were catastrophic.**

**My fear is that China under the communist party sees herself caught in a similar window of opportunity. Her demographic calamity, coupled with slow growth, mean that her relative power will only decline. **

**America is right to be strengthening her fleet in the Pacific (And three cheers to Mississippi Senator, Roger Wicker, for providing such leadership on this – America will be safer for it).** It is also important that America works with an alliance of countries, including Australia and Japan to ensure the security of the Pacific.

**China might not be the world’s number one economic power, but I suspect she will be the world’s biggest geopolitical headache for the foreseeable future.**

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=c141ecac05&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _

Here’s the deal, Peter:
Last quarter, we broke statewide fundraising records and put our opponents on notice that this grassroots team has got what it takes to win.
Unfortunately, the summer slump really threw a wrench into our plans, and now we’ve got to make up the difference so that we can show everyone — _the media, our supporters, and our opponents_ — that our success was no fluke.
Putting up back-to-back strong FEC reports would really show that we’re ready for the challenges ahead and can win a tough race.
**[The closer we get to Election Day, the busier we’re going to be ramping up field operations, expanding outreach programs, and talking with Maryland voters. Can I count on you to chip in $25 toward our End-of-Quarter goal to show everyone that we’re in it to win it?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5933?t=15&amount=25&akid=494%2E52803%2E0niF2z)**

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: We can’t miss this crucial opportunity to help our last gray wolves survive and protect the planet
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | | | | | **BEFORE NATIONAL PUBLIC LANDS DAY ENDS :
YOUR URGENT GIFT IS NEEDED TO PROTECT WOLVES AND THE EARTH**
---
| | [RUSH A GIFT](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007534?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Friend,****_we were hoping_ to share a positive update on our fight to protect gray wolves and the wilderness habitats they need to thrive in honor of **National Public Lands Day.** **But instead, this is disturbing news. And we have to face it to move our urgent work forward. **
**Bloodthirsty trophy hunters shot down three young gray wolves near the Colorado-Wyoming border, brutally murdering them all. To make this tragedy even worse, these special wolves were some of Colorado’s FIRST wild-born pups in more than 80 YEARS. Now, their surviving pack mates are at even greater risk for being hunted and deliberately DESTROYED. **
The situation gets bleaker. The **trophy hunting lobby is doubling down on attacking the Endangered Species Act.** This legislation is our strongest tool in the fight to protect vulnerable species and the lands they call home. But Friends of the Earth won’t stand aside while trophy hunters go after vulnerable animals and wreak havoc on our wilderness ecosystems.
**We’ve set an urgent goal to raise $60,000 in honor of National Public Lands Day to continue our fight to protect threatened species and the only planet we’ll ever get. Earth’s most vulnerable inhabitants need our help, and we must stand up on their behalf. [So please, before National Public Lands Day ends, will you make a membership gift of $27 or more to Friends of the Earth to help protect priceless species, the habitats they need to thrive, and our planet?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007535?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007534?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
The awful news of these wolf killings comes after federal protections for gray wolves were slashed.** That tragically unleashed a massive KILLING SPREE that claimed the lives of hundreds of these majestic creatures.** Now, despite a partial restoration of legal protections in some areas, vital wolf populations are still vulnerable to senseless slaughter at the hands of merciless trophy hunters.
If that weren’t enough, **dirty industries like Big Oil and Gas plus logging and mining companies are joining forces with the trophy hunting lobby. Together, their anti-environment coalition could weaken the Endangered Species Act and greenlight unprecedented destruction of wolves’ wilderness habitats – all for the extraction of planet-killing fossil fuels. **
**Friends of the Earth is fighting with everything we have to protect the Endangered Species Act in service of wolves and our planet. Our goal is to**** shield our last surviving wolves and other vulnerable species from senseless violence and block destructive industries like Big Oil, logging, and factory farming from destroying vital habitats for profits. But we can't continue this urgent work without your support. **
**[Please: We can't afford to fall short of our National Public Lands Day goal. Will you make your membership gift of $27 or more now to help Friends of the Earth fight back against anti-environment special interests and protect our planet and its inhabitants for generations to come?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007535?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007536?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007537?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007538?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007534?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Thank you for your urgent support,
Raena Garcia
Senior Fossil Fuels and Lands Campaigner
Friends of the Earth
|

But we can't continue this urgent work without your support. == If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | | == | | == | | == Thank you for your urgent support, Raena Garcia Senior Fossil Fuels and Lands Campaigner Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

name: Ted Cruz
subject: ** ADVANCE NOTICE **
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
Fired up for the fight ahead? I AM! Review ASAP >>> | | | **** ADVANCE NOTICE ****
---

subject: Millions of moms mobilize

body:
Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore America, and mamas everywhere are joining him.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e84eb0946aab4930af6aaa376f26e030&_e=iG_SSRQn0xuPXAxDPuhYukGaEW5RZEUrapYHjGr5Rd9Sixp53EfkNOKd_Ctd9ScpGQzDIarDhSkyig2G6SXQer8sQjZnotl7k_xLvmSp1zoLQWJlZVoXAjCwrNIuYa5_cnrPNJmJstbqC8l2LJKDuY_6pm3Igu07W31y5FnB1WVz-6UCkL93U40fkkjBxoWURuGEVD5VGERAmf55SBMlltvWn_IJo5JLoF4oDxeXNLunU5iGtkiNU9qjUA3ysdc7bfhiJ9llP3zfxYusV2GGco1v0Cv53ciQjMMdhVdK7W1_tD2IGH4xmhfh71wIp5fi_nPg-RitjY3uOOug3W5C1AOUxKyPnzurTd09WWSoNZZJEBMh3rcbuP0yl3ZvTDRF7ociBm9AhEr3A5XLRHvu_jraxuDctWk0EbgjZWYpEOA%3D)
---
Hi, Friend, Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America. His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are respected and protected; and where the American people are sovereign in their own nation once again. Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. **We 're not just fighting to secure our future _ -- we're fighting to secure a future for our children._ ** That's why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We're the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor's Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida's families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...**and now, we're taking our mamas movement national!** The parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the rights of parents. As the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and win. We beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas' army kicks into gear across the country, we'll beat them on the national stage, too. **Friend****,[will you join our historic movement of mamas today or send this message to your favorite mamas in your life who would be interested in joining?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e84eb0946aab4930af6aaa376f26e030&_e=iG_SSRQn0xuPXAxDPuhYukGaEW5RZEUrapYHjGr5Rd9Sixp53EfkNOKd_Ctd9ScpGQzDIarDhSkyig2G6SXQer8sQjZnotl7k_xLvmSp1zoLQWJlZVoXAjCwrNIuYa5_cnrPNJmJstbqC8l2LJKDuY_6pm3Igu07W31y5FnB1WVz-6UCkL93U40fkkjBxoWURuGEVD5VGERAmf55SBMlltvWn_IJo5JLoF4oDxeXNLunU5iGtkiNU9qjUA3ysdc7ROsdSRqNAEH5r9AbOD-nm_4Mg72bHdIDrNTPc6u3wHcCoDHY3nKBvV1tArTbhwZoRsMK_kw8UkygStmumvt5-g_YXC4TtOsdERmH3ebmw96mTYuBeuup27GS6Zsh6dv3xcsT_D_ECp2mDX-AbO0nH5hqDQoy7cOQYTK0OcYE1dQ%3D "will you join our historic movement of mamas today?") ** Together, we will fight for our children. We will defeat Joe Biden. We will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback. And we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America.

In Freedom,
---

subject: The largest movement of parents in political history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore America, and mamas everywhere are joining him.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9c547fd0f61f4dd0ada9b945a5b716a2&_e=BNG16jcpDUY4dRcRr6K51py05lPQrea5o1oyhLfs-Fg38GglXnyWb0CVWr9aQrTcqVKiVqNRd1aWEv4Xuu8mPC8tHxYVQ3wmacIyyLLC18s9iaHP7qXrpwZunXYZSJtFgKopJ3gtaRx9gISBCFmGdaXny1IPLof90GLIJkjxGqb5oFrE9GCNXDQhX4tkFcEhEXnD01CAxH6R68_oPcUtU9dLNYeXoul14Tya2nDJroA0Vui0NivQczoMzd8xraYjqyO4g3wxHyFMSU6Li2Nnge-vNa0tUeCWmaSIqEAJIjYiofNqbRCLwA-_zL9ZxEcN3hbEi5E0Ghco_KVr36-TSjlnHffV-dRB9fcv4tQYHPjCY-ns8LEgQaIbtNzOupHganjK-9IbNggoFrc2GIhS5E6MEu5OH9gUOBv5xy7IY0I%3D)
---
Hi, Friend, Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America. His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are respected and protected; and where the American people are sovereign in their own nation once again. Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. **We 're not just fighting to secure our future _ -- we're fighting to secure a future for our children._ ** That's why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We're the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor's Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida's families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...**and now, we're taking our mamas movement national!** The parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the rights of parents. As the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and win. We beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas' army kicks into gear across the country, we'll beat them on the national stage, too. **Friend****,[will you join our historic movement of mamas today or send this message to your favorite mamas in your life who would be interested in joining?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9c547fd0f61f4dd0ada9b945a5b716a2&_e=BNG16jcpDUY4dRcRr6K51py05lPQrea5o1oyhLfs-Fg38GglXnyWb0CVWr9aQrTcqVKiVqNRd1aWEv4Xuu8mPC8tHxYVQ3wmacIyyLLC18s9iaHP7qXrpwZunXYZSJtFgKopJ3gtaRx9gISBCFmGdaXny1IPLof90GLIJkjxGqb5oFrE9GCNXDQhX4tkFcEhEXnD01CAxH6R68_oPcUtU9dLNYeXoul14Tya2nDJroA0Vui0NivQczoMzd8xraYj8ZIWIkmarlQa54QVV0oYjspTFjn10csm0STFqCF9lt7KYwypv8-bO8jFj2IEvABUsvHpu0gAr65djt-nShK7vcdlv9J7_vaK6t8A30k-4COOeH4KCuwFQj_ZSTG0RffnYEPDt2tBGBNS8nzU20BYf1bbWONdJ_MltnlpR6MbdwQ%3D "will you join our historic movement of mamas today?") ** Together, we will fight for our children. We will defeat Joe Biden. We will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback. And we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America.

In Freedom,
---

clean_body: Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore America, and mamas everywhere are joining him. | | | | | | | | | | Hi, Friend, Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America. His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are respected and protected; and where the American people are sovereign in their own nation once again. Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. We 're not just fighting to secure our future -- we're fighting to secure a future for our children. That's why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We're the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor's Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida's families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...and now, we're taking our mamas movement national! The parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the rights of parents. As the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and win. We beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas' army kicks into gear across the country, we'll beat them on the national stage, too. Friend, "will you join our historic movement of mamas today?" Together, we will fight for our children. We will defeat Joe Biden. We will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback. And we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America. In Freedom, | Casey DeSantis First Lady of Florida | | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. name: Joe Sherlock
subject: Convention Livestream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear Democrats,
We are just hours away from kicking off our state convention in Lowell. There is an energy in the air as our fellow Democrats come together to organize and strategize for the important work ahead. For those of you who are not able to be in Lowell today, we are glad to provide this live stream link so that you can watch today’s events in real time. [https://massdems.org/massdems-convention/]
While we are sorry you can’t be with us in-person, we have every reason to believe you will still feel inspired after hearing from Senator Elizabeth Warren, Senator Ed Markey, Governor Maura Healey and so many more of our incredible elected leaders who every day exemplify what it means to be a Democrat.
We’ll be getting underway just around 10 a.m.
Joe
Joe Sherlock
Executive Director
Massachusetts Democratic Party
https://www.facebook.com/MassDems [https://www.facebook.com/MassDems] https://twitter.com/massdems [https://twitter.com/massdems] https://instagram.com/massdems [https://instagram.com/massdems]
Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
Massachusetts Democratic Party
11 Beacon St
Suite 410
Boston, MA 02108
United States

body:
Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore America, and mamas everywhere are joining him.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0594b67e13894903a2d12ca4d36ee638&_e=iCLSSIuyfczXV813NuS95odwXFGCyPCZzZN7Luhdfp12Lqr4xMhXv8798gNkKd6ZtkhDMAWyEDubdDdVV490YjiTJY5lqMFa-NE-nLGRQIYq0yaUij4u6Jm0gC-0lgCG5p8bJIaXWiDGnTQB6FJVoWnssvk_73quw2aaRyWhiYRgcDapSucAZ7FaCuwkrcRBnhA9ZB8ab2o8Pz0sI37fp0kSjAKIvMb4EVNcRbPxtDGzdrtIKKQWjN0yEuL1CxvajkW5EAwFEEUbeoXCX3JHvH4tE0vlbP1rOMVJtl5Oxg1VdZN5spSX-d6C4pHUrbY5MLwyVocdbP3yi6x-tUTFQdpSpwnD17eJPMJEFwdGZ0r9Pu3EqtcBFe6zdp-lmvob4RzXk6B3PtKU5prENOAfyeb6acRGPpYJM4VYZHeUQLY%3D)
---
Hi, Friend, Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America. His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are respected and protected; and where the American people are sovereign in their own nation once again. Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. **We 're not just fighting to secure our future _ -- we're fighting to secure a future for our children._ ** That's why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We're the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor's Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida's families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...**and now, we're taking our mamas movement national!** The parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the rights of parents. As the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and win. We beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas' army kicks into gear across the country, we'll beat them on the national stage, too. **Friend****,[will you join our historic movement of mamas today or send this message to your favorite mamas in your life who would be interested in joining?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0594b67e13894903a2d12ca4d36ee638&_e=iCLSSIuyfczXV813NuS95odwXFGCyPCZzZN7Luhdfp12Lqr4xMhXv8798gNkKd6ZtkhDMAWyEDubdDdVV490YjiTJY5lqMFa-NE-nLGRQIYq0yaUij4u6Jm0gC-0lgCG5p8bJIaXWiDGnTQB6FJVoWnssvk_73quw2aaRyWhiYRgcDapSucAZ7FaCuwkrcRBnhA9ZB8ab2o8Pz0sI37fp0kSjAKIvMb4EVNcRbPxtDGzdrtIKKQWjN0yEuL1CxvaxYjs_3IDqI45tAmIrE48iKHf7RWOhnpPfcTo00l9sQ2bub1E5tADOg_09GExg3lKDA52l7vb05xI1EL58FHYa48m7b1f7ekGL35XgYQdIquavAhW5kurOvK2zSvpFY4jUXLS6ibwjiVhXSjxBx0EW0Db-l7TOfKFGx2Ic5t_Nbk%3D "will you join our historic movement of mamas today?") ** Together, we will fight for our children. We will defeat Joe Biden. We will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback. And we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America.

In Freedom,
