clean_body: Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore America, and mamas everywhere are joining him. | | | | | | | | | | Hi, Friend, Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America. His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are respected and protected; and where the American people are sovereign in their own nation once again. Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. We 're not just fighting to secure our future -- we're fighting to secure a future for our children. That's why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We're the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor's Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida's families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...and now, we're taking our mamas movement national! The parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the rights of parents. As the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and win. We beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas' army kicks into gear across the country, we'll beat them on the national stage, too. Friend, "will you join our historic movement of mamas today?" Together, we will fight for our children. We will defeat Joe Biden. We will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback. And we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America. body:
| | | Peter, If we lose Josh Hawley’s Senate seat in Missouri, we’ll be handing the Democrats their majority on a platter.

Instead of getting America’s finances in check, _America will continue to write Joe Biden blank checks to do whatever he wants to our country._

Instead of fighting for parents’ rights, Democrats will be shoving the transgender agenda down our throats.

_Instead of making progress, we’ll be back to the same old failures - and America can’t afford two more years of it._

name: MESSAGE FROM COACH
subject: ** My Full Support of Impeachment Inquiry **
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
It’s time to get to the bottom of this mess once and for all. Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/30f39ce7cbeb598d3947229f28c3afba/e91fb0d6fe87d6e8c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter,

I was in a meeting last week with Congressman Jim Jordan and Congressman James Comer.

They’ve given us a full breakdown of the evidence – the strength of their case is clear.

I am absolutely SHOCKED and APPALLED by the scope of Joe and Hunter Biden’s alleged influence-peddling scheme. Our nation’s institutions and the lying liberal media should be ashamed for the way they’ve played cover-up for the Biden family and its associates.

**I fully support House Speaker Kevin McCarthy for advancing an impeachment inquiry.**

If you’re with me on this, **[please rush a special contribution today](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/30f39ce7cbeb598d3947229f28c3afba/100266fb5818b908c3d6b838967d376c/33013)**.
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/30f39ce7cbeb598d3947229f28c3afba/2538d6388b2d6010c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
I believe impeachment should be reserved for only the most serious cases.

This case falls into that category and then some – if all proven true, this is nothing less than CORROSIVE CORRUPTION at the very highest levels of our federal government.

**The American people deserve answers. I’m doing all I can in my power to get them.**

**[Thank you, as always, for your support of my fight for liberty, truth, and justice.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/30f39ce7cbeb598d3947229f28c3afba/da52173e968739e7c3d6b838967d376c/33013)**

\- Coach
---

You might be sitting there asking yourself, "Secretary Pompeo, why should I fill out this Questionnaire?"

**And that 's a good question, _let me tell you why._**

House Replublicans need to know where the American people stand on the candidates and the issues of the day. In short, they need to know what the American people think so they can best serve you. Without your input, their job is impossible.

**[So if you can spare just a few minutes to complete your Presidential Candidate Questionnaire, it would be greatly appreciated.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d86d48dbe6414dea828c253e56b9fdde&_e=0T-nZNmw0gntb3P2wh6OOnz82uT9eOAXNjZLlnrwq5vT-76rI5Zt0Bc6F2hfbNCL0Pq9kDmhFRMYjjNB5gHfQYmf3iiDe35Kheyd1Zfva_QlX8QCD_n0_-9oYXFp6zVGx1B8mJkXgKgb2IPXMOfhWONzDFkbcH3_XRWA6vwyvMS7iXmkXmG24W7RJZYt8_jAbDwospZ9miLIcdIEsiV19bkJURbQkmBkiWTe3e0xvfu3iXuPDQ-K7JBtotU2CsRLI5qWsLgoPQaOWMyDr4F1SaSNxR4SDQjqrhqqc3OQddqdI8hmWnDzeF2qEhHN8vQDM2umISuIi-bWfmPvA9nn6gWPPu4jZpN0MwxLYh8491wDo4wL51BuWHm-pb_Y9M8oCxAbSFQd8Zs2ZfLt0cr7L5a9E5gIlqJvJEHQ1szOdSLgmDND9W6QHx5YGJjfvrHPt60QH7_1ChkqeOOVpelWZ4uz1F4i7VtD97kKNMtGLrE%3D "So if you can spare just a few minutes to complete your Presidential Candidate Questionnaire, it would be greatly appreciated. ")**

_**I 'd consider it a personal favor as well.**_

Thank you for your time,

Mike Pompeo

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dominic=20Rapini?=
subject: Fraud Bounty - Let's Make Crime 'Bad' Again
body:
Election Fraud is VOTER SUPRESSION | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/132255edc82f/be-brave-do-something-upcoming-events-13544296?e=8763c56857)
---
|
---
|
---
**Let’s make crime ‘bad’ again!**
|
---
_Unless government officials stop denying, deflecting, and distracting from election crimes, voter trust in elections will keep declining and voter suppression will spread_
| [See the Video - Ballot Harvesting in Action ](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=ef1b846861&e=8763c56857)
---
**Announcement** : Voter Fraud Bounty - to any person that can provide additional, physical evidence of how alleged Fraud may have been accomplished in Bridgeport.
**$500**
**Whistleblowers will remain anonymous**
email: dominic@dominicforct.us
|
---
**Why it matters:** The continuing pattern of election crimes in Bridgeport makes clear that no accountability means an erosion of trust in our elections. Worse, no consequences for breaking the law only further embolden illegal activities.
Let's make crime bad again!
|
---
**What happened?**
**√** The Crime - ballot harvesting. A woman identified as Wanda Geter-Pataky, a city employee was caught on security video camera footage making four trips to stuff a ballot drop box in front of City Hall. Wanda was also filmed shouting “We got your back Mayor Ganim” seemingly a boast of her support for the incumbent and a signal that she will do anything to guarantee his victory. √ Can one reasonably conclude the items being stuffed into the ballot drop box were absentee ballots for Mayor Ganim? √ Ganim lost the Primary in-person vote and won the Absentee Ballot vote by 251 ballots. √ Connecticut law requires registered voters to drop off their completed absentee ballots themselves or designate direct family members or caregivers to deliver a ballot on their behalf. [LINK for full statue](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=79e77809b0&e=8763c56857). The appearance of handfuls of ballots in the video gives one no choice but to assume fraud and an assault on the integrity of our elections. **Corruption is a team sport**
√ **Law Enforcemen** t - Police Chief Roderick Porter said the leaking of the video was a serious matter and that the department had taken extra measures to ensure the security of the city's video system. Ignoring evidence of criminal acts while deflecting to a different matter is a disservice to voters. Not a confidence builder! √ **State – Secretary of State Stephanie Thomas** – said she believed it was a matter of a few “bad actors” and an “under-educated electorate”. Governor Lamont warned that we should not jump to conclusions.”
She added that “No-Excuse Mail Voting will make our elections more secure” (You can’t make this up)√ **City - Clerk Lydia Martinez** was found guilty of fraud according to the SEEC when she was caught illegally filling out absentee ballots. Talk about the fox watching the henhouse! √ **The Bridgeport Democratic Party** has a record of election crime allegations. Several party members have been charged with Absentee Ballot fraud. In 2017 a local council primary was ordered to be run three times due to Absentee Ballot issues. More recently in 2022 a state representative primary involved Absentee Ballot issues and had to be repeated.√ **Corruption thrives on Non-ACTION.** Connecticut's Chief State's Attorney, Patrick J. Griffin, and his office have still not filed those charges recommended by the SEEC from 2019! Charges which included Wanda Geter. Why? Is this an example of running out the clock and hoping it will go away?
|
---
**Key Takeaways – Bridgeport can be your Town**
√ The scope of voter fraud in Connecticut, or anywhere, is truly unknowable as fraudsters can only be caught with the help of whistleblowers, hidden cameras, and active law enforcement. √ It’s time to put Ballot Drop boxes inside buildings, under human and electronic surveillance, and accessible during normal business hours. Unless we turn on the bright lights of transparency and preserve the chain of custody of every ballot as required by state law we will continue to invite fraud.√ Connecticut now has an online solution voters can use to request absentee ballots. This requires legal identification and preserves the chain of custody. All candidates and political operatives should focus on their campaigns and not be trusted with handling ballot applications (or Ballots!!) √ The Governor, Secretary of State, and the Democratic legislature must stop minimizing corruption, blaming others, and pretending it is about politics. It is not. It is about trust in our elections and Bridgeport is one more breach of public trust. When it comes to corruption,**Bridgeport is the gift that keeps on giving!**
|
---
**The final word: Every illegal ballot cancels out a legal ballot**
The facts make clear that election corruption is a team sport. One-party rule clearly lacks checks and balances. Bridgeport is an ongoing saga of corruption that festers when there is no oversight or accountability. From a municipal worker and law enforcement to the clerk’s office and the mayor, the cabal appears well choreographed in covering, distracting, and denying. Thank God for the leaked videos!
Lack of accountability and repeated criminal acts clearly serve to suppress legal voters. All voters, Democrat, Republican, and Unaffiliated must demand action, accountability, and structural changes to stop this ongoing pattern of illegal activities. We must restore ’Trust’ in our elections. Trust is what happens when people know their vote counts.
**Let’s Make Crime ‘Bad’ Again**

|
---
**A day In court has been set**
A court date has been set to determine if there will be a new GOMES-GANIM Primary
|
---
# Do you understand why we must fight this insanity? HJR 1 will turn our elections into the Wild, Wild, West
|
---
**This email was jointly authored by Dominic Rapini and Chris Coyle**
|
---

###
2WINCT is partnered with Freedom Project USA to build a coalition of conservatives across Connecticut. We are committed to Constitutional principles that will reflect in our mission of recruiting and developing strong, conservative candidates; identifying and fighting for key issues that impinge on our freedoms; and to create branding and messaging programs that illustrate our values as citizens of Connecticut.
Founded in 2019, Freedom Project USA’s mission is to defend liberty and free market principles. We advocate, involve, and educate lawmakers, job creators, and the American public about free market principles, personal responsibility, and economic freedom to allow everyone equal opportunity to pursue success.

# [Tell Kevin McCarthy to Make a Deal with Democrats to Stop the Government Shutdown](https://default.salsalabs.org/T27556cea-64c5-4573-a022-f872760fc49c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | We're just days away from a government shutdown, and Kevin McCarthy is [still refusing](https://default.salsalabs.org/T313b6799-cd8c-4df6-9d78-579062187b66/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to make a deal with Democrats to prevent it. **Instead, he is still pushing to pass a budget with only Republican votes — something impossible, given his narrow majority, and a handful of GOP lunatics hellbent on shutting everything down.** Enough already. It's time for McCarthy to stop trying to appease his lunatic fringe members, stop shutting out Democrats, pass a budget with bipartisan backing, and prevent a disastrous shutdown. [**Add your name, and tell McCarthy to make a deal NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb0c24404-b8ff-4743-8d5b-4d73f31f25ea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: David Hogg
subject: I’m fed up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STOP GUN VIOLENCE PAC
body:
Gun reform, including universal background checks and an assault weapons ban, are supported by the majority of voters, yet Republicans refuse to act.

| Hey Peter, it’s David Hogg, gun violence prevention advocate, and school shooting survivor.

When a former classmate entered Marjory Stoneman Douglas in 2018 and opened fire on my classmates, killing 17 people, my life and my community were forever altered.

**I saw the toll it took on myself, my classmates, and their families – _no child or community should ever have to endure that type of pain._**

That’s why I committed myself to standing up to NRA-backed politicians and fighting for gun violence prevention legislation, including an assault weapons ban. Andy does so much for me – just like he does the people of Kentucky. That's why I wanted to lend him a paw during the final weeks of his race.

Andy has just 7 weeks until Election Day. His opponent and his allies are spending lots and lots of money to attack Andy and spread lies about his record.

I know I look adorable and cuddly, but I am a real guard dog when it comes to Andy!! That's why I'm ready to help fight back against these attacks – but I could use your help.

Peter, President Biden has provided the steady leadership we needed to get our country back on track and secure real, meaningful progress for our families.
Now, as the 2024 presidential election heats up, we wanted to take a moment to reflect on everything that Biden has accomplished for our country so far.

Since his first day in the White House, President Biden has:
* **Nominated Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson** to serve on the Supreme Court, making her the first-ever Black woman to serve on our nation’s highest court.

* **Stood tall against Republican attacks on our reproductive rights** and urged the Senate to take action on codifying Roe v. Wade, a move that would protect the reproductive rights of millions.

* **Signed the Respect for Marriage Act into law** , which creates new federal protections for same-sex and interracial marriages.

* **Oversaw the greatest year of job growth in American history** and reduced the unemployment rate.

* **Signed a once-in-a-generation bipartisan gun safety bill into law** – the first major gun safety legislation in 30 years.

* **And so much more!**

But despite all that President Biden has accomplished for our country, Republicans continue to try and sabotage his presidency for political gain – especially as we enter the full swing of the 2024 election.
**Attorney General James is proud to stand behind a president who puts the threat of gun violence, reproductive rights, diversity, and working families _first_ , but we need to know where fearless fighters like YOU stand.** **We still need 183 more responses from your area before midnight – including yours, Peter:**
| | **How would you grade President Biden's job performance?**

clean_body: | | | | | As a top supporter, you've been selected to weigh in on President Biden's time in the Oval Office so far. But this poll closes at midnight, and your response is still missing. Please, tell us now: How would you grade President Biden's job performance? | | | | | | | This poll is specifically for dpwillis67@gmail.com. Please do not share this link. Peter, President Biden has provided the steady leadership we needed to get our country back on track and secure real, meaningful progress for our families. Now, as the 2024 presidential election heats up, we wanted to take a moment to reflect on everything that Biden has accomplished for our country so far. Since his first day in the White House, President Biden has: Nominated Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to serve on the Supreme Court, making her the first-ever Black woman to serve on our nation’s highest court. Stood tall against Republican attacks on our reproductive rights and urged the Senate to take action on codifying Roe v. Wade, a move that would protect the reproductive rights of millions. Signed the Respect for Marriage Act into law , which creates new federal protections for same-sex and interracial marriages. Oversaw the greatest year of job growth in American history and reduced the unemployment rate. Signed a once-in-a-generation bipartisan gun safety bill into law – the first major gun safety legislation in 30 years. And so much more! But despite all that President Biden has accomplished for our country, Republicans continue to try and sabotage his presidency for political gain – especially as we enter the full swing of the 2024 election. Attorney General James is proud to stand behind a president who puts the threat of gun violence, reproductive rights, diversity, and working families first , but we need to know where fearless fighters like YOU stand. We still need 183 more responses from your area before midnight – including yours, Peter: | | How would you grade President Biden's job performance? | | | | | | | This poll is specifically for dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Team Lesley
subject: Lesley will fight tooth-and-nail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lopez for Congress
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/h5i-6-hCnU6Ovz6UPW5VKQ2?contactdata=AxTMacWkMr9VPoCdnVM53Fw8PTmOdCcJDGKzoZV/WiS21kq+vsgG+5ZTf169/zbZeWt73Soe0+4THi8TWz/fG6CGkIEZ28oNmpDZm+wxwrQ=&refcode2=img_logo [https://secure.ngpvan.com/h5i-6-hCnU6Ovz6UPW5VKQ2?contactdata=AxTMacWkMr9VPoCdnVM53Fw8PTmOdCcJDGKzoZV/WiS21kq+vsgG+5ZTf169/zbZeWt73Soe0+4THi8TWz/fG6CGkIEZ28oNmpDZm+wxwrQ=&refcode2=img_logo]
Hey there, we need to get your input.
In the Maryland General Assembly, Lesley has led the fight to protect our reproductive rights. A bricks and mortar example of this work just opened this summer in Allegany County near the West Virginia border.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/h5i-6-hCnU6Ovz6UPW5VKQ2?contactdata=AxTMacWkMr9VPoCdnVM53Fw8PTmOdCcJDGKzoZV/WiS21kq+vsgG+5ZTf169/zbZeWt73Soe0+4THi8TWz/fG6CGkIEZ28oNmpDZm+wxwrQ=&refcode2=img_whc [https://secure.ngpvan.com/h5i-6-hCnU6Ovz6UPW5VKQ2?contactdata=AxTMacWkMr9VPoCdnVM53Fw8PTmOdCcJDGKzoZV/WiS21kq+vsgG+5ZTf169/zbZeWt73Soe0+4THi8TWz/fG6CGkIEZ28oNmpDZm+wxwrQ=&refcode2=img_whc]Thanks to the protections Lesley won for health care providers, this facility can provide comprehensive reproductive health care for patients who reside in restrictive states like West Virginia, as well as those from Maryland.
If we rally behind her, Lesley will take on a broken Congress and always defend our reproductive freedoms, no matter what.
With access to safe abortions and reproductive health care on the line for so many Americans, will you share what matters most to you in this fight, right now? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/h5i-6-hCnU6Ovz6UPW5VKQ2?contactdata=AxTMacWkMr9VPoCdnVM53Fw8PTmOdCcJDGKzoZV/WiS21kq+vsgG+5ZTf169/zbZeWt73Soe0+4THi8TWz/fG6CGkIEZ28oNmpDZm+wxwrQ=&refcode2=link_CTA1]
We’ll keep it quick! Here’s the survey question:
As president of the Maryland Women’s Legislative Caucus, Lesley garnered support for a package of laws that guarantees reproductive rights for all women in the state. Under her leadership, the Caucus took an official position to prioritize reproductive rights legislation for the first time in 40 years. Now Lesley is running for Congress to fight for reproductive rights for women across the country. Is it important to you to elect a member of Congress to this open seat with a record of defending our reproductive freedoms? 🔘 Yes, extremely important. 🔘 Yes, very important. 🔘 Yes, somewhat important. 🔘 No, not at all important. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/h5i-6-hCnU6Ovz6UPW5VKQ2?contactdata=AxTMacWkMr9VPoCdnVM53Fw8PTmOdCcJDGKzoZV/WiS21kq+vsgG+5ZTf169/zbZeWt73Soe0+4THi8TWz/fG6CGkIEZ28oNmpDZm+wxwrQ=&refcode2=link_survey]
We’re going over the responses with Lesley tomorrow, so we need to hear from you right away! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/h5i-6-hCnU6Ovz6UPW5VKQ2?contactdata=AxTMacWkMr9VPoCdnVM53Fw8PTmOdCcJDGKzoZV/WiS21kq+vsgG+5ZTf169/zbZeWt73Soe0+4THi8TWz/fG6CGkIEZ28oNmpDZm+wxwrQ=&refcode2=link_CTA1]
Thanks for speaking up,
Team Lesley
Lesley Lopez is a Democrat running for the open competitive seat in Maryland’s 6th Congressional District. When she's not busy being a mom to her two toddlers, Lesley Lopez serves the people of Maryland as a Delegate from District 39 in the Maryland General Assembly. Since she was first elected in 2018, Lesley has rapidly become an effective legislator and leader, spearheading efforts to alleviate student debt, improve the delivery and efficiency of health care, and protect the limited financial resources of economically vulnerable Marylanders. Lesley has passed legislation to strengthen gun safety laws and guarantee the rights for all women in the state. She is an adjunct professor at George Washington University and a proud union member of SEIU Local 500. Lesley lives in Germantown, MD, with her husband Richard Kelly, and their two sons, Max and Graham.
DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2324_ll_action?refcode2=btn_biobox]
Paid for by Lopez for Congress
Lesley Lopez for Congress
PO Box 86931
Montgomery Village, MD 20886-6931
United States

name: Kirsten Gillibrand via Blue Amp Action
subject: our Senate majority is at stake
body:
Democrats defend 23 Senate seats next year
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbc2ae9c2-f28d-4451-a5f8-f9cefb6f24f1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | It’s Cliff, here. I wanted to make sure you heard that pro-choice champion, Kirsten Gillibrand, is running for reelection. Her message is below:
---
| | |
---
| Peter, My end-of-quarter deadline is just around the corner. With the GOP prepared to invest millions of dollars into defeating Democrats like me to flip the Senate, I’ve set an ambitious $100,000 goal. The truth is, I rely on donations from grassroots supporters like you to hit these goals. That’s why I’m about to ask you to make a donation to help me close out this quarter on the strongest possible footing. [(If you’re ready to give now, you can split a contribution between my campaign and Blue Amp Action here.)](https://default.salsalabs.org/T25e292ca-e90d-4df5-b462-6a1af38a359c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) But first, I want to personally thank you for standing with me as we take on the toughest fights in Washington. Thank you for never giving up the fight to make gun trafficking a federal crime. After 13 years, my legislation was finally passed in last year's Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Already, we're stopping the flow of illegal guns across the nation. Thank you for having my back as I lead the fight to protect Social Security and Medicare and ensure that seniors can retire in dignity. Thank you for proudly standing with me in my fight to certify the Equal Rights Amendment. Today, we’re so close to finally establishing gender equality in our Constitution — giving us a legal basis to restore reproductive rights. But here's the bad news: If Republicans flip even one Senate seat, they could retake the majority and undo all of our progress. With 23 Democratic seats on the ballot, our grassroots resources will be stretched thin. Especially after the GOP’s historic gains in New York last year, I need your help to defend my must-win seat. [That's why I have to ask: Please, will you split $10 or more between my campaign and Blue Amp Action before midnight tonight to help me hit my end-of-quarter goal and defend our Senate majority? I’m counting on your support, Peter.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1af84b64-3cf4-48cd-a0ef-b6568b963073/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfd1d44bb-a9da-4845-a3dd-ce3c614ab9e6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thank you again for everything that you do. It’s an honor to take on these fights with you by my side. With gratitude and love, Kirsten
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: Add your name to support United Auto Workers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
It's time to tell the Big Three: Record Profits Mean Record Contracts
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=546%2E791427%2ERCp2SJ)

Friends -
On September 14, union contracts for nearly 150,000 UAW autoworkers at the Big Three U.S. car manufacturers — Ford, General Motors, and Stellantis (formerly Chrysler) expired.
Just yesterday, UAW significantly ramped up their stand-up strike strategy, with workers at 38 parts-distribution centers in 20 states walking off the job and onto the picket lines.
The UAW's message to the Big Three is simple: **Record profits mean record contracts.** Here are the members' demands:
* **Ending tiered wage structures,** under which newly-hired workers receive fewer benefits and lower wages for the same jobs, often forcing workers to take second or even third jobs to make ends meet.

* **Fair wage increases and restoring cost-of-living adjustments,** which previously had provided generations of working people with the protections and stability necessary to build the middle class of this country.

* **Job security and a just transition toward electric vehicles,** stopping plant closures and ensuring that _every_ auto job created through new and developing technologies are good-paying, union jobs.

The Big Three have made nearly a quarter of a _trillion_ dollars — yes, trillion with a "t" — in profits over the past 10 years.
Last year alone, Ford, GM, and Stellantis spent $9 billion on stock buybacks, and provided their three CEOs with a combined $75 million in compensation.
Meanwhile, 150,000 workers whose labor created these profits struggle to afford the food on their tables, health care for their families, or to retire in dignity.
The simple truth is that if the Big Three can rake in record-breaking profits, provide obscene executive bonus packages, and spend billions on buybacks and dividends for their shareholders, they sure as hell can provide their workers with fair pay, stronger benefits, and better conditions on the job.
Now is the time for our progressive movement to show solidarity with striking workers across the country fighting to put power back in the hands of working people.
**It's going to take the strength and unity of _all of us_ to win what UAW autoworkers and all workers across the country deserve, so please:**
**[Add your name to UAW's petition and tell the Big Three: Record Profits Mean Record Contracts. Their fight is our fight — and your support is so important to the future of the labor movement in this country.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/1338?t=2&akid=546%2E791427%2ERCp2SJ)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/1338?t=3&akid=546%2E791427%2ERCp2SJ)**
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

* * *

Before you go...
**[Can you make a contribution — of $3 or any amount that makes sense to you — to stand with Ilhan Omar and send her back to Congress? Your grassroots support is so important to our campaign.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sept23.SIEpKD&refcode=em230923-1-t3&t=4&akid=546%2E791427%2ERCp2SJ)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Friend, meet Kirsten:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70224179/428691572/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4436-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDgxMWQzYi0xYTVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ve--GxjIch6j6YfLGwNPSXVaCUC1z1WzHU54RBBOyQ8=)
She's a mother to two boys. She's a proud daughter of Albany. She's New York's junior senator. And she's been fighting to help working families through public service for 15 years. Trust us on this: _Kirsten is the real deal._
During the last session of Congress _alone_ , she won legislation to reform the military justice system to empower survivors of sexual assault, make gun trafficking a federal crime, expand benefits for veterans exposed to toxic burn pits and more. **She spent over a decade fighting to finally pass many of these bills — and she's nowhere near done delivering results.**
Now, Kirsten is leading the charge to pass **guaranteed paid family leave** so that no one has to choose between caring for a loved one and getting a paycheck. At the same time, she's pushing for legislation to crack down on dangerous, unregistered**"ghost guns."** And she's spearheading legislation to finally certify the **Equal Rights Amendment** , which would give us a legal basis to RESTORE our reproductive rights.
Kirsten is a true leader for American families, and she's exactly the kind of fighter we need in the Senate. **But she's up for reelection in 2024, and Republicans are working overtime to defeat her! Now, her critical end-of-quarter deadline is just around the corner.**
**Kirsten refuses to accept a single cent from corporate PACs. So she's counting on grassroots support from people like you to show that this seat isn't up for grabs.[Please, will you chip in before midnight tonight to help Kirsten continue her fight for families and progress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70224180/428691573/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4436-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDgxMWQzYi0xYTVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ve--GxjIch6j6YfLGwNPSXVaCUC1z1WzHU54RBBOyQ8=)**

clean_body: she's nowhere near done delivering results. | | | Friend, meet Kirsten: = She's a mother to two boys. She's a proud daughter of Albany. She's New York's junior senator. And she's been fighting to help working families through public service for 15 years. Trust us on this: Kirsten is the real deal. During the last session of Congress alone , she won legislation to reform the military justice system to empower survivors of sexual assault, make gun trafficking a federal crime, expand benefits for veterans exposed to toxic burn pits and more. She spent over a decade fighting to finally pass many of these bills — and she's nowhere near done delivering results. Now, Kirsten is leading the charge to pass guaranteed paid family leave so that no one has to choose between caring for a loved one and getting a paycheck. At the same time, she's pushing for legislation to crack down on dangerous, unregistered"ghost guns." And she's spearheading legislation to finally certify the Equal Rights Amendment , which would give us a legal basis to RESTORE our reproductive rights. Kirsten is a true leader for American families, and she's exactly the kind of fighter we need in the Senate. But she's up for reelection in 2024, and Republicans are working overtime to defeat her! Now, her critical end-of-quarter deadline is just around the corner. Kirsten refuses to accept a single cent from corporate PACs. So she's counting on grassroots support from people like you to show that this seat isn't up for grabs.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: When I ran for Senate, a lot of powerful people didn’t think I had a shot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70225753/428697426/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230923_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmVmNmY3NTYtMWM1YS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o1yuXysOTdS_iJrrQGG9npEE4J1nyZQ_atbrBb0CnQw=)
---
Hi Peter, Tammy Baldwin here. When I ran for Senate in 2012, a lot of powerful people didn’t think I had a shot. But this incredible grassroots team fought alongside me — even as others wrote us off. With your help, I became the first woman elected to the U.S. Senate from our state and the first openly gay Senator in our nation’s history. I didn’t run to make history, however, I ran to make a difference in people’s lives. That’s what I’ve been hard at work doing every day since — especially in the fight to protect and expand LGBTQ+ rights. **But across the country right now, extreme Republicans are working overtime to advance a wave of anti-LGBTQ+ legislation.** They are targeting transgender youth in particular, trying to roll back their rights and freedoms. **I refuse to be discouraged.** I ran for office to make a difference, and I won't let anti-LGBTQ+ Republicans turn back the clock. I'm going to keep fighting for our fundamental rights and freedoms, but I can't do it alone. [_**Peter, will you split a donation today between my reelection campaign and HER Time to help defend our Democratic majority? We can't let Republicans take back the Senate and continue their crusade to roll back our rights and freedoms.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70225755/428697427/-523917261?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230923_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmVmNmY3NTYtMWM1YS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o1yuXysOTdS_iJrrQGG9npEE4J1nyZQ_atbrBb0CnQw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tammy Baldwin and HER Time will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70225758/428697430/-523917261?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230923_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmVmNmY3NTYtMWM1YS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o1yuXysOTdS_iJrrQGG9npEE4J1nyZQ_atbrBb0CnQw=)

name: The GIFFORDS Team
subject: 3️⃣ reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Team -
Today, we hope you’ll allow us to share three reasons as to why your $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC is so important.
1. **The United States has higher rates of gun violence than any other developed country in the world.** We have just surpassed over 500 mass shootings in our country this year. This is not normal, and we need to do everything in our power to make sure we don’t see these record numbers of gun violence.

2. **We are already preparing to maintain our razor-thin gun safety Senate majority in 2024.** We’ve made our first five Senate endorsements of the election cycle, and we’ll plenty have more to come. The work to win at the ballot box next November is already well underway, and we need your support to elect gun safety champions at the state, local, and federal levels.

3. **Next week, we’ll be closing the books on our September quarterly fundraising drive.** Right now, we’re pacing drastically behind on our quarterly goals, and it honestly has us worried that we are going to fall short. Your donation makes a huge difference in helping us get to where we need to be so we can continue our lifesaving work.

The choice is yours, but we hope that these three reasons demonstrate the importance of your contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.
[**If you’re able, please make a contribution of $3 or more to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us continue our work towards a future free from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep23.BeCgjV&refcode=em230923-1-30&t=1&akid=6632%2E3935704%2EPUcT0t)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-sep23.OM2mf8&t=2&akid=6632%2E3935704%2EPUcT0t)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas
body:
You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=BJYp351521vD6G%2BsRA%2FBII8sZuB%2Fl3ypC9Qgk8vCCOQoQG2uCbha2Ji3cJx1VTLIb%2FntRZrZzAoAlxjiWp5tArtBIl3Xqxe6SLlhr7NQsiKdMg5mFpsGCoPW6ytw655c0%2F1hn%2BJ9plY2voPTiDmUl8wpYv1gAIW2MUOFVY1zrWI0z%2FGp8pdraHnCnWFMhmfPG635fMNLzeGWYY9TiaZwCoEr%2BrC7ATE7%2FKSMGa47tbFOK%2BdoMKhtS3wQq0SQh7kBPGmZhzNgrqC75MoVxmdskA1Hhpe4YgYa6R4Os5mnH%2BuT8K7xUHZsKsyr8slW08pttUmWArFt3BjugqIVi1kVQjXV9hwEdbC1u00Kv2hxMZfTJDh6xJdEQw8s%2FKznOP0lCGF6TfMDDCHP5BmXD7RpcQWoh0s5ZcR%2BPiL8QW%2FEpN4RIdXH6FaAYV11hTBYErCo .

Peter, just hours after launching my campaign for U.S. Senate, I spoke with Lawrence O’Donnell on MSNBC to talk about why I’m running to defeat Sen. Rick Scott and flip Florida blue.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-dmp [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-dmp]
Rick Scott has failed us in Florida. He’s proposed tax increases on working families, advocated for a nationwide abortion ban, and wrote the GOP plan to end Social Security and Medicare. He’s pushing our state backward – and we need to fight back.
But there’s good news: Experts at CNN, FiveThirtyEight, and Roll Call all agree that Florida is one of Democrats’ best opportunities to flip a Senate seat blue in 2024, and new polling shows this race is nearly TIED at 44% to 43%.
We can defeat Rick Scott, Peter, but only with all hands on deck. Will you split a donation of $25 between Roland Gutierrez and my campaign to flip Florida blue and defend our Senate majority? If we win this race, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend our Senate majority. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-dmp]
Thank you for joining me in this fight. I’m so grateful to have you by my side.
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
Democrat Roland Gutierrez is running for US Senate to defeat Ted Cruz. Texans deserve leaders who will look out for their best interests. We need you in this campaign. Can you donate $5 right now to help Roland win this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=5]

name: Jon Tester
subject: Did you know I have seven fingers? -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Folks: Do you know how many days are left until the end of September?

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/15726?t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230923-JonTester-TesterTandem7Days-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230923-JonTester-TesterTandem7Days-ETG-sl1&akid=12024%2E9716520%2ELl0xbc)
**It’s seven! Get it?**

Ah, that joke never gets old, but I’m not kidding around when I say we need your help.

Mitch McConnell and his billionaire allies see my race as a top target for 2024.

Now, I could cozy up to the special interests who write the big checks and ask for the millions of dollars we’ll need to compete with the GOP. But that’s just not the way I roll.

I’m accountable to the people, and I’m proud of the fact that hardworking folks across the country have supported this campaign, chipping in a few bucks when they can.

**The fight is just beginning, folks. We need your support to help grow our momentum and fight back, so that’s why I’m asking:

**[Will you chip in $7 to help us jumpstart our big fundraising push to reelect me and other Senate Democrats in tough races? Your donation will be split between the DSCC and my campaign.
](https://go.dscc.org/go/15726?t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230923-JonTester-TesterTandem7Days-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230923-JonTester-TesterTandem7Days-ETG-sl1&akid=12024%2E9716520%2ELl0xbc)****
| | [Donate $7](https://go.dscc.org/go/15726?t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230923-JonTester-TesterTandem7Days-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230923-JonTester-TesterTandem7Days-ETG-sl1&akid=12024%2E9716520%2ELl0xbc)

Thanks for being part of this team,

Jon

Jon Tester
U.S. Senator, Montana**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/15726?t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230923-JonTester-TesterTandem7Days-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230923-JonTester-TesterTandem7Days-ETG-sl1&akid=12024%2E9716520%2ELl0xbc)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My faith
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=4055%2E5257348%2Efn8a6u ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Dear Derek,

I was recently visiting with my 95-year old father (his name is Ed, and he
lives in sunny Boca Raton, so he is known as BocaEddy) and he reminded me
about a photo that — well I just had to share it with you.

Here you go. Me at 13, in all my “glory” at my Bar Mitzvah:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230923_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=4055%2E5257348%2Efn8a6u ]Adam Schiff at his Bar Mitzvah

I’ll admit, it’s easy to chuckle at this photo — the classic 1970s bow
tie, the braces, the yarmulke, the looks — but it is also an opportunity
to tell you a little about how I approach my faith.

Throughout my career in public service, I’ve thought a lot about the
Jewish tradition of “Tikkun Olam,” or repairing the world. And over the
last few years, there has been a lot that was broken, and a lot to fix.
It’s been my cause.

Before I go any further, and while I still have your attention, I have to
ask — [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230923_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=4055%2E5257348%2Efn8a6u ]will you click this link and pitch in a few dollars to my
campaign? If you are not ready yet or need more convincing, please read
on. I have lots to share and more to say. I think you’ll like it.

I want to take you back to 1973. Our family moved around a lot because my
father was in the “schmata” business. He started as a traveling salesman,
and later worked as a regional manager for a men’s clothing company.

We moved from Massachusetts where I was born, lived a few years in
Arizona, and ended up in the Bay Area. It was there where my dad got out
of the clothing business and bought a lumber yard, where I worked during
the summers. There’s nothing like hauling sheets of plywood and roofing,
and shoveling concrete to make you want to go to graduate school.

This photo was taken when my family was a member of Temple Isaiah in
Lafayette, California, a reform synagogue we joined after moving to the
Bay Area. And it came after months of practicing for my Bar Mitzvah. I
even taped my practice sessions on our tape recorder (I have a copy of
that tape somewhere, believe it or not, voice cracking and all.)

While the Hebrew language skills I quickly acquired were just as quickly
lost, the lessons that my faith taught me endure and guide me to this day.

In fact, my favorite passage comes from Micah: What is required of us, but
to do justice, to love mercy, and to walk humbly with thy God.

These principles have guided my work in Congress. They have led me to
pursue criminal justice reform, to make housing the homeless a key
priority, to attack discrimination, and to ensure the rule of law is
applied equally. They have also guided my path as I held accountable and
stood up to the most unscrupulous man to ever occupy the Oval Office.

And they guide me in the fight we face today: repairing and rebuilding our
democracy so that we leave it better for my children and yours.

That’s why I put everything I have into my work in Congress and for the
cause of our democracy. It’s the first thing I think about when I wake up
in the morning, and I don’t rest until I’ve done all I can for the day.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=sep2023_abs_em.nvizyW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230923_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=4055%2E5257348%2Efn8a6u ]If these priorities resonate with you, I’m asking for your help to
continue that work by chipping in $3 to my campaign.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=sep2023_abs_em.d0Aj_h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230923_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1007&akid=4055%2E5257348%2Efn8a6u ]EXPRESS DONATE
$3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=sep2023_abs_em.d0Aj_h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230923_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1008&akid=4055%2E5257348%2Efn8a6u ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=sep2023_abs_em.d0Aj_h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230923_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1009&akid=4055%2E5257348%2Efn8a6u ]EXPRESS DONATE
$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=sep2023_abs_em.d0Aj_h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230923_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1010&akid=4055%2E5257348%2Efn8a6u ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=sep2023_abs_em.d0Aj_h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230923_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1011&akid=4055%2E5257348%2Efn8a6u ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230923_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=4055%2E5257348%2Efn8a6u ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Hopefully, this photo helped brighten your day and gave you a bit more
insight into why I have dedicated my life to this cause.

Shalom. And to those celebrating, L’Shana Tova!

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230923_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=4055%2E5257348%2Efn8a6u ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=sep2023_abs_em.SOCG8v&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230923_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=4055%2E5257348%2Efn8a6u ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=4055%2E5257348%2Efn8a6u ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=4055%2E5257348%2Efn8a6u ]Privacy Policy

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=4055%2E5257348%2Efn8a6u

clean_body: Just $10 | Friend, I know you have received countless emails from me lately, but I wouldn't be reaching out if it wasn't necessary. As we approach our End-of-Quarter deadline, my team informed me that Democrats continue to outraise the Republicans nationwide. We can 't allow this to continue! | My dedicated team has been working tirelessly, and I am excited to share that we have devised a viable plan to meet our third-quarter goal before the deadline. Here's where you come in: if everyone receiving this email chips in , we can We need your support to bring a to D.C. in 2024. We must build a united front of patriots ready to combat the Democrats' woke agenda. Today, I am personally reaching out to you, Friend, and urging you to join us in this fight. As always, I appreciate your willingness to chip in and help me reach all of my deadlines. All the best, Paid for by Cramer for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Cramer for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: The latest election lies from Fox News
body:
Republicans are still weaponizing conspiracy theories and outright lies to undermine the 2024 election and our democracy.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1611%2E120351%2Ec4HOd9)
Peter,
Right-wing media like Fox News, Breitbart, and Newsmax aren’t just playing politics by spreading bad information, they’re destabilizing American democracy.
Case in point is the relentless amplification of Trump’s Big Lie that led to the January 6th riots at the capitol. **Today, 69% of Republicans think President Joe Biden’s win in 2020 was illegitimate, according to a recent CNN poll.**
**[If you’d like to help Courier fight back to stop disinformation from spreading in 2024, please consider pitching in $5 or anything you can to support our work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230923?amount=5&refcode=em20230923&refcode2=1611_120351_c4HOd9&akid=1611%2E120351%2Ec4HOd9)**
After the January 6th commission, Donald Trump’s litany of criminal charges, the nearly $800 million Fox News was forced to pay in a settlement with Dominion, you’d think things might be different as the 2024 election gets closer.
Unfortunately, Peter, it’s only getting worse.
Just this month, Fox host Pete Hegseth suggested Democrats could use “tricks” like “COVID 2.0, 3.0” to rig the election. Newsmax carried a live speech from Donald Trump claiming the same thing, and Daily Wire podcast hosts Ben Shapiro and Michael Knowles repeated the claims on their shows, too.
There isn’t a shred of evidence to support these claims, yet the right-wing media ecosystem keeps churning them out. All just to drive ratings, pump up Donald Trump and push an anti-democratic agenda that is way outside the mainstream of American politics.
**Courier was created precisely to combat this kind of dangerous misinformation.** Our journalists are working for newsrooms in nine battleground states with a mission to report the full story, including all the context needed to understand what’s actually going on. And they’re not afraid to use their voices to call out right wing misinformation whenever they see it.
But to make our journalism available to the communities who need it most, we rely on supporters like you to fund our work.
**[So, Peter, if you can, please consider pitching in $5 or any amount today to help us fight back against misinformation and bring reliable, honest reporting to communities that need it.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230923?amount=5&refcode=em20230923&refcode2=1611_120351_c4HOd9&akid=1611%2E120351%2Ec4HOd9)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230923?refcode=em20230923&amount=5&refcode2=1611_120351_c4HOd9&akid=1611%2E120351%2Ec4HOd9)**
Thank you,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer--1611&t=2&refcode2=1611_120351_c4HOd9&akid=1611%2E120351%2Ec4HOd9)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1611%2E120351%2Ec4HOd9)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: DASS
subject: Trump’s election deniers in control of our elections?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70228857/428708668/-664199346?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODIxYWFlZC0yMTVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MkhxaL4kaLOJNODi69Zd8JWwfGg-QWgaEG6CFRT0Ikk=)
Last election, Secretaries of State got A LOT of attention: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70228859/428708674/1071238054?refcode=em-9.23.23-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODIxYWFlZC0yMTVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MkhxaL4kaLOJNODi69Zd8JWwfGg-QWgaEG6CFRT0Ikk=)
And for good reason: secretaries were on the ballot in 24 states where the officeholder serves as the chief election official.

Secretaries play the most important role in affirming the outcome of elections, but of the 24 races in play, 10 saw our Democratic candidates up against known election deniers. **And folks, these weren’t your grandfather’s Republicans:**
* Take **Mark Finchem** in Arizona, a literal member of the extremist Oath Keepers militia that was involved in Trump’s insurrection. Finchem himself was at the Capitol on Jan. 6, and could have been in charge of Arizona’s elections had we not stopped him.

* Then there was **Jim Marchant** in Nevada, a MAGA Republican who submitted fake elector documents in 2020 to trick Congress into flipping Nevada’s results.

* And there was **Kristina Karamo** in Michigan, who rose to prominence by falsely claiming she witnessed fraud as a poll watcher. Karamo still believes Trump was the true victor of the state. _She also has yet to concede her own race._

We defeated these anti-democracy candidates thanks to unprecedented support from grassroots donors like you. But the battle for our democracy is far from over.

Across the nation, the GOP continues to embrace Trump’s Big Lie. At the state level, Republican legislatures are deliberately creating barriers to the ballot box.

**Strong, Democratic Secretaries of State are our best line of defense against attempts to undermine democracy. We need to be prepared, which is why we’re laying the groundwork now.**

[Can you make a small donation of $5 to elect Democratic Secretaries of State? Every dollar raised will go towards our efforts to protect voting rights and secure our democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70228861/428708676/1071238054?refcode=em-9.23.23-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODIxYWFlZC0yMTVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MkhxaL4kaLOJNODi69Zd8JWwfGg-QWgaEG6CFRT0Ikk=)

clean_body: | = Last election, Secretaries of State got A LOT of attention: = And for good reason: secretaries were on the ballot in 24 states where the officeholder serves as the chief election official. Secretaries play the most important role in affirming the outcome of elections, but of the 24 races in play, 10 saw our Democratic candidates up against known election deniers. And folks, these weren’t your grandfather’s Republicans: Take Mark Finchem in Arizona, a literal member of the extremist Oath Keepers militia that was involved in Trump’s insurrection. Finchem himself was at the Capitol on Jan. 6, and could have been in charge of Arizona’s elections had we not stopped him. Then there was Jim Marchant in Nevada, a MAGA Republican who submitted fake elector documents in 2020 to trick Congress into flipping Nevada’s results. And there was Kristina Karamo in Michigan, who rose to prominence by falsely claiming she witnessed fraud as a poll watcher. Karamo still believes Trump was the true victor of the state. She also has yet to concede her own race. We defeated these anti-democracy candidates thanks to unprecedented support from grassroots donors like you. But the battle for our democracy is far from over. Across the nation, the GOP continues to embrace Trump’s Big Lie. At the state level, Republican legislatures are deliberately creating barriers to the ballot box. Strong, Democratic Secretaries of State are our best line of defense against attempts to undermine democracy. We need to be prepared, which is why we’re laying the groundwork now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Democratic Association of Secretaries of State (DASS) | =** | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. **Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America. In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board. After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation. Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First. Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has. FOLLOW BERNIE ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

Peter,

**I won’t mince words:** if we don’t pick up the pace for our online fundraising today, we’re not going to hit our goal before next week’s end of quarter fundraising deadline.

We all knew August would be slow with everyone enjoying the end of summer but as it turns out, **September has been the most troubling month for our campaign**.

_**Who knew?**_

I certainly didn’t expect all our fundraising appeals to fall flat this month, so now I'm using what time we have left ahead of next Saturday’s fundraising deadline to shore up our position and end the quarter on a strong note!

subject: Susie Lee is officially a DCCC Frontline Candidate!

body:
| Team — The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) just named Susie Lee as a Frontline Candidate in 2024. That means we’re defending one of the most competitive House seats in the country!

[_We need an outpouring of grassroots support right now to ensure Susie can defeat her far-right opponents and defend this district next November. Can we count on you to split a contribution between our campaign and the Voter Protection Project to keep battleground NV-03 blue?_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53287?t=6&akid=10612%2E878179%2EgAV7fv) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Susie Lee and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53288?t=7&akid=10612%2E878179%2EgAV7fv)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53289?t=8&akid=10612%2E878179%2EgAV7fv)

[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53291?t=10&akid=10612%2E878179%2EgAV7fv)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53292?t=11&akid=10612%2E878179%2EgAV7fv)
With this decision, the DCCC confirmed that what happens here in Vegas won’t stay in Vegas. Instead, they proved this race has national implications.

**_Winning in Nevada’s 3rd District could very well be the difference between Democrats taking back the House, or giving Kevin McCarthy the chance to expand his MAGA majority._**

Susie won her race by just 10,003 votes last year – one of the narrowest victories in the country – and Republicans are willing to spend millions to whittle down those margins even further this time around. __The stakes are incredibly high in this race.__

With everything from abortion rights to healthcare and labor rights on the line, **we need to do everything we can to keep an effective Democratic leader like Susie Lee in Congress.**

[_We’re asking for your support to help re-elect Susie Lee and stop House Republicans from consolidating their power. Please, will you make today the day that you split $10 between our campaign and the Voter Protection Project?_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53287?t=12&akid=10612%2E878179%2EgAV7fv)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Susie Lee and VPP will go through immediately:

name: Becca Balint
subject: An update from DC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
It’s an open civil war within the Republican Party

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70230507/428713634/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTljNTMyZi0yMzVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8SV0gHaSLLLC8ZykzPMqx4mtpqF4CtVxJXYHVhHL8a8=&emci=6663b079-8259-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=159c532f-235a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, It’s been a frustrating week in DC, and I want to let you know what’s going on. **It’s not just “congressional dysfunction;” it’s an open civil war within the Republican Party.** McCarthy said whatever he needed to say, cut side deals with extreme MAGA Republicans, and made promises he couldn’t keep just to become Speaker. Now, extremist Republicans (think: Marjorie Taylor Greene, Matt Gaetz, Jim Jordan, Lauren Boebert) are completely running the show and threatening to remove him. McCarthy will essentially say or do anything to cling to power. That is the sole reason he opened an impeachment inquiry against President Biden, to thwart the calls to remove him. **But these extremist holdouts will not be mollified.** They want to shut down the government because they think it is a winner politically. _They’re preventing us from doing our work, and we are days away from a government shutdown that will hurt Americans._ The dynamics here are different from the usual news stories about “partisan politics.” At the end of May, a majority of Congressional Democrats and Republicans with the White House came together and passed a bipartisan bill (_yes, you read that right — bipartisan_) to save our country from a catastrophic default and agree on how much we would spend to fund the government this year. That bill became law. But now, extremists are demanding that McCarthy ignore and renege on the bipartisan spending deal we passed and extract more painful cuts to the budget. They aren’t serious about governing, but instead driven by nihilism and adoration of Trump. Just yesterday, the former president posted this encouraging a shutdown for his own protection: “This is the last chance to defund these political prosecutions against me and other Patriots.” **So, where are the so-called moderates in this?** Many of them know better, you can see it in their faces. But they won’t band together and push back because they don’t have the courage to stand up to the extremists or to Trump in fear of retaliation. Democrats are prepared to work with the “so-called moderates” in the Republican Caucus, just like we did to avert a default — BUT they have to want to work with us, and we have not seen that willingness yet. That’s the view from where I sit here in DC. It’s grim, I know. But I will leave you with one glimmer of hope. This week, one very conservative Republican member, Rep. Ken Buck from Colorado, stood up to his party. He has publicly criticized the impeachment inquiry against President Biden saying the facts don’t merit it. And yesterday he defended Attorney General Merrick Garland in our Judiciary when his Republican colleagues tore into him with baseless accusations. **I’ll take that glimmer of courage and use it to me the courage to keep fighting for this democracy.** Thanks for reading, Becca Balint [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70230508/428713635/-582533676?refcode=E4238-20230923-NoteFromBecca-SB-GOP&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTljNTMyZi0yMzVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8SV0gHaSLLLC8ZykzPMqx4mtpqF4CtVxJXYHVhHL8a8=)
---

* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70230509/428713636/537668883?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTljNTMyZi0yMzVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8SV0gHaSLLLC8ZykzPMqx4mtpqF4CtVxJXYHVhHL8a8=&emci=6663b079-8259-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=159c532f-235a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) It’s not just “congressional dysfunction;” it’s an open civil war within the Republican Party. McCarthy said whatever he needed to say, cut side deals with extreme MAGA Republicans, and made promises he couldn’t keep just to become Speaker. Now, extremist Republicans (think: Marjorie Taylor Greene, Matt Gaetz, Jim Jordan, Lauren Boebert) are completely running the show and threatening to remove him. McCarthy will essentially say or do anything to cling to power. That is the sole reason he opened an impeachment inquiry against President Biden, to thwart the calls to remove him. But these extremist holdouts will not be mollified. They want to shut down the government because they think it is a winner politically. They’re preventing us from doing our work, and we are days away from a government shutdown that will hurt Americans. The dynamics here are different from the usual news stories about “partisan politics.” At the end of May, a majority of Congressional Democrats and Republicans with the White House came together and passed a bipartisan bill (yes, you read that right — bipartisan) to save our country from a catastrophic default and agree on how much we would spend to fund the government this year. That bill became law. But now, extremists are demanding that McCarthy ignore and renege on the bipartisan spending deal we passed and extract more painful cuts to the budget. They aren’t serious about governing, but instead driven by nihilism and adoration of Trump. Just yesterday, the former president posted this encouraging a shutdown for his own protection: “This is the last chance to defund these political prosecutions against me and other Patriots.” So, where are the so-called moderates in this? Many of them know better, you can see it in their faces. But they won’t band together and push back because they don’t have the courage to stand up to the extremists or to Trump in fear of retaliation. Democrats are prepared to work with the “so-called moderates” in the Republican Caucus, just like we did to avert a default — BUT they have to want to work with us, and we have not seen that willingness yet. That’s the view from where I sit here in DC. It’s grim, I know. But I will leave you with one glimmer of hope. This week, one very conservative Republican member, Rep. Ken Buck from Colorado, stood up to his party. He has publicly criticized the impeachment inquiry against President Biden saying the facts don’t merit it. And yesterday he defended Attorney General Merrick Garland in our Judiciary when his Republican colleagues tore into him with baseless accusations. I’ll take that glimmer of courage and use it to me the courage to keep fighting for this democracy. Thanks for reading, Becca Balint = = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . If you prefer to contribute by check, you are welcome to send a contribution to the campaign at the address below. To comply with Federal law, we must use our best efforts to obtain, maintain and submit the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Thank you in advance for including that information along with your check. | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont Becca for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05302 United States

subject: Parents' rights are under attack.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
body:
Dear Peter,
Joe Biden's Secretary of Education recently dismissed parent concerns about what their children are being taught in schools.
He doesn't have respect for parents who "are acting like they know what's best for schools." According to Secretary Cardona and the Biden administration, parents do not know what is best for their children.
That is why I am running: to return power back to parents.
If you support parental rights, please contribute to my campaign at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/6Wcq3rDYdNyBvS66LSko0A/4gAeeKcIanPjgQ6h1i8o892A).
My opponent Marie Perez voted against the Parents Bill of Rights. She voted against curriculum transparency alongside every single Democrat.
Help me with a donation today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/6Wcq3rDYdNyBvS66LSko0A/4gAeeKcIanPjgQ6h1i8o892A).
Here in Washington State, parents' rights are under direct attack by our government with legislation like SB5599, which allows children to obtain gender-transition surgeries without the parents knowing.
Please donate to ensure I defeat my radical opponent at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/6Wcq3rDYdNyBvS66LSko0A/4gAeeKcIanPjgQ6h1i8o892A). You can also opt to make it a recurring contribution by clicking the "Make this Monthly" button.
When I get to Congress, I will work to defend the rights of parents to know what their children are being taught in schools.
You can help get a conservative Republican into Congress by donating today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/6Wcq3rDYdNyBvS66LSko0A/4gAeeKcIanPjgQ6h1i8o892A).
Will you please help me meet our goal so we can send a common-sense conservative to Congress?
Respectfully,
Joe Kent
