name: Lucas Kunce
subject: [photos] An update from the trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Just a few of my favorite moments over the last several weeks
#
Peter — my commitment to running a people-powered campaign is deeper than just refusing money from corporate PACs or mega-donors. It means putting in the work, showing up, and listening to real Missourians who’ve witnessed our communities be stripped for parts by corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley.
**So before I ask you to chip in to my grassroots campaign, please let me share a few of my favorite moments from traveling the state over these last few weeks.**
**[CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36677?refcode=em20230923-3831&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3831%2E614464%2E4nHPMU)**
We kicked things off with a town hall near where I grew up in mid-Missouri — and they told me it was the biggest crowd they’ve ever had for a Democrat in Moniteau County! These folks are fired up to defeat Josh Hawley, invest in workers, and finally rebuild communities across our state.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36677?refcode=em20230923-3831&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3831%2E614464%2E4nHPMU)
A few days later in St. Louis County, hundreds of Missourians joined our rally to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this Senate seat. Working people are tired of being controlled, exploited, and left behind by the massive corporations and corrupt politicians calling the shots in Washington. They’re ready to take back their power, and this Senate seat.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36677?refcode=em20230923-3831&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3831%2E614464%2E4nHPMU)
St. Joe always shows up, and this time was no different.
After our town hall, someone shared a story of struggle with me that’s too common in Missouri. They worked hard and did well in school, but at 28 still can’t get a good job near home. One of their parents had a union job that used to take care of their family until the assembly line got shut down.
Working families in our state deserve a future. They deserve access to good jobs. And they deserve to have power over their own lives. That’s what I’m fighting for in this race — for their future, and the future of Missourians for generations to come.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36677?refcode=em20230923-3831&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3831%2E614464%2E4nHPMU)
I walked the picket line with striking workers from UAW Local 2250 at the GM plant in Wentzville. Corporate elites have been robbing American auto workers for years, and I’m proud to stand in solidarity with these workers as they fight for a new contract with fair pay, benefits, and the job security they deserve.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36677?refcode=em20230923-3831&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3831%2E614464%2E4nHPMU)
Finally, I headed down to visit with folks at Truman Day in Lawrence County. From taking power back for Missouri workers, to ending Big Brother control over our lives and bodies — they’re fired up about all the things we can get done for our state and our country after we beat Josh Hawley.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36677?refcode=em20230923-3831&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=3831%2E614464%2E4nHPMU)
Everyday Missourians are driving this movement forward every step of the way — and I’m just so grateful to everyone who has taken the time to share their story with me over the past few weeks. **But we still have a lot of work ahead of us, so I have to ask:**
**[Will you add a donation of $10 or anything at all so we can defeat Josh Hawley and take this Senate seat back for everyday, working Missourians? This is our best shot to flip a GOP-held U.S. Senate seat in 2024, so your support right now could make all the difference for our campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36677?refcode=em20230923-3831&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=3831%2E614464%2E4nHPMU)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36678?refcode=em20230923-3831&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=8&akid=3831%2E614464%2E4nHPMU) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36678?refcode=em20230923-3831&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=9&akid=3831%2E614464%2E4nHPMU) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36678?refcode=em20230923-3831&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=10&akid=3831%2E614464%2E4nHPMU) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36678?refcode=em20230923-3831&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=11&akid=3831%2E614464%2E4nHPMU) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36678?refcode=em20230923-3831&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=12&akid=3831%2E614464%2E4nHPMU) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36678?refcode=em20230923-3831&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=13&akid=3831%2E614464%2E4nHPMU) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36677?refcode=em20230923-3831&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=14&akid=3831%2E614464%2E4nHPMU)
---
Thank you so much,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230923-3831-footer&t=15&refcode2=3831_614464_4nHPMU&akid=3831%2E614464%2E4nHPMU)**

It means putting in the work, showing up, and listening to real Missourians who’ve witnessed our communities be stripped for parts by corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley. So before I ask you to chip in to my grassroots campaign, please let me share a few of my favorite moments from traveling the state over these last few weeks. We kicked things off with a town hall near where I grew up in mid-Missouri — and they told me it was the biggest crowd they’ve ever had for a Democrat in Moniteau County! These folks are fired up to defeat Josh Hawley, invest in workers, and finally rebuild communities across our state. A few days later in St. Louis County, hundreds of Missourians joined our rally to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this Senate seat. Working people are tired of being controlled, exploited, and left behind by the massive corporations and corrupt politicians calling the shots in Washington. They’re ready to take back their power, and this Senate seat. St. Joe always shows up, and this time was no different. After our town hall, someone shared a story of struggle with me that’s too common in Missouri. They worked hard and did well in school, but at 28 still can’t get a good job near home. One of their parents had a union job that used to take care of their family until the assembly line got shut down. Working families in our state deserve a future. They deserve access to good jobs. And they deserve to have power over their own lives. That’s what I’m fighting for in this race — for their future, and the future of Missourians for generations to come. I walked the picket line with striking workers from UAW Local 2250 at the GM plant in Wentzville. Corporate elites have been robbing American auto workers for years, and I’m proud to stand in solidarity with these workers as they fight for a new contract with fair pay, benefits, and the job security they deserve. Finally, I headed down to visit with folks at Truman Day in Lawrence County. From taking power back for Missouri workers, to ending Big Brother control over our lives and bodies — they’re fired up about all the things we can get done for our state and our country after we beat Josh Hawley. Everyday Missourians are driving this movement forward every step of the way — and I’m just so grateful to everyone who has taken the time to share their story with me over the past few weeks. But we still have a lot of work ahead of us, so I have to ask: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you so much, Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: Tina Smith
subject: Fighting for reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
As the only Senator to have worked at Planned Parenthood, I know the importance of fighting for reproductive justice, especially as we see these rights stripped away day by day. |
#
Folks — I’m doing whatever it takes to restore reproductive rights because they are under assault like we’ve never seen before. These days, each and every Republican candidate for president supports abortion bans in some form — including some who support national bans. It’s despicable that these politicians think they should make decisions about a woman’s own health care. In recent months, state legislatures across the country have passed laws to punish women who get abortions, their doctors, and sometimes even prosecutors who choose not to prosecute people under certain abortion laws. **As the only Senator to have worked at Planned Parenthood, I know the importance of fighting for reproductive justice, especially as we see these rights stripped away day by day.** We need to make some big changes — and I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to pass crucial legislation like the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ and the _Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act_. We can’t wait any longer to enshrine abortion rights into federal law. I’m willing to do whatever it takes to get it done. **[If you agree, please add your name in support of these pro-choice laws.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70231279/428716470/367365235?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230923_AM1_V1_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTE1NjJkNC0yNTVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=si6UyWrY5jZ_IE95vg42kgMZQWFT8YJAwb_jE_-jnVM=&emci=b41562d4-255a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=be1562d4-255a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6227932)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70231280/428716471/367365235?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230923_AM1_V1_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTE1NjJkNC0yNTVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=si6UyWrY5jZ_IE95vg42kgMZQWFT8YJAwb_jE_-jnVM=&emci=b41562d4-255a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=be1562d4-255a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6227932)

name: Karen at United We Dream Action
subject: How would life be different with citizenship?
body:
We are here to stay and permanent protections are long overdue. | | | Peter — Last week, Judge Hanen of Texas issued a decision we’ve been waiting on for months, and unfortunately, he ruled against DACA. Once again, DACA recipients like me, and all the folks who were never eligible for DACA, are left in limbo. And let’s be clear: **eligibility for DACA leaves most undocumented youth today out of the program.** That’s just one of the many reasons that DACA was never enough. Our fight is for a pathway to citizenship. If I had citizenship instead of temporary DACA protections, I would’ve been able to help care for my grandmother in Mexico when she first developed Alzheimer’s. It would have given me and my family the chance to say goodbye before she passed away last year. With citizenship, I wouldn’t have any limits on where I’m allowed to travel or what I’m allowed to do because of my status — what jobs I can have, where I can go to school, and more. DACA has changed my life and the lives of so many undocumented people like me — but we are here to stay and we need permanent protections. In this critical moment after the negative decision last week, United We Dream Action is leading the fight to secure a pathway to citizenship from Congress and the Biden administration, and we need you to join us in this fight: **Will you donate today to support our fight for permanent protections?** **** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8woUN_Ab65s2rQh9LDLPy4yw2kbh0G90EmZCal6ZYZjm_SO7ZO8gTn_fWSjilkTnesHS0VN7N_a7Td1cYSV-y00P1cr3_WHgkCf-Gg03L9P4oAKeA2EgVB1Aoze3gQguWxs-W6AyXb4GMFue7DTaDltjpiwvZfq2gDg6wuMlYw3ucNVzJKgqEtG48iF3Ehk7sIvhHOtMhd2Je7vPsk_Djosbw3f4M9Je8NOGFxBOCYuA_42wtq4P87qo6bSU-UpAN0jQxxLj0zpHj2TGMReIfq_E_Kbg2Xn2OnTXdRuxxxrQzBtmcAk9IdSaMYsVbaqOS99wyioGdMlHzeCJZNQTmwsVTJOJSAe8C8IJlOJn-8DiVRx6yvJHPKIQHL6KmOaHY-AbDY3ENtF8dng3jgIqZKltg4BwG2m09X3_Mn_NtoqQxo88VV5ZUMZn7OGcbAes0/3zu/4tf3q8pSQ925cF2PjwALzg/h0/OYimqqdqreR8A8wY-bP2vYxSk9q-qXwMOsntDXEwZQo)

clean_body: We are here to stay and permanent protections are long overdue. | | | Peter — Last week, Judge Hanen of Texas issued a decision we’ve been waiting on for months, and unfortunately, he ruled against DACA. Once again, DACA recipients like me, and all the folks who were never eligible for DACA, are left in limbo. And let’s be clear: eligibility for DACA leaves most undocumented youth today out of the program. That’s just one of the many reasons that DACA was never enough. Our fight is for a pathway to citizenship. If I had citizenship instead of temporary DACA protections, I would’ve been able to help care for my grandmother in Mexico when she first developed Alzheimer’s. It would have given me and my family the chance to say goodbye before she passed away last year. With citizenship, I wouldn’t have any limits on where I’m allowed to travel or what I’m allowed to do because of my status — what jobs I can have, where I can go to school, and more. DACA has changed my life and the lives of so many undocumented people like me — but we are here to stay and we need permanent protections. In this critical moment after the negative decision last week, United We Dream Action is leading the fight to secure a pathway to citizenship from Congress and the Biden administration, and we need you to join us in this fight: Will you donate today to support our fight for permanent protections? ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for your support, Karen, United We Dream Action | If you’ve been on the fence about starting a recurring donation, now’s the time to maximize your impact. Help us win permanent protections for all 11 million by starting a monthly donation:** | |

Friend, I’m honored to work alongside progressive movement leader Rep. Delia Ramirez in Congress. **Delia is not only the first Latina serving in Congress from the Midwest. She’s also the only member of Congress in a mixed-immigration-status family.** Her husband is a Dreamer, a DACA recipient whose ability to live and work in the U.S. is under threat as right-wing federal judges attack the DACA program. With a deep understanding of how urgently Congress must act, **Delia is leading legislation to keep families together and protect immigrants from deportation.** **Delia has taken politically courageous stands to champion human rights for all—including honoring the humanity of Palestinians.** That’s risky for a first-term Congresswoman, because AIPAC’s pro-apartheid network of PACs will very likely spend millions to try to defeat her in 2024’s re-election. Can you join me in having her back? [**Please split a donation today between Rep. Delia Ramirez’s and my 2024 re-election campaigns. Delia is a bold champion for human rights and justice, who’s moving with the urgency we need. Let’s have her back and keep her in Congress fighting for marginalized people!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKYG9Res0K8Z8Aq0N5l3QzE8zH4oGDgRfQTEH-u5ud9r_ZWZ5cjHWDoWHW1L1MVb6P7jSfLw7fHKhsfVcYyfMaaRUYlmwpD4RU4M5KitQAmeL2Qx3aW9sF4rMzU70JXj1Fx_4dmq8wKk6PEkhQRa2sQv3rb6JSb_KRkhCZBDTgGa7Lr-yPyAQPJ67gXXhZPO7bBLZ25WeUhGp0rbeUlixJKjXItkweQl9-KPmREOkrrkc5VMcWP_Qifp0tQ_l0wlIRThjq86oL_OSeWOFjRCOMtK30J-2nIBeOICbTrNFJoOUKmBy21qX4sUYbXtBYjLKAKqHsNtVV21s77bYToq8eR1Rfnqs8egCANqUt97kjYFx0Q1iitMpbTrXgvKgb8XsG3m861e5GnBoKlWif5WQmqpyKakkCHf75b6fLAVJ1DMw/3zu/h8rFaE-pRfuosFRO7K76Yg/h1/U1oE83s0MpZqDb1XvkYoxP5sPWBMLnVfN4x8OS0yiHE) | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKYG9Res0K8Z8Aq0N5l3QzE5ydkFEl0yalUP4HHGBqheHnuh0NIlPoDY0IJQulbS2vkHSbxdzN7tPMFPtKyi-CjZpYek--MNTQrTwaAW0-G4hSN1ad4YXUwP9QvsRj-wQtBwPJU_54cHamd5axMxIDpJ1EgnN61XrnYbonEaIHQhknUp8bTaCWR1E0-ORoW3kOPqLr1s8qzBmILa9cnUtdUNe3KkjNaxcXC_qeFb3sy8D9N5oJ8AMgS0kFL3rXTb4f6Nz0XPqazhaLdBGySBtG8s2sYxUAFyJHD2rb2TwmHg2APSRCR5mGU3Ckk4_HKU_qqkhCVxxLibljBxFNsn2yNgmZ92g4YwImUmdvp8GCUm766jnX5u5QVRFS2lShRPRa0ELURl8kOdhBI65Ug5-WqNDQgpW2YDwqj3CyVAgp01A/3zu/h8rFaE-pRfuosFRO7K76Yg/h2/JiM2OIHty3qtvTNBDLiP14dYBaah978z0YMArLprSs0)

While in the Illinois State House, Delia expanded Medicaid coverage for state residents regardless of immigration status. And she led on housing justice for all as a grassroots organizer in Chicago.
Delia is deeply rooted in her community and has set up a strong constituent services program to support residents through everyday challenges. Like me, she prioritizes this essential part of public service—in addition to pushing for the transformative policies our communities need.
Together we’ve introduced legislation to protect restaurant workers as well as a bill to expand veterans’ health care providers by welcoming health care professionals who are immigrants to care for them.
As the Vice Ranking Member of the Homeland Security Committee, Delia is also calling for expedited work permits so asylum seekers and our undocumented neighbors can stay here without fear. She has successfully pushed the Biden administration to protect more immigrants who are fleeing their countries, by extending the time period for more people to apply for Temporary Protected Status.
We need Delia in Congress to keep leading on immigration reform and pushing Democrats to act with urgency.
**Delia overcame heavy spending from billionaire-funded PACs in 2022 during her first election to Congress. Now that she’s among the boldest progressives in Congress, she’s sure to face more attacks from those who want to maintain the unjust status quo.**

clean_body: Gearing up for 2024’s re-election: | | | Friend, I’m honored to work alongside progressive movement leader Rep. Delia Ramirez in Congress. Delia is not only the first Latina serving in Congress from the Midwest. She’s also the only member of Congress in a mixed-immigration-status family. Her husband is a Dreamer, a DACA recipient whose ability to live and work in the U.S. is under threat as right-wing federal judges attack the DACA program. With a deep understanding of how urgently Congress must act, Delia is leading legislation to keep families together and protect immigrants from deportation. Delia has taken politically courageous stands to champion human rights for all—including honoring the humanity of Palestinians. That’s risky for a first-term Congresswoman, because AIPAC’s pro-apartheid network of PACs will very likely spend millions to try to defeat her in 2024’s re-election. Can you join me in having her back? | While in the Illinois State House, Delia expanded Medicaid coverage for state residents regardless of immigration status. And she led on housing justice for all as a grassroots organizer in Chicago. Delia is deeply rooted in her community and has set up a strong constituent services program to support residents through everyday challenges. Like me, she prioritizes this essential part of public service—in addition to pushing for the transformative policies our communities need. Together we’ve introduced legislation to protect restaurant workers as well as a bill to expand veterans’ health care providers by welcoming health care professionals who are immigrants to care for them. As the Vice Ranking Member of the Homeland Security Committee, Delia is also calling for expedited work permits so asylum seekers and our undocumented neighbors can stay here without fear. She has successfully pushed the Biden administration to protect more immigrants who are fleeing their countries, by extending the time period for more people to apply for Temporary Protected Status. We need Delia in Congress to keep leading on immigration reform and pushing Democrats to act with urgency. Delia overcame heavy spending from billionaire-funded PACs in 2022 during her first election to Congress. Now that she’s among the boldest progressives in Congress, she’s sure to face more attacks from those who want to maintain the unjust status quo. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Delia Ramirez | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Together, we can win real change for a more just and equitable world. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

subject: A surge of donations today

body:
When Lateefah gets to the House of Representatives, she’ll be bringing with her all of our voices and our values.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=125%2E1163%2EcDe6eg)
We’re building this campaign on a foundation for grassroots support. [**Let us explain why your donation really matters:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230923?amount=10&refcode=em20230923-1&refcode2=125_1163_cDe6eg&akid=125%2E1163%2EcDe6eg)
➡️ As an organizer who has spent her time in the community for many years, Lateefah is uniquely positioned to bring all those voices with her to the halls of Congress. We need more representatives in Congress who have spent time on the ground fighting for their neighbors.
➡️ Lateefah has shown up to fight for us. Always. In each and every season of her life, Lateefah Simon has dedicated herself to making sure people in power cannot ignore us. This is why she is running this campaign the right way, with one grassroots donation at a time. She isn’t taking any corporate PAC money because in Congress, she’s going to represent us, not special interests.
➡️ We’re a scrappy campaign working to earn the vote of every single voter in the East Bay. To do that, we’ve set ambitious goals — and with the FEC filing deadline around the corner, we set another goal to raise $6,000 more in online donations. We’re hoping to have a surge of donations come through today to help us reach that goal. And that starts with you...
[**Are you ready to help our campaign send Lateefah to Congress? Making a contribution right now is the best way to make that happen. Any contribution of $10 or more will make the biggest impact.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230923?amount=10&refcode=em20230923-1&refcode2=125_1163_cDe6eg&akid=125%2E1163%2EcDe6eg)

Together,

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: You are NOT an ATM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Our goal is to send you informative updates about the campaign and what’s happening in Washington.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=30292%2E3422442%2EY8EWhY)
Derek, here at Katie Porter HQ, we know we send you emails pretty regularly. But there’s a good reason for it, and we try extremely hard to make sure no one on our grassroots team feels like they’re being treated like an ATM.
**The biggest reason we send these emails is because Katie doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists—** and she’s the only candidate in the race who has made that commitment. As a result, she relies on the strength of our grassroots fundraising to stay competitive. ([**You can pitch in here if you’d like to help!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230923-1?refcode=EMAL23_1_ATM_20230923_V1_F&refcode2=30292_3422442_Y8EWhY&akid=30292%2E3422442%2EY8EWhY))
**As a consumer protection attorney, Katie has long insisted that our email program should be one of the most ethical in politics.** No fake “donor matches” that don’t really exist, no made-up goals with numbers that don’t correspond to reality, and no hair-on-fire appeals like, “donate now or else we will LOSE.”
Our goal is to send you informative updates about the campaign and what’s happening in Washington, clue you in to some of our behind-the-scenes work, and give you the opportunity to [**pitch in, if you’re able.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230923-1?refcode=EMAL23_1_ATM_20230923_V1_F&refcode2=30292_3422442_Y8EWhY&akid=30292%2E3422442%2EY8EWhY)
It’s not the easiest way to fund a campaign, but Katie is committed to doing this the right way. And so far we’ve been pretty successful—polls show this to be an extremely tight race.
Which leads us to the ask for this email. September 30th is our end-of-quarter reporting deadline, after which we’ll have to report our fundraising progress to the Federal Election Commission (FEC).
**Our numbers will be publicly reported, and everyone from journalists to our opponents will see them as a measure of our campaign’s overall strength.** We want to make sure folks see that our momentum is only growing—and we need your help to do it!
[**If you can, will you pitch in $5 or any amount before the end-of-quarter deadline? Every donation adds up and will help us show that Katie’s momentum is growing fast on the next FEC report!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230923-1?refcode=EMAL23_1_ATM_20230923_V1_F&refcode2=30292_3422442_Y8EWhY&akid=30292%2E3422442%2EY8EWhY)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230923-1?refcode=EMAL23_1_ATM_20230923_V1_F&refcode2=30292_3422442_Y8EWhY&akid=30292%2E3422442%2EY8EWhY)
Thanks so much. More updates soon,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAL23_1_ATM_20230923_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=30292_3422442_Y8EWhY&akid=30292%2E3422442%2EY8EWhY)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=30292%2E3422442%2EY8EWhY)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=30292%2E3422442%2EY8EWhY)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Tell MAGA extremists Caucus NO government shutdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
House and Senate Democrats will not vote for a short-term funding bill that cuts critical resources for those who need it most.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70231948/428718869/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTc2ZWYxMC0yODVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UHmX0mzNL3bofDavauMyyydY3en9twd2rd-2_lpxuZE=&emci=0b0be7d5-0f5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=a976ef10-285a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)
---

| | This week, MAGA House Republicans released a dangerous and extreme bill that would renege on the agreement they made with President Biden a few months ago and demand steep funding cuts to healthcare, housing, education – fundamental programs for middle-class America – as the price for keeping the government funded for a few more weeks. But here's the catch, Kevin McCarthy doesn't have the votes for his own bill. **The House Republicans are so unconcerned about inflicting the harm from the government shutdown that with only 10 days to go, they decided to go home and do nothing for five days.** Kevin McCarthy needs to take his responsibilities seriously and forge a bipartisan deal just as the Senate has been doing. **Let me be clear: House and Senate Democrats will not vote for any short-term funding bill that cuts critical resources for those who need them most,** but Kevin McCarthy is more than happy to let MAGA extremists attack American families and businesses. House Republicans are failing Americans. What we need to avoid a shutdown is a bipartisan solution, and I'm working with my colleagues to find one. But the latest antics from the MAGA wing of the Republican Party are standing in the way. These games are dangerous, reckless, and hurting our communities. [**We all need to raise our voices and demand that MAGA Republicans come to the table to work towards a**** _real_****solution. Will you sign my petition to tell Kevin McCarthy to get his caucus in line and avoid a government shutdown?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70231951/428718874/302962563?contactdata=ripoYuEpHCN26Ik3dDk6SXdQlzlflIm6OtsluJZX8YsqpdEEAqw5H3Ksfn6WuH8aC9IWjMQPU5sItCYu9aYaa7zmdMq9aC4CtfaL+LFTftY2DKoKEPRsYNU5MDeZynKpg5ebpiN/OLiRupL+l4UtNA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTc2ZWYxMC0yODVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UHmX0mzNL3bofDavauMyyydY3en9twd2rd-2_lpxuZE=&emci=0b0be7d5-0f5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=a976ef10-285a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215) [Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70231953/428718877/302962563?contactdata=ripoYuEpHCN26Ik3dDk6SXdQlzlflIm6OtsluJZX8YsqpdEEAqw5H3Ksfn6WuH8aC9IWjMQPU5sItCYu9aYaa7zmdMq9aC4CtfaL+LFTftY2DKoKEPRsYNU5MDeZynKpg5ebpiN/OLiRupL+l4UtNA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTc2ZWYxMC0yODVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UHmX0mzNL3bofDavauMyyydY3en9twd2rd-2_lpxuZE=&emci=0b0be7d5-0f5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=a976ef10-285a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215) The budget deadline is September 30, and we're hurtling towards it. Right now, MAGA extremists are holding our country hostage to satisfy their extremist fever dreams of decimating Social Security and Medicare, tossing low-income children out of daycare centers, and, of course, restricting abortion access. clean_body: House and Senate Democrats will not vote for a short-term funding bill that cuts critical resources for those who need it most. | | | | This week, MAGA House Republicans released a dangerous and extreme bill that would renege on the agreement they made with President Biden a few months ago and demand steep funding cuts to healthcare, housing, education – fundamental programs for middle-class America – as the price for keeping the government funded for a few more weeks. But here's the catch, Kevin McCarthy doesn't have the votes for his own bill. The House Republicans are so unconcerned about inflicting the harm from the government shutdown that with only 10 days to go, they decided to go home and do nothing for five days. Kevin McCarthy needs to take his responsibilities seriously and forge a bipartisan deal just as the Senate has been doing. Let me be clear: House and Senate Democrats will not vote for any short-term funding bill that cuts critical resources for those who need them most, but Kevin McCarthy is more than happy to let MAGA extremists attack American families and businesses. House Republicans are failing Americans. What we need to avoid a shutdown is a bipartisan solution, and I'm working with my colleagues to find one. But the latest antics from the MAGA wing of the Republican Party are standing in the way. These games are dangerous, reckless, and hurting our communities. The budget deadline is September 30, and we're hurtling towards it. Right now, MAGA extremists are holding our country hostage to satisfy their extremist fever dreams of decimating Social Security and Medicare, tossing low-income children out of daycare centers, and, of course, restricting abortion access. Democrats are working towards a deal to fund the government. There's too much at stake to be playing chicken, and a government shutdown will only hurt hard-working Americans. Congress needs common sense, not shenanigans. Onward! Peter, this last Thursday, House Republicans failed once again to put a defense bill to the floor because of the extreme rights’ partisan demands. So once again we are facing a possible government shutdown at the hands of House Republicans. Government funding is set to expire at the end of the month — less than 7 days away — and the GOP has called it a week without any plan to avoid it in sight. It’s this kind of blatant prioritizing of their own personal agenda over anything else from Republicans that makes my blood boil. [This leadership is not only ineffective, it could severely affect families in this district and across the country. We need representatives who will work to put people first instead of their own political interests — will you chip in to elect one for TX-15?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_xJ1HY-ZI85xDaGFJS4UtYmvR5olC0bFUxeqJ2ka2coW05uqPK58XoRvqV2w4BtCd9fSXk4Jcf9NZi92BVAsK7OiGilkYjt8S8hGIEYVVdrjVgrfH6dcGza3hPfPxvjustOi_GPCSn6PEUQUSXn1AVbHGFVCbE-86Z5Pr10kIHXrHhx5KaRZX510GpSVoomYctrAZPkEbfB-moEy_wJQAuwChzDLlWJD-MsMsq8bdSuliN3HlZbDAgPssCchyLWbfUR4frkNfGc98yvaGHO0qbdhdJaVJAZOPCDvrEWFRfxjr56uH6xwg1jC_ls9R1TnMj1DD6LzsCS8kc98HFhUgLQ/3zu/hnIAa3-IQlmYtXpjYpzhjA/h1/0Zm6fJLqwBeU2lq7aqM5kvOGXnz9TpTuC2KPJlW5K3U) **[Donate »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_xJ1HY-ZI85xDaGFJS4UtYmvR5olC0bFUxeqJ2ka2coV8iWT1o5HogAec-0AagQcHhGGl3XgasxcpR5UYFQHUDQGUfh68tArLLw-Uvz6mMTrq2fDJaWssZ2S9y0QP8X4ipRloKKcSNzOzjCn7gbGeeJc9FobzMllcUqZxHoHEx84EPicK95-IDSGTzJ-osCPDi7ul88wOEmVBKfW2LDdfvfYDbbtLQERBWivAkLpwnz88ZkKjNirGZA0G1nOxSm1I-BLCiTivX4d7h4z6WCHmdEs0LnUIU_nDZk9ABrTtbn6vXvCSOED0kout6l5OkgfCcVMbs0VyorbKgCr-F7eD5w/3zu/hnIAa3-IQlmYtXpjYpzhjA/h2/FfD_Jj8j4TdTzTmGmktgVEWE0l8oucoWiKwc-AzgZCM)** If the government shuts down, countless federal agencies and services will be put on hold. **Food assistance delivered through SNAP, access to the Head Start preschool program for over 10,000 kids, emergency disaster response, and so much more could be CRITICALLY affected.** So much is at stake, yet Republicans continue to play political games with OUR livelihoods. It’s unacceptable — and it’s time for a change in leadership. [**Peter, I promise to fight to protect the well-being of the American people first and foremost. But to get to Washington where I can do just that, I need your support. Will you chip in right now to help push this campaign?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_xJ1HY-ZI85xDaGFJS4UtYmvR5olC0bFUxeqJ2ka2coWkvgy9FHczz5p2EOUYc5kAOVNG0z0RmyEHGn5fxRMrkbGQBs0LuHIex1u6NDLR8MNewpzS9HFCxJpm4jnPDRFnk8-p8J8WIS1MuAxAQs0EmQZfNdUnn3fZh7pJcfGWBGNkUAuyIK8bfF5i_7xjUGNyVX0kZ-c-hYIGwZ4Ovmf4hVsPLz_c-IuM7gNFdRvkJRp1xYx0a7bhd54Nwz_jHI7d-LLMo6t34sLvfb5kTRoFxrlxrGN0d7LHlPJmLdG-blePE0OCdPqHbW-lY0aLcwyNJ-JQWXieou6ArPkii8xYjg/3zu/hnIAa3-IQlmYtXpjYpzhjA/h3/B4yTTZ2y_RfZ6UFvojE68bhE4T1LHdHKOScMUCWXsMA) ¡Vamos Por Quince! name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: No one thought I’d win
body:
I wasn’t going to let a wack-job represent my hometown, so I ran for Congress and won. | | **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70232530/428720896/944795007?&refcode=E4236-20230923-MarieSurrogate-Image-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmODc3NDA2LTJhNWEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=v0wR5wlFxurMPoMK5fzRwLWuQmvtl4Nh0CvlY3MQmtM=)** Hey Peter, My name’s Marie and I don’t look like your average Congressperson. For one, I’m a woman, a mother, the daughter of an immigrant, and in my thirties. Not to mention that I own an auto repair shop with my husband. You’re probably not shocked that a lot of people didn’t think I’d flip Washington State’s third district. Well, I did. **Like a lot of the Blue Dogs, I took on an extremist election denier and I won.** [**Now, I’m a co-chair of the Blue Dogs and my story is why I’m asking you to chip in and help us defeat the most extreme Republicans across the country.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70232531/428720897/944795007?&refcode=E4236-20230923-MarieSurrogate-SL-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmODc3NDA2LTJhNWEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=v0wR5wlFxurMPoMK5fzRwLWuQmvtl4Nh0CvlY3MQmtM=) [CHIP IN TODAY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70232532/428720898/944795007?&refcode=E4236-20230923-MarieSurrogate-SB-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmODc3NDA2LTJhNWEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=v0wR5wlFxurMPoMK5fzRwLWuQmvtl4Nh0CvlY3MQmtM=) The guy I beat was not only an election denier and conspiracy theorist, he also put a known member of the hate-group the Proud Boys on his staff (yes, those Proud Boys... the ones who stormed the Capitol). name: Tiernan Donohue
subject: Reaching out on our new opponent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
I know I can count on this team, but...
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=728%2E552475%2E-QQQ2r)
Hi Peter,
The stakes of our race just changed in a big way and we need this team now more than ever. **Mitch McConnell’s hand-picked candidate just entered the race to flip PA red, and major news outlets are reporting this could be the****most****expensive Senate race in the country.**
**[I’m asking everyone: Can you pitch in any amount toward the $75,000 we need to raise to take on our new mega-millionaire GOP opponent David McCormick?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230923-1?refcode=em20230923-1&refcode2=728_552475_-QQQ2r&akid=728%2E552475%2E-QQQ2r)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230923-1?refcode=em20230923-1&refcode2=728_552475_-QQQ2r&akid=728%2E552475%2E-QQQ2r)**
To build the campaign we’ll need to win, it will take all of us working together to compete against the millions upon millions of dollars that we expect national Republicans, Mitch McConnell, and David McCormick to spend against us.
Last cycle, Pennsylvania saw more than $381 million in spending on the Senate race. This cycle against mega-millionaire David McCormick that number could skyrocket.
Pennsylvania deserves someone in the Senate fighting for our working families...not to mention a *real* Pennsylvanian. That’s why we need your support.
**[So please, Peter, support Bob Casey’s campaign for Senate with a contribution today. If we raise $75,000 in these crucial days after his launch, we’ll be able to stand up to McCormick and make sure he can’t buy this Senate seat.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230923-1?refcode=em20230923-1&refcode2=728_552475_-QQQ2r&akid=728%2E552475%2E-QQQ2r)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230923-1?refcode=em20230923-1&refcode2=728_552475_-QQQ2r&akid=728%2E552475%2E-QQQ2r)**
We couldn’t do this without you — so thanks for being on our team.
Tiernan
Campaign Manager, Bob Casey for Senate

clean_body: I know I can count on this team, but... Hi Peter, The stakes of our race just changed in a big way and we need this team now more than ever. Mitch McConnell’s hand-picked candidate just entered the race to flip PA red, and major news outlets are reporting this could be themostexpensive Senate race in the country. To build the campaign we’ll need to win, it will take all of us working together to compete against the millions upon millions of dollars that we expect national Republicans, Mitch McConnell, and David McCormick to spend against us. Last cycle, Pennsylvania saw more than $381 million in spending on the Senate race. This cycle against mega-millionaire David McCormick that number could skyrocket. Pennsylvania deserves someone in the Senate fighting for our working families...not to mention a real Pennsylvanian. That’s why we need your support. body:
I have one gun to giveaway. You have less than a week to enter!
[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=f3bdb638fc5a4855bddad6aaae8f011d&_t=xNQvuxDO8D98jUD8edm-SL35cVdKqj1Nb-3LoF6L43YJOsNQlJCF4nZzoE3u_qsK9xD4OjWNwz6DAUpE6Rrgfb2PH8KEo2k_Hf798nhHNeE%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=f3bdb638fc5a4855bddad6aaae8f011d&_t=xNQvuxDO8D98jUD8edm-SL35cVdKqj1Nb-3LoF6L43YJOsNQlJCF4nZzoE3u_qsK9xD4OjWNwz6DAUpE6Rrgfb2PH8KEo2k_Hf798nhHNeE%3D)

| **_“An armed man is a citizen; an unarmed man is a victim.”_
- Allen West**
* * *

Peter,
**_
It’s time for me to give away another gun!_**

If you recall, I held a similar raffle back in June and gave away my favorite BTE-USA Taner Carbine AR-15. That raffle raised a considerable amount of money for my campaign at a time when we really needed an infusion of cash.

With the announcement that my race is about to get a bit more crowded, **we’re once again in need.** So, I’ve decided to raffle off a cool gun – _**one of my favorites**_ – a Kimber 1911 stainless II!

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f3bdb638fc5a4855bddad6aaae8f011d&_e=DU_avJIwaOCbEQpCD7hvcvtF3NlO6I0wXzDtTaKYnylI9xIX6iiGNqs6-lDQVrpmtLadSOtX3WA83kPTM2ksppRDxHtAEO_5esMpimKdFaGLTS5g73YTwa6rca8qjrcrro0b7ojQmoXmRpjW0Tite3v5OoyIZ6REVlUuVxoffWLQmGhcxMzNuITvVxh5ZJ37faZ9ZniBev4F2D9C36tcXeDua6K_0oYtCqcrkEbG8GlkMcFJtkoNhgEaoBlRGDvGQYQZsWVZX2PvKJkcgq5ttOtfzj-gLZZRQbY4U0ITfjZ6oP_-l5_a_AsHbDCfc0gtoDxZ95k7_0sIMjJuINL-IXBzhK3J8GvnT8jY2pQmKnqqaohCBa9h_c-iOwoZA2oi8xpiFggkljTVvRZAF9WPTQ%3D%3D)
Have you ever wanted to own a handgun used by an American Sheriff? Well, **[now is your chance.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f3bdb638fc5a4855bddad6aaae8f011d&_e=DU_avJIwaOCbEQpCD7hvcvtF3NlO6I0wXzDtTaKYnylI9xIX6iiGNqs6-lDQVrpmtLadSOtX3WA83kPTM2ksppRDxHtAEO_5esMpimKdFaGLTS5g73YTwa6rca8qjrcrro0b7ojQmoXmRpjW0Tite3v5OoyIZ6REVlUuVxoffWLQmGhcxMzNuITvVxh5ZJ37faZ9ZniBev4F2D9C36tcXeDua6K_0oYtCqcrkEbG8GlkMcFJtkoNhgEaoBlRGDvG2vXvVJrobXiqZefAN9UTzDxWzOhkv24GsLr1Mmcp0CBsI1JO7Kf9DaAFrx7WXlFOWaGyUF8IC72KDpVKfSRt9WSMEBacSLuiJIj8e9mpluUjH_WXX0o2SKqBNEBcMCydO04kf-H69C5sIxE5xGR1mw%3D%3D)**

Some of you reading this right now might be asking yourselves, “Why are you giving away a beautiful handgun with a 5.25” barrel and rosewood grip?”

It’s simple: **[The $9.11 donation that I’m asking you to make right now](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f3bdb638fc5a4855bddad6aaae8f011d&_e=DU_avJIwaOCbEQpCD7hvcvtF3NlO6I0wXzDtTaKYnylI9xIX6iiGNqs6-lDQVrpmtLadSOtX3WA83kPTM2ksppRDxHtAEO_5esMpimKdFaGLTS5g73YTwa6rca8qjrcrro0b7ojQmoXmRpjW0Tite3v5OoyIZ6REVlUuVxoffWLQmGhcxMzNuITvVxh5ZJ37faZ9ZniBev4F2D9C36tcXeDua6K_0oYtCqcrkEbG8GlkMcFJtkoNhgEaoBlRGDvGYPR6YdUt72_HwwEDisRQjdMkukQj-E11XdX6T2OYS6MfZ92nj_Te5_E8l3eB1YZTJZDh3PFSoWYvXK-y3caW3DRntqxlXKw-5Ev7po61Z_yEV4tR3-HDf58r4GLWbiShml5ilBr1W-W3mD0fUPpJkg%3D%3D)** for a chance to win this American-made handgun will help my U.S. Senate campaign become bullet-proof come Election Day 2024.

**Donate $9.11 right now and you could win a handgun valued at $1,021! With the barrier to entry that low, how can you afford not to enter? **

[**ENTER FOR YOUR CHANCE TO WIN TODAY »**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f3bdb638fc5a4855bddad6aaae8f011d&_e=DU_avJIwaOCbEQpCD7hvcvtF3NlO6I0wXzDtTaKYnylI9xIX6iiGNqs6-lDQVrpmtLadSOtX3WA83kPTM2ksppRDxHtAEO_5esMpimKdFaGLTS5g73YTwa6rca8qjrcrro0b7ojQmoXmRpjW0Tite3v5OoyIZ6REVlUuVxoffWLQmGhcxMzNuITvVxh5ZJ37faZ9ZniBev4F2D9C36tcXeDua6K_0oYtCqcrkEbG8GlkMcFJtkoNhgEaoBlRGDvGbgft72hRNxtmZ1PfbkVFNsGb2md82vnPwmy4z3mwYp6Y88-DkD39xwM3qZNe3zdF7OvM2GK9A2_L5ODUSMzPYYzr4tKurWz6vW0sdrf8sy0mbqKYm6B6m_7DV4bZNTZQIuSC_23N7hYcfoPl5aSzDg%3D%3D) [**CHIP IN $9.11
ENTER THE RAFFLE »**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f3bdb638fc5a4855bddad6aaae8f011d&_e=DU_avJIwaOCbEQpCD7hvcvtF3NlO6I0wXzDtTaKYnylI9xIX6iiGNqs6-lDQVrpmtLadSOtX3WA83kPTM2ksppRDxHtAEO_5esMpimKdFaGLTS5g73YTwa6rca8qjrcrro0b7ojQmoXmRpjW0Tite3v5OoyIZ6REVlUuVxoffWLQmGhcxMzNuITvVxh5ZJ37faZ9ZniBev4F2D9C36tcXeDua6K_0oYtCqcrkEbG8GlkMcFJtkoNhgEaoBlRGDvGvKOy1StMR_jnZJIXTy7ZyF4pjH2SvTiJTiGUzoaaWYveh6woMzp55dB9dt_0kdz_yzXS6TToDuCNGXk9FMl8paWdkZRtUOyPbPKRYme3BNEINZsFyQdi04oPltDZqhEmURu5T8Qgtw2IkJtyD9FRXw%3D%3D)
As the top law enforcement official in Arizona’s third largest county and candidate for the U.S. Senate, I believe it’s my responsibility to show the Left that most gun owners are responsible, law-abiding citizens.

Responsible gun owners pay their taxes on time.

Responsible gun owners use their Second Amendment right to protect themselves and those they love from those who would wish harm upon them.

Responsible gun owners obey the law.

Raffling off my Kimber 1911 not only gives me the opportunity to connect with other gun enthusiasts like you, but it also opens another avenue in which to **[secure your support for my Republican U.S. Senate campaign.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f3bdb638fc5a4855bddad6aaae8f011d&_e=DU_avJIwaOCbEQpCD7hvcvtF3NlO6I0wXzDtTaKYnylI9xIX6iiGNqs6-lDQVrpmtLadSOtX3WA83kPTM2ksppRDxHtAEO_5esMpimKdFaGLTS5g73YTwa6rca8qjrcrro0b7ojQmoXmRpjW0Tite3v5OoyIZ6REVlUuVxoffWLQmGhcxMzNuITvVxh5ZJ37faZ9ZniBev4F2D9C36tcXeDua6K_0oYtCqcrkEbG8GlkMcFJtkoNhgEaoBlRGDvGkeWuhHYWs3EGq7DLU1IoY09F4o_7IEpWEcIXvmcF1Xwz22jedgOTEZvNTCHg7cN8NmsPCyqmbjkUSVL1xRhkuhbRajr_cb-hfwm-5SpOFiEBOum-BadHAxQoEVQrtr_619IsJWfDJwIRrpWCpUnExg%3D%3D)**

**This contest, like my campaign, is likely to get hot! So, don’t wait to make a donation of $9.11 now which guarantees you entry into the raffle.**

If you want my gun, then you’ll need to make sure you enter by 11:59 p.m. on September 30th. So don’t wait – if you’re reading this right now, **[enter this very moment!](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f3bdb638fc5a4855bddad6aaae8f011d&_e=DU_avJIwaOCbEQpCD7hvcvtF3NlO6I0wXzDtTaKYnylI9xIX6iiGNqs6-lDQVrpmtLadSOtX3WA83kPTM2ksppRDxHtAEO_5esMpimKdFaGLTS5g73YTwa6rca8qjrcrro0b7ojQmoXmRpjW0Tite3v5OoyIZ6REVlUuVxoffWLQmGhcxMzNuITvVxh5ZJ37faZ9ZniBev4F2D9C36tcXeDua6K_0oYtCqcrkEbG8GlkMcFJtkoNhgEaoBlRGDvGbd9uvaQGp3O5v6PmLYtt2BjvcbjYWSatvZpLPiOnn-pJ3MTmy1JMouyA8xEv81Vzwgeq5LrVuvboVdenuHTorwSWM1IWQ52tLi0akjcCZL-oqYXomxylK0xHCVDToJZnRzskqH74yFF8XS9rrGPtsQ%3D%3D)**

[**CHIP IN $9.11 »**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f3bdb638fc5a4855bddad6aaae8f011d&_e=DU_avJIwaOCbEQpCD7hvcvtF3NlO6I0wXzDtTaKYnylI9xIX6iiGNqs6-lDQVrpmtLadSOtX3WA83kPTM2ksppRDxHtAEO_5esMpimKdFaGLTS5g73YTwa6rca8qjrcrro0b7ojQmoXmRpjW0Tite3v5OoyIZ6REVlUuVxoffWLQmGhcxMzNuITvVxh5ZJ37faZ9ZniBev4F2D9C36tcXeDua6K_0oYtCqcrkEbG8GlkMcFJtkoNhgEaoBlRGDvGNEIAQShGz1MsTDOi4Xuuhavyuljvq6W4yWWMPL2SCJCZsqpEwma_AXVNqB51GYYCLvT9EZ_NTDflF08MrOqj0VijWKqXBopzRDC60Ddza7a02ideuQHNOhzSJ7VSi13HslAtxpJzkJ4g0ObyXU5z4Q%3D%3D)

Good luck - and thank you!
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f3bdb638fc5a4855bddad6aaae8f011d&_e=DU_avJIwaOCbEQpCD7hvcvtF3NlO6I0wXzDtTaKYnylI9xIX6iiGNqs6-lDQVrpmtLadSOtX3WA83kPTM2ksppRDxHtAEO_5esMpimKdFaGLTS5g73YTwa6rca8qjrcrro0b7ojQmoXmRpjW0Tite3v5OoyIZ6REVlUuVxoffWLQmGhcxMzNuITvVxh5ZJ37faZ9ZniBev4F2D9C36tcXeDua6K_0oYtCqcrkEbG8GlkMcFJtkoNhgEaoBlRGDvGehvZC-ANrS2HmDdW-sjUy2-rxfN7SkFJoipVgzTM0_KLomhRnucHgXicpRsTcJ65qpMeONschTcxeuv4vTQ_75Snwk_Ic90F9-EpDBIL_Q1PUlKqN69X49q40k_uGAGwF9ASlIi3T2rizq9jqdEqiA%3D%3D)

If you recall, I held a similar raffle back in June and gave away my favorite BTE-USA Taner Carbine AR-15. That raffle raised a considerable amount of money for my campaign at a time when we really needed an infusion of cash. With the announcement that my race is about to get a bit more crowded, we’re once again in need. So, I’ve decided to raffle off a cool gun – one of my favorites – a Kimber 1911 stainless II! Have you ever wanted to own a handgun used by an American Sheriff? Well, Some of you reading this right now might be asking yourselves, “Why are you giving away a beautiful handgun with a 5.25” barrel and rosewood grip?” It’s simple: for a chance to win this American-made handgun will help my U.S. Senate campaign become bullet-proof come Election Day 2024. Donate $9.11 right now and you could win a handgun valued at $1,021! With the barrier to entry that low, how can you afford not to enter? As the top law enforcement official in Arizona’s third largest county and candidate for the U.S. Senate, I believe it’s my responsibility to show the Left that most gun owners are responsible, law-abiding citizens. Responsible gun owners pay their taxes on time. Responsible gun owners use their Second Amendment right to protect themselves and those they love from those who would wish harm upon them. Responsible gun owners obey the law. Raffling off my Kimber 1911 not only gives me the opportunity to connect with other gun enthusiasts like you, but it also opens another avenue in which to This contest, like my campaign, is likely to get hot! So, don’t wait to make a donation of $9.11 now which guarantees you entry into the raffle. If you want my gun, then you’ll need to make sure you enter by 11:59 p.m. on September 30th. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Act now to protect bears and the planet in honor of National Public Lands Day
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend, ** | **Fight back against trophy hunting and Big Industry attacks on bears, their cubs, and our planet. Donate $27 today before National Public Lands Day ends!** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007639?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007640?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007641?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007642?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
One bullet. It takes just one bullet to kill a mama bear. One bullet to leave her orphaned cubs struggling, starving, and unable to fight off predators. One bullet to completely decimate an entire bear family. Our country’s bears are under attack. As they prepare for winter hibernation this fall, it could be their last. **[This National Public Lands Day, protect mama bears, their cubs, and the planet: Make a $27 contribution to Friends of the Earth and help us reach our $60,000 goal by midnight tonight!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007643?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
Maryland already DOUBLED the bear slaughter last hunting season. 103 black bears were killed in the state. Pennsylvania could see similar increases. That would be devastating given that last year, 3,659 black bears were killed in the state. But clearly, this is not enough for trophy hunters. They want to push the massacre to new heights.
Trophy hunters in the Northern Rockies are chomping at the bit to remove ESA protections for iconic grizzly bears. They’ve made numerous attempts to delist them. This would allow them to ruthlessly murder them during the hunting season, and they show no signs of letting up. We can’t let them get away with this, Friend.
| **PUBLIC LANDS DAY SUPPORTER RECORD**
---
**EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com**
**MATCH EXPIRING: **11:59 p.m. on September 23rd
**PUBLIC LANDS DAY GOAL: ****FALLING SHORT ** **SUPPORTERS FROM YOUR AREA NEEDED: 10 MORE **
| | [MAKE MY GIFT NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007644?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Records reflect most recent available data. 11:59 p.m. deadline._
---
**We need to act fast to protect grizzlies. Protect vulnerable species and our planet with a $27 donation before National Public Lands Day ends at midnight! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007639?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007640?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007641?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007642?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
It’s bad enough that bloodthirsty trophy hunters want to MURDER innocent bears for fun. But their cruelty means extreme danger for the next generation of cubs. **Bear cubs rely on their mothers for at least two full years. If these mama bears are killed, their babies will be ORPHANED. They’ll be left to starve, freeze, or become easy prey for other predators. If that happens, the future of this iconic species will be lost. **
We can’t afford for trophy hunters to keep decimating bear families like this. Grizzly bears and their vital habitats are already in a dire situation. At their peak, they numbered 50,000. But by 1975, reckless human activity -- hunting, trapping, and habitat loss -- already decimated bear populations. Their numbers dropped to 1,000 individuals in the lower 48 states. **Now, they occupy just 2% of their original range! **
I know these numbers are shocking, Friend. But still, the pro-hunting lobby and their anti-environment allies are working overtime to strip these endangered animals of essential legal protections. The Endangered Species Act provides critical protection for America’s iconic animal species. These protections are some of our most effective safeguards in the fight to protect our public lands and curb catastrophic climate change.
**Without these protections in place, trophy hunters could brutally kill bears without consequence. What’s more, destructive industries like Big Oil, logging, and factory farming could swoop in and wreak havoc on endangered species’ habitats. That means losing some of the last pristine wilderness we have left.**
**National Public Lands Day is the perfect time to stand up for bears and the planet before the damage is too great. Donate $27 now! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007639?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007640?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007641?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007642?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
You may be wondering why it matters if bears are lost forever. Well, the fact is that bears are intelligent creatures, Friend, and they hold a critical place in our ecosystems. They enhance biodiversity, enrich soils, regulate prey populations, and transport nutrients through vast swaths of wilderness. **And now, by simply existing, they’re standing between massive corporate pollution and a sustainable future for our planet. **
For the sake of our wildlife and the future of our planet, we can’t let Big Polluters and their cronies in Congress destroy our public lands and wipe out our endangered species.
At Friends of the Earth, we are using every tool available to protect endangered species and our planet -- not Big Industry’s profits. We know how to fight and win, and that’s exactly what we plan to do. Today is National Public Lands Day, and we are asking you to stand with us as we continue this work with your membership gift today.
**We must protect our bears for all our sakes, but there’s not a minute to lose.** We all need to raise our voices in defense of vulnerable species. Together, we have the power to stop these killings, defend wildlife and protect vital species before we lose them for good. We’ve set an ambitious goal to raise $60,000 to fuel our work to save bears, their lands, and the planet. But National Public Lands Day ends tonight at midnight. And we won’t reach our goal without your help. Make your $27 contribution now, before this opportunity expires and we lose any more bears.
**Join the fight to protect bears, endangered species, and our planet. Donate $27 in honor of National Public Lands Day now! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007639?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007640?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007641?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007642?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia
Senior fossil fuels and lands campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**

name: Sepi Shyne
subject: Mahsa Amini's life will not be lost in vain.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEPI SHYNE FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr]
Friend,

Last Saturday, on the one-year anniversary of Mahsa Amini's murder by the Iranian "morality police," I joined activists throughout the district to reflect on her life and renew our calls for justice and human rights in Iran. On Monday, we presented a Proclamation to the Iranian American Women Foundation for their tireless advocacy on behalf of Iranian American women and proclaimed September 18th as Mahsa Amini Day in West Hollywood.

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/103922/images/Sepi%20Proclamation%20.jpeg]

Mahsa's life will not be forgotten. Her name has already become a symbol, fueling the fight for gender equality around the world.

The courage of the women and girls at the forefront of the #WomanLifeFreedom movement inspires us all to stand up for human rights, no matter the opposition. I am proud to stand in solidarity with them.

With gratitude,

— Mayor Sepi Shyne
#WomanLifeFreedom
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/103922/images/Copy%20of%20Sepi%20high%20res%20headshot-min.jpg]
Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today.
Will you join Sepi's team and support her for Congress?
Contribute Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=cba5d86a-2b5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73]
GIVE Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=cba5d86a-2b5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73]
PAID FOR BY SEPI SHYNE FOR CONGRESS
Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/sqaIzVkaz0K_jaO3jvOJ8Q2?unsubscribedata=XWS82LnIsEv41cMv9q2i9CmEjp%2BuzzsC6PcIBPl9DUPJQvJhNyizdVPiNDxomW92LMUryWQuet84n%2FL1CCAX%2B6PC7w32lUfB9pOFwFkPY0O%2F1dPa4R%2BjTQCyoKmVKcrRoj2L6pEBWNXgPqPXEeXFP%2Bq8M8CoBFz3%2F4n%2BkblbaO1QPNhBWbNROlpFMUZmX8CpSGzXm70i3sEPbwOKVP85305FCiReW8WwTQTG1uwhgCTRR6NqYQ7vaZREC7aWEgFIpMCTEZogLgzKgxJ2f59SVPKSNsGQnyubsu2ctjNKTN0YoOxlKbosI9fN%2B853rYwnZ6%2Byp4Jgz0xyzFrcWbimLWndLdnC2%2FxctUOu4Y24rf3UXq%2F%2FXvBcnPMhbugg567c4TfjObQkAC34voF1rg%2BAnV8yImsJ%2BnFaFbRX4uuxW%2FuptXSUtELcs%2FoPiFVe4xEf] . Sepi Shyne For Congress

[] Mahsa's life will not be forgotten. Her name has already become a symbol, fueling the fight for gender equality around the world. The courage of the women and girls at the forefront of the #WomanLifeFreedom movement inspires us all to stand up for human rights, no matter the opposition. I am proud to stand in solidarity with them. With gratitude, — Mayor Sepi Shyne #WomanLifeFreedom [] Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today. Will you join Sepi's team and support her for Congress? Contribute Now [] GIVE Monthly [] PAID FOR BY SEPI SHYNE FOR CONGRESS Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [] . Sepi Shyne For Congress 8149 Santa Monica Blvd #280 West Hollywood, CA 90046 United States

We’re not a bad, racist, or evil country like the Democrats say we are: we’re a country where ANYONE can succeed if they work hard and have faith. Hung and his family came to this country with little besides the clothes on their back after escaping Vietnam. clean_body: | | | Peter, We’re going to be honest: this has to be the best month yet for Team Cao. It’s our campaign’s FIRST end-of-quarter deadline, and these are some of the most important benchmarks in this race. We’re not going to lie, it won’t be easy. If we’re going to stay in this race until the end, we need to make sure we CRUSH every single goal from now until Election Day. That’s where you come in. Our campaign is fueled by generous donors like you, and as we move into our end-of-quarter push, we need your help. Right now, Hung is public enemy #1 for Virginia Democrats. They can’t stand him because he’s proof that their hateful narratives about America are wrong. We’re not a bad, racist, or evil country like the Democrats say we are: we’re a country where ANYONE can succeed if they work hard and have faith. Hung and his family came to this country with little besides the clothes on their back after escaping Vietnam. And even though he didn’t know a word of English when he came here, Hung did everything he could to work his way to the American Dream and went on to serve for 25 years as U.S. Navy Captain. He wasn’t oppressed. He didn’t succeed because of government intervention. He did it because he was strong, brave, and determined - just like the millions of Americans striving for that same dream today. Now, Hung’s striving for a new dream: U.S. Senator and he wants YOU to be a part of his team to do it. If we’re going to win, we need EVERY PATRIOT to step up and help us meet our critical end of quarter goal. We can’t do it without you. Thank You, Jacob Team Cao | TEXT HUNG TO 21412 Hung knows the American Dream is worth saving - because he’s lived it. Now, he’s running for Senate to defend it from the next generation. Hung Cao came to America with little besides the clothes on his back, and after his 25-year career in the Navy, he’s not done fighting for our future. body:
| We can’t leave anything to chance.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1217%2E35263%2E6-TSB2)
Hi, Peter. In a moment, **[I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my reelection campaign.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-sep23.1u6uGA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230923_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1217%2E35263%2E6-TSB2)** But first, I want to answer some questions you might have: _Why is it so important I donate? Why today?_ Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is just one week away. After we close the books, our team will begin compiling a report detailing how much we’ve raised and how many folks have pitched in, and shortly after, that report will be made public. Everyone from potential GOP opponents to national Republicans will be watching our campaign fundraising closely. Any hiccups, slowdowns, or signs of trouble could open the door to a serious GOP challenger — and the flood of outside spending and GOP attacks that will come with it. **With not just one, but TWO right-wing mega-millionaires considering entering this race, we can’t afford to look weak.** That’s why I’m asking: **[Will you donate $5 ahead of our end-of-quarter deadline to help fend off Republican challengers and defend the Senate? name: David Hogg, Leaders We Deserve
subject: Badass young people have a habit of being underestimated →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Eppler for Congress
body:
This is the biggest thing we’ve ever been a part of.

| Hey — it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives.

The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain.

But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans.

**That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve** — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future.

[_**We can’t do this without you by our side. Will you become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Sam Eppler today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70234906/428729995/1484901689?refcode=BLU-SEC-20230923-z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNTEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTlhZDIyNGEtMmQ1YS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RWmMlc_rksL5AQs-cAZuypCq7baM6ogZconSxdT1bm4=)

I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change.

It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats.

Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office.

**Let’s prove them wrong.**

[_**That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you become a Founding Donor to Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation with Sam Eppler today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70234907/428729996/1484901689?refcode=BLU-SEC-20230923-z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNTEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTlhZDIyNGEtMmQ1YS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RWmMlc_rksL5AQs-cAZuypCq7baM6ogZconSxdT1bm4=)

Let’s do this,

David Hogg
Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=397dea31fdcd4966bca6f65804c4c7c3&_e=AQCJ4MJEV10-epd7n0aeJiQrr8tCRK4TdSP_SrUIelk2VetBMw6qfrSG-uZsPak5jmIZZ6TlEdyW29I0Ipi-SyK98lkj__juK_UK-RXQNVz2dvUGJEflKb3vvSAO-F-uuLeCHHtIOywNVn6C8OZZR2vs1qcZZ22d9p9sIThdruNpgqMBrmcmq6RhEMyrrMkLFvRAi-yh8zoKe51Nb96fjaIEasd8kLJCCI9n8DM41RUIeCE0cTNxHgOe1l1s9k5_PmXbs7qY_PGSEp7Pa7gIaEHlYLQUgVa3fgruOLLf-GNX_UBOu-ot4JouhQIj5VBvTwhvLiXJQm3Ipq5uQuEK-cTCadtk54GrSD7K-cauw3z2NHgWv48y_AA0Y0eNtH3mHNxnvUWRPwg9AM0aZ5SOY1MDesheyCtfu9pDGZt6kbA%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
