Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 %%profilecenterurl%% %%subscriptioncenterurl%%

name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: URGENT: new GOP opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Big news, friends: Mitch McConnell's hand-picked candidate just launched his campaign for Pennsylvania's Senate seat. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
McConnell has already said he’s targeting Pennsylvania, and this entrance to the race all but ensures that national Republicans are going to flood our state with an unprecedented amount of outside money to run attack ads against me.
In fact, Mitch McConnell already promised this candidate super PAC support.
Republicans are committed to doing in 2024 what they almost did in 2022 and 2020 – flip Pennsylvania. Senate control could come down to our race, so we need to respond right away.
This is a make-or-break moment, and we need all hands on deck to fight back. We need to raise $75,000 to prepare for the incoming attacks – can I count on you to split a donation between Kirsten Gillibrand and my campaign now? [http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_bobcasey?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Bob Casey and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_bobcasey?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_bobcasey?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_bobcasey?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_bobcasey?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
With the presidential race at the top of the ticket in 2024, Pennsylvania will be a key battleground and could see more political spending than any other state. Plus, we know this opponent could self-fund this race and outspend us – on top of the immense super PAC and national Republican establishment support Mitch McConnell has promised him. If you've been waiting for the right time to support our campaign, this is it. We can't let ourselves be outspent, so will you chip in whatever you can to Kirsten Gillibrand and my campaign to help us raise early resources and compete? [http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_bobcasey?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
Thank you for being on our team, Bob Casey
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]

subject: EagleAI: a new potential voter suppression tool from extremists in Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
Let’s talk about a concerning new tool that extremists are using to further suppress the right to vote. It’s called EagleAI. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70236303/428734598/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230923_f_eagleai_v1s2_nor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTRhNzQxZS0zMjVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vMTdGjg4dKEKpXaVV9FvrswUpWKtvM-Nv575TXulv7U=&emci=beecca10-7159-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=414a741e-325a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | We’re here to talk about EagleAI: a new tool that extremists are potentially deploying to further suppress the freedom to vote in Georgia. **Here’s some background:** Last month, _The Atlanta Journal-Constitution_ and _NBC News_ reported that far-right extremists are weaponizing this new private software as a potential tool for ramping up mass voter challenges — and they’re currently seeking contracts with Georgia election officials. EagleAI markets itself as a program that can comb through voter rolls and other public databases and flag any alleged “discrepancies” for elections officials, enabling them to make it easy to challenge voters’ registrations. To make matters worse, it has been reported that Jason Frazier, an election-denying conspiracy theorist who has challenged nearly 10,000 Georgians’ voter registrations, was involved in the software’s development. **Here’s why it’s an issue: **This is yet another extremist attempt to silence the voices of voters ahead of critical election cycles. We haven’t forgotten the efforts to challenge more than 360,000 Georgia voters before the 2021 Senate runoffs. Since then, with the passage of SB 202 in 2021, we’ve continued to see a staggering number of mass voter challenges filed — amounting to 1 in every 70 Georgians. So far, the overwhelming majority have been dismissed due to faulty evidence. Experts say that EagleAI does not offer improvements on existing bipartisan tools that help states maintain their voter rolls, and will open the door for thousands more erroneous voter registration challenges. It will also require elections officials to take time away from their vital roles in running elections to investigate these unfounded challenges **Here’s what we’re doing about it:** We’re fighting back against extremists’ nationwide strategy to make administering elections more difficult and intimidate voters. No matter the hurdles we face from these extremists, Fair Fight will remain steadfast in our commitment to help voters stay registered, access the ballot box, and ensure their votes are counted. Thank you,
The Fair Fight Team

subject: Joe Biden’s biggest blunders
body:
| | | Peter,
---
Joe Biden is trying to make a mockery of our military.

From teaching our soldiers critical race theory instead of critical thinking, polluting recruits with woke gender ideology, and letting our enemies win in Afghanistan, the Left is leaving our soldiers behind at the risk of national security.

**_Enough is enough._**

**We put together a petition to keep woke OUT of our military, and we need every patriot to sign on.**

**If you’re sick of woke in the military, sign our “NO MORE WOKE” petition today!**

body:
Taking back the Senate is riding on the support of everyday Americans, not liberal mega-donors. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=e806d33a565b4129ad371824f60d5f09&_t=gFhQ75RnD0vSJttEIPPqZn4A4JXybdNyOpu8U9ODy24fdizZcttMKe4deu3zOlJVud_hMj2-g_Yp0M4qqj3sa2Y2HUxayA0S_D0PgpB04o0%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=e806d33a565b4129ad371824f60d5f09&_t=gFhQ75RnD0vSJttEIPPqZn4A4JXybdNyOpu8U9ODy24fdizZcttMKe4deu3zOlJVud_hMj2-g_Yp0M4qqj3sa2Y2HUxayA0S_D0PgpB04o0%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e806d33a565b4129ad371824f60d5f09&_e=YAFeZUGxEUNVV6bRaD1KWQK_mO3IBi9Ya14s7zsOoTiX0FbiIc0Lt4VUZIixLLVCPA_uCnI5NwC1rzB6qQe68OQ1Qx9tZ41kQfhc_pwUK7_wY1aWGElY-v_-TU1DsfKOROoV2Idg8tTM_nxrfiT84V4KXul6kcypPygW_9l36LWUqks9ysfkfwLcb7mhK-uJkxYCsNAkyhC9Afzyzeih-ZvD-BZTJj3GPf8gtcPAdzwsMVAFtldeD2b7cJS95AmYarivk3O56_cLq7IZEYPRX9m_OIeZJjOsHOLPYDyguLZ_Ws4zWhGnPJirAfiUZQ2nWxItUml3DBPjMDKlw7PmJ35tULSqYabwkiVESJ5pPNfbRvioHPrSy6oC6j6Cb57ZTbflNkpxzcXnLj8FZppWoybWer7yYgWDn4Dsw3DB1hA%3D)
---
Fellow conservative,

We have to take back the Senate in 2024 and restore the American Dream. The path back to the majority runs right through Ohio, where Sherrod Brown holds one of the most vulnerable Senate seats in the nation.

Thankfully, we have a true, conservative fighter running in Ohio: **Bernie Moreno**.

Sherrod Brown’s campaign is funded with dark money from liberal mega-donors who will stop at NOTHING to defeat Republicans and crush the American Dream. [**Ohio is a must win state if we want to take back the Senate in 2024 and Bernie needs your help to hit his Quarter Three Deadline.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e806d33a565b4129ad371824f60d5f09&_e=YAFeZUGxEUNVV6bRaD1KWQK_mO3IBi9Ya14s7zsOoTiX0FbiIc0Lt4VUZIixLLVCPA_uCnI5NwC1rzB6qQe68OQ1Qx9tZ41kQfhc_pwUK7_wY1aWGElY-v_-TU1DsfKOROoV2Idg8tTM_nxrfiT84V4KXul6kcypPygW_9l36LWUqks9ysfkfwLcb7mhK-uJkxYCsNAkyhC9Afzyzeih-ZvD-BZTJj3GPf8gtcPAdzwsMVAFtldeD2b7cJS95AmYGvgbPXAOfUERVUn00kqUCkusCNOqX1j_dskwSKTgcJJthZqI4CZfCEgXvPPdBsB3TdK1yjITFreBJRvt-J9_yrsHWdSovd2LSdgaCqhm7GKG5s4QKL9TAUoGA01OGEJHZywjjSRru8ICFUA9FQ_BMIvZ9Vhxfzx0_yTqVOxHVJQ%3D)

If Bernie can’t meet his Q3 fundraising goal, Sherrod Brown will keep Ohio blue and ensure that we lose the Senate majority in November, something that the American Dream would never recover from.

You see – we’ve identified that taking back the Senate hinges on Bernie winning Ohio in 2024. Friend, You've seen it at the pump. You've seen it on your electric bill. You've seen it at the store. Prices are skyrocketing across the country because Joe Biden has pushed a radical agenda, working to convince you that climate change is a national emergency. What Biden has done to our energy sector is reckless. He shut down pipelines and bowed down to the radical woke mob, costing Americans thousands of jobs and kneecapping our sovereignty. Democrat Governors like Newsom and Hochul are shoving costly environmental standards down the throats of Americans--from banning gas stoves, to imposing ESG mandates on businesses, to even trying to enforce electric vehicle mandates that shut down their power grids. The direction these policies will lead our country down is unsustainable and I am running for President to rip them up. It's time for us to _**RESTORE AMERICAN ENERGY DOMINANCE!**_

* **_Unleash oil and gas exploration and development to crush inflation and bring thousands of jobs back to hardworking families. _**
* **_Revitalize our nuclear energy industry. _**
* **_Refuse to be beholden to foreign interests by withdrawing from Paris Climate Accords, Global Methane Pledge, and all "Net Zero" commitments. _**
* _**Greenlight American energy exports to strengthen global stability and end energy poverty. **_

**_The American people cannot wait any longer. We are wasting our potential as a nation and our security, strength, and success all depend on us coming together now to win this critical election._** I need your help, Friend. Our energy dominance as a country hinges on our success as a campaign. I am the only candidate in this race who has what it takes to reverse the decline. _**This is mission critical.**_

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.

* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

clean_body: I will reverse American decline by reversing Biden’s America last energy agenda, eliminating reliance on hostile nations for energy, and putting the economic interests of Americans before the radical Left’s ideological agenda. | | | | | | | | | | Friend, You've seen it at the pump. You've seen it on your electric bill. You've seen it at the store. Prices are skyrocketing across the country because Joe Biden has pushed a radical agenda, working to convince you that climate change is a national emergency. What Biden has done to our energy sector is reckless. He shut down pipelines and bowed down to the radical woke mob, costing Americans thousands of jobs and kneecapping our sovereignty. Democrat Governors like Newsom and Hochul are shoving costly environmental standards down the throats of Americans--from banning gas stoves, to imposing ESG mandates on businesses, to even trying to enforce electric vehicle mandates that shut down their power grids. The direction these policies will lead our country down is unsustainable and I am running for President to rip them up. It's time for us to RESTORE AMERICAN ENERGY DOMINANCE! | | | I can promise you this, under my plan, we will: Unleash oil and gas exploration and development to crush inflation and bring thousands of jobs back to hardworking families. Revitalize our nuclear energy industry. Refuse to be beholden to foreign interests by withdrawing from Paris Climate Accords, Global Methane Pledge, and all "Net Zero" commitments. Greenlight American energy exports to strengthen global stability and end energy poverty. The American people cannot wait any longer. We are wasting our potential as a nation and our security, strength, and success all depend on us coming together now to win this critical election. I need your help, Friend. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Do you know the story of the DCCC blacklist?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, do you know
the story of the DCCC blacklist?

In 2018, AOC had defeated the 4th most powerful Democrat in the House and
corporate Democrats were reeling.

The DCCC went to extreme lengths to stop progressives like AOC from ever
winning again. They blacklisted any vendors that supported primary
challengers to Democratic incumbents, to weaken our movement.

The DCCC wanted to block working-class progressives like AOC from critical
campaign resources and technology. Of course, they had no issue using
corporate-friendly firms that bust unions, work with Big Oil, and even
lobby for the GOP’s right-wing agenda.

It’s not right,
Peter. The DCCC ended the
blacklist after it became a PR nightmare, but they laid the groundwork for
groups like AIPAC and the Moderate PAC that want to take down our
candidates.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138332?refcode=em20230923-30982&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=30982%2E1203867%2ERCjvnt ]In order to change the Democratic Party, we have to weather their
ongoing attacks and get our candidates elected. Can you chip in
$3 so we can fight the status quo, overcome the odds, and
expand the Squad?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138332?refcode=em20230923-30982&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=30982%2E1203867%2ERCjvnt ]Contribute $3

We’re not like the DCCC.

1. We don’t take a cent from corporate PACs. Our candidates’ and our own
work are 100% grassroots-funded.
2. We don’t work with “Democratic” firms associated with union busting,
corporate America, or the GOP.
3. Our strategy pays off — we have elected Justice Democrats and grown
the Squad every cycle, while the last Chair of the DCCC lost the seat
to a Republican.

Corporate Democrats take money from Wall Street, Big Oil, Big Pharma,
payday loan companies, and union-busters. It’s clear: Justice Democrats
will fight for the people, the Democratic establishment will work for
their corporate donors.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138332?refcode=em20230923-30982&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=30982%2E1203867%2ERCjvnt ]Peter,
we’re determined to keep winning against
the Democratic establishment and its Wall Street-backed candidates. Will
you chip in to help power our work so we can elect more Justice Democrats?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, do you know the story of the DCCC blacklist? In 2018, AOC had defeated the 4th most powerful Democrat in the House and corporate Democrats were reeling. The DCCC went to extreme lengths to stop progressives like AOC from ever winning again. They blacklisted any vendors that supported primary challengers to Democratic incumbents, to weaken our movement. The DCCC wanted to block working-class progressives like AOC from critical campaign resources and technology. Of course, they had no issue using corporate-friendly firms that bust unions, work with Big Oil, and even lobby for the GOP’s right-wing agenda. It’s not right, Peter. The DCCC ended the blacklist after it became a PR nightmare, but they laid the groundwork for groups like AIPAC and the Moderate PAC that want to take down our candidates. [ ]In order to change the Democratic Party, we have to weather their ongoing attacks and get our candidates elected. Can you chip in $3 so we can fight the status quo, overcome the odds, and expand the Squad? [ ]Contribute $3 We’re not like the DCCC. 1. We don’t take a cent from corporate PACs. Our candidates’ and our own work are 100% grassroots-funded. 2. We don’t work with “Democratic” firms associated with union busting, corporate America, or the GOP. 3. Our strategy pays off — we have elected Justice Democrats and grown the Squad every cycle, while the last Chair of the DCCC lost the seat to a Republican. Corporate Democrats take money from Wall Street, Big Oil, Big Pharma, payday loan companies, and union-busters. It’s clear: Justice Democrats will fight for the people, the Democratic establishment will work for their corporate donors. [ ]Peter, we’re determined to keep winning against the Democratic establishment and its Wall Street-backed candidates. Will you chip in to help power our work so we can elect more Justice Democrats? In solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Cori Bush
subject: RE: Rashida and I are defending the right to protest.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
We’re speaking out about the attacks on #StopCopCity activists. | |
---
Peter, Rep. Rashida Tlaib and I are speaking out about attacks on our right to protest, which we’re seeing escalate with a shocking crackdown on #StopCopCity activists. In recent months, Georgia officials have charged over 100 nonviolent activists with domestic terrorism and racketeering. And a SWAT team violently arrested people who’d been acting within their rights to coordinate a bail fund. **This is massive government overreach to silence dissent and criminalize protest. We cannot allow it.** **But Rashida Tlaib and I are some of the only national lawmakers speaking out about this.** We’re calling for accountability and justice for Tortuguita, the #StopCopCity activist who was murdered by police. And we’re defending activists’ First Amendment rights to free speech and assembly. We also need to overhaul our systems of public safety, because there shouldn’t be more money going toward militarizing the police in the first place (which is the plan for Cop City). In Congress, Rashida and I are leading the push for policy solutions to keep our communities safe from police violence. name: Tony Evers
subject: extreme Republicans want to end fair elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek,

One week from today, I'll face my first end-of-quarter fundraising
deadline since Republicans escalated their war on American democracy by
illegally attempting to fire Wisconsin's elections administrator.

It's one thing to disagree about the issues, but this attack on fair
elections isn't a partisan disagreement; it's a full frontal assault on
fair elections.

Wisconsin will be the closest state in the country in 2024. Republicans
have proven that they’ll threaten anyone who stands in the way of their
pursuit of political power at all costs.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2146?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20230923_FR_eoq_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_eoq.1.1&t=1001&akid=6390%2E1827488%2E9vMlGX ]Derek, that's
why I need your help before my critical end-of-quarter fundraising
deadline one week from today. Can I count on you to rush a donation to
help us counter Republican attacks on fair elections before it's too late?
Whoever wins Wisconsin will likely be the next president, and we can't
afford to fall short of our $85,412 budget goal.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will process immediately.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2147?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20230923_FR_eoq_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_eoq.1.1&t=1002&akid=6390%2E1827488%2E9vMlGX ]Donate $10 Now

With extreme Republicans not even trying to hide their plan to destroy
fair elections and end abortion rights, there is zero margin for error in
Wisconsin.

If only a few votes per precinct went the other way in 2020, we might be
deep into a second Trump Administration.

Here's what another Trump presidency would mean: the end of abortion
rights, the "termination" of the Constitution (his words), the

opponents, the end of the Department of Education, and more.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2146?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20230923_FR_eoq_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_eoq.1.1&t=1008&akid=6390%2E1827488%2E9vMlGX ]That's why we can't afford to miss our end-of-quarter budget deadline.

Thank you for being a massive part of those wins and stepping up to be

Fellow American,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70237951/428739765/1169064008?refcode=230923_SAP_DMP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODNiNjY4MC0zNDVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vlhHZIhRwb6oPLATKqtljsg9GW11oNvTSxxv-y3hh5o=) Hi, there, it's Debbie. I just had a meeting with my campaign team, and I wanted to get a note out to you about where things stand right now. It’s important. At the end of this month, our campaign will face its first public FEC reporting deadline. Everybody from Rick Scott to Mitch McConnell to political pundits will be looking to see what we’ve raised. **They’ll use it to judge the strength of our campaign.** Unfortunately, we’re pacing about $6,112 short of where we should be at this point in the month. [**I simply cannot fall short on the first big test of our campaign, so will you split $20 between my campaign and Serve America to help get us back on track so we can defeat Rick Scott?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70237955/428739767/1377474255?refcode=230923_SAP_DMP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODNiNjY4MC0zNDVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vlhHZIhRwb6oPLATKqtljsg9GW11oNvTSxxv-y3hh5o=) We cannot afford to fall behind so early on in the election cycle. My opponent Rick Scott is one of the richest senators in the country, so he's more than capable of self-funding his campaign. In fact, he’s already poured millions into his campaign, and last time around, he spent $64 MILLION of his own fortune to buy this seat. Look, team, I’ve already fought opponents like Rick Scott and beat them. I’m not afraid to face him or anybody that doesn’t put Florida first — especially as he continues to get rich while taking away our rights, abusing our government, and raising costs for families. No más. We’re going to do something about it. We’re going to win. But winning will take staying ahead of our grassroots goals, especially when Rick Scott can cut himself a massive check at any moment. [**That’s why I’m asking, friends: Please help me make up this gap by splitting $20 or whatever you can between Serve America and me to fight back against Rick Scott, win in Florida, and expand our Senate majority.** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70237956/428739771/1377474255?refcode=230923_SAP_DMP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODNiNjY4MC0zNDVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vlhHZIhRwb6oPLATKqtljsg9GW11oNvTSxxv-y3hh5o=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70237957/428739772/1169064008?refcode=230923_SAP_DMP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODNiNjY4MC0zNDVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vlhHZIhRwb6oPLATKqtljsg9GW11oNvTSxxv-y3hh5o=)
Thank you so much for your support,
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell

body:
Why these numbers matter
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70237978/428739852/-2024045026?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTEwMWQwZC0zNTVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mS5i7KYAYUkSDMychURqZ5LL_PhoDwm75mauucCs_0Q=&emci=07e95108-6f59-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=91101d0d-355a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=29359352)

| | Hey Peter, You may have noticed: it's the Federal Election Commission deadline season, and this is the first time Lynn will be reporting her congressional campaign fundraising numbers. These numbers matter. **Dollars raised don't just determine what we can do on the campaign trail and how many voters we can reach out to — but they serve as a proxy metric for the viability of the campaign in the early phases.** It's a little silly, but it's critically important we finish Lynn's first quarter on the campaign trail with a bang. It's a little silly, but it's critically important we finish Lynn's first quarter on the campaign trail with a bang. name: Team Pramila
subject: No Labels plan to undermine President Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
2024 will be here before we know it.
#
Peter, you have to know the latest on the corporate-funded plan to deliver the White House back to Donald Trump in 2024.
This information is _crucial_ to our ability to mobilize at any moment to protect Democrats at the polls next year.
**Remember No Labels?** It’s an organization funded by big corporations that is hellbent on running a third-party candidate against Joe Biden — which would pave the way for a second term for Donald Trump.
**Now here’s the latest:** News reports are saying No Labels is currently vetting potential candidates to run as the spoiler candidate in their scheme. Their list of potential anti-Biden candidates includes Republican Senator Bill Cassidy, Andrew Yang, and even Joe Manchin. They are readying their plans to put this spoiler on the ballot in multiple states.
2024 will be here before we know it, Peter, and we’re sure to see even more attempts from powerful special interests to sway our elections and undermine our progress. **We cannot allow No Labels to succeed in undermining Joe Biden and paving the way for a second term for Trump.**
Pramila is working overtime to ensure that No Labels is exposed for the fraudulent organization it truly is **— but she needs our support to keep up our movement's momentum in order to fight back.**
**[Can we count on you to chip in $3 or whatever you’re able to give today to power our movement and ensure that we can continue running a successful and revolutionary progressive campaign?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/45652?refcode=em20230923-2962&t=1&akid=2962%2E420207%2Elx7HZ-)**
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/45652?refcode=em20230923-2962&t=20&akid=2962%2E420207%2Elx7HZ-)**
Together,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230923-2962-footer&t=21&refcode2=2962_420207_lx7HZ-&akid=2962%2E420207%2Elx7HZ-)**

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Barbara Boxer
subject: Peter, will you join Will and me for lunch?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Will Rollins for Congress
body:
Peter,

My favorite part about being in the Senate was getting to meet people all over the state of California and learn about their lives, passions, and the things they wanted to see from our government.

Public service is about the people, and that's a big reason why I'm so excited about Will's campaign. He's putting our community front and center in his campaign -- meeting with hundreds (if not thousands) of voters across the 41st District.We'd both love to hear from you too, Peter, and I was delighted when Will's team asked me to sit down for lunch in the district with one of his supporters.

What do you say, Peter? Would you like to grab lunch with me and Will? A donation of any amount gets your name entered into the contest, but act now because we're only accepting entries for a limited time! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wr-boxerlunch-2023?refcode=em-9.23.23-all-a]

name: Callie Barr
subject: A quick reality check regarding schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70238359/428741003/1742851123?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20230923_fr_Sschools_cand_sm_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGM4N2U0ZGQtMzY1YS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8SCXSxkuVmHuYx1SBnBsrbDcQwNF6rUfUQvVIYbVOHQ=)
---
Dear Peter, We are over two weeks into the school year - and, as a former teacher and mom of school age kids- I want to take time today to be grateful for our teachers who, while making less than their peers, and carrying thousands of dollars in student loan debt, continue to mold futures and shape our communities. Vilified and politicized, our teachers continue to **show up.** No, our Michigan public school teachers are not trying to "sexualize" our students, or brainwash them into some weird conspiracy agenda. Our Michigan teachers are teaching our kids math, science, history, literature, and band. They are teaching our kids critical thinking, compassion, and understanding. **And, they are teaching them that we, as an American society, are great- not despite our differences- but because of them.** [It’s time to ban Bergman, not books. Let’s make progress on the issues that matter; chip in $20 and help me restore common sense in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70238360/428741004/1742851123?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20230923_fr_Sschools_cand_sm_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGM4N2U0ZGQtMzY1YS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8SCXSxkuVmHuYx1SBnBsrbDcQwNF6rUfUQvVIYbVOHQ=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Dear Peter, We are over two weeks into the school year - and, as a former teacher and mom of school age kids- I want to take time today to be grateful for our teachers who, while making less than their peers, and carrying thousands of dollars in student loan debt, continue to mold futures and shape our communities. Vilified and politicized, our teachers continue to show up. No, our Michigan public school teachers are not trying to "sexualize" our students, or brainwash them into some weird conspiracy agenda. Our Michigan teachers are teaching our kids math, science, history, literature, and band. They are teaching our kids critical thinking, compassion, and understanding. And, they are teaching them that we, as an American society, are great- not despite our differences- but because of them. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Tuebor, Callie Callie Barr Candidate for Congress in Michigan's First District | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70238409/428741462/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWQ4N2U0ZGQtMzY1YS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sIA4S9f-rNrksPbk0xPuoF06EZG68n6degSD3OKCqgQ=) Friend, we're proud to bring you this update:

**Laura has been endorsed by the Center for Biological Diversity Action Fund!** This is one of the largest national organizations fighting for progressive environmental agenda in the country. And they recognize Laura is the environmental leader we need: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70238411/428741465/-1241314520?refcode=em-9.23.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWQ4N2U0ZGQtMzY1YS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sIA4S9f-rNrksPbk0xPuoF06EZG68n6degSD3OKCqgQ=) _“**Laura Friedman has been an extraordinary leader on virtually every environmental issue in California and will on day one become one of Congress’ true environmental champions.** We couldn’t be prouder to endorse her._ _Friedman understands that saving wildlife and addressing the extinction crisis go hand in hand with stopping the climate crisis and creating environmental justice.**No other candidate in this race comes anywhere close to her.** ”_ Needless to say, we agree. [That’s why we’re asking for your support ahead of our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline to help make sure we have the most accomplished environmental champion in Congress. name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! Progressive leaders rally behind Barbara Lee for Senate, standing with UAW, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: BIG NEWS! Barbara Lee for Senate! | Progressives Rally for
Barbara Lee | Victory! Raise the Wage Chicago | Standing with UAW | &
MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9759?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1011&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ]It’s only because of our grassroots supporters that we’re able to
organize — and win. Please chip in to our Progressive Power Fund to make
sure we hit the ground running in 2024!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9759?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1012&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1013&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

The 2024 election season is officially underway, and the progressive
movement will be pivotal to defeating Trump and the GOP, taking back the
House, and sending more allies to Bernie Sanders in the Senate to partner
with our movement for change.

That’s why Our Revolution kicked things off in a BIG way this week with
our first major endorsement for 2024 — Barbara Lee to be the next U.S.
Senator from California!

Progressive leaders and the grassroots are rallying behind Barbara, who
joined us for our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9760?t=1014&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ]LIVE Town Hall event on Tuesday with U.S. Reps. Ro
Khanna, Cori Bush, Mark Pocan and Ayanna Pressley, Minnesota AG Keith
Ellison!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9762?t=1015&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ]READ ALL ABOUT IT IN THE NATION

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1016&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

ELECTING A PROGRESSIVE ICON TO THE SENATE

“At the end of the day, Barbara Lee is the movement candidate,” Our
Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9762?t=1017&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ]The Nation’s John
Nichols in an exclusive interview about our endorsement.

She’s a lifelong organizer who has been in the trenches with working
people from Day 1.

Representative Lee has been ranked the most progressive member of the US
House, she’s been one of the most effective progressives in the country,
and she has stood for what’s right even when she’s had to stand alone.

Many remember Barbara Lee’s lone vote against the War in Afghanistan, and
she has been a constant voice for people, peace, and the planet throughout
her life and career.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1018&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

Barbara Lee comes from the working class and she would be the only black
woman in the Senate. Her lived experience fuels her fight for single moms,
abortion rights, economic justice, and more.

“When I’m elected I’m going to fight like you all are fighting - with this
movement behind me - to expand voting rights, push for ambitious climate
change policy, put a cap on corporate monopolies, and finally to pass
Medicare for All,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9761?t=1019&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ]she told us Tuesday.

Rep. Lee was an original cosponsor of Medicare for All and the first to
introduce a single payer healthcare bill in California. She was also one
of the first climate champions — working to end taxpayer-funded giveaways
to Big Oil and pledging to not take money from the fossil fuels industry.
In fact, she’s not taking any corporate PAC money!

Barbara has worked closely with Bernie Sanders for many years — and he
needs her as a partner in the Senate. Together, they co-founded the
Congressional Progressive Caucus and, just recently, introduced a bill to
tax the wealthy.

She was among the first to the Fight for $15 and a Union, joining Bernie
and Keith Ellison on the picket lines with workers when no one else would
stand with them — and she is still fighting alongside labor in California.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/barbaralee_orgteam_2309/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1020&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ]SIGN UP TO ORGANIZE WITH BARBARA LEE

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1021&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

“Barbara Lee is the perfect candidate. It’s not just about a voting record
and checking the boxes for Medicare for All and a Green New Deal. It’s
about understanding movement politics, the sacrifices and the struggles,”
said Ro Khanna. “Barbara Lee has that link to history — from Nelson
Mandela to Shirley Chisolm — and she’s not afraid to take a stand when
it’s not popular.”

Ro said Barbara can win this thing, but she will need the grassroots army
that Bernie had in California and beyond.

“I know if we organize, if we get out the vote on social media, on calls,
knocking doors. If we do all of the things Our Revolution is going to do,
Barbara can win,” Ro Khanna said. “We’re going to make history, we’re
going to put a true icon in the US Senate, I’m honored to co-chair her
campaign, as honored as I was to co-chair Bernie Sanders’ campaign.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9760?t=1022&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ]WATCH OUR FULL TOWN HALL WITH BARBARA LEE HERE

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1023&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

Barbara Lee has been a leader in setting the agenda for our movement, she
has been marching with us in the streets and she’s been mentoring movement
leaders in Congress.

“I find myself almost daily asking 'what would Barbara Lee do?' and I plan
to move with the same foresight, accountability, and commitment to
community that has guided not only her time in public office but truly her
life’s work,” said Rep. Ayanna Pressley. “She will be California’s
senator, but she’ll be all of our senator. She will be the people’s
senator!”

Rep. Cori Bush told us that when she first entered Congress, Barbara Lee
was right there to welcome and guide her — even speaking on her behalf
when others tried to keep her off of the Judiciary Committee. “Barbara Lee
truly speaks for me,” Cori said.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1024&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

Rep. Mark Pocan spoke of Barbara’s long history of supporting LGBTQ rights
and fighting to deliver legislation for HIV/AIDS in California.

“The Senate needs Barbara Lee,” said Pocan. “If you want to transform the
Senate, make it more progressive, and give Bernie a real partner in the
Senate, we need to elect Barbara Lee.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1025&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

“This is the thing about Barbara Lee: integrity, honesty, sincerity and
unshakeable faith in standing up for what’s right and never backing down,”
Minnesota AG Keith Ellison testified at the town hall. “Barbara Lee is,
hands down, the best choice. No doubt.”

Progressive movement leaders are in Barbara Lee’s corner and the
grassroots are, too. In order to win this and defeat the big money trying
to buy this seat, we’ve got to organize.

That’s why Our Revolution is “swinging its network of grassroots activists
and a list of more than 1.1 million California supporters behind the
campaign that the Congresswoman identifies as ‘a march for justice for
all,’” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9762?t=1026&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ]The Nation reports.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/barbaralee_orgteam_2309/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1027&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

We invite you to join our fast-growing organizing team - Progressives for
Barbara Lee. Hundreds have already signed up, and there are lots of
different ways you can get involved and help.

You can be part of this team from anywhere in the country — making calls,
sharing out on social media, and more. If you're in California, you can
help by knocking doors or reaching out to friends - even hosting or
attending a house party!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/barbaralee_orgteam_2309/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1028&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ]Join Our Revolution’s Progressives for Barbara Lee organizing team.
Let's make this a people-powered campaign and send Barbara Lee to the
Senate.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1029&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

Our Revolution worked hard to get out the vote for Wendell Gilliard for
State Senate in South Carolina, but the establishment and big developers
helped his opponent win the runoff by just 11 votes.

This election is likely to go to a recount, but this shows the importance
of investing in organizing and making sure we reach every voter to get out
to the polls on election day.

State Rep. Gilliard was a 2020 campaign co-chair for Bernie, and like
Bernie, he has been a powerful champion of working people for decades. We
will continue partnering with him in the fights to come!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9759?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1030&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ]Donate now to our 2024 Progressive Power Fund to make sure we have the
resources to defeat Trump and the GOP, flip the House and elect
progressives like Barbara Lee to the Senate!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1031&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

Our Revolution members weighed in and we are endorsing an exciting slate
of progressive champions in Duluth, MN!

We’re organizing to elect these three amazing women: Miranda Pacheco and
Jenna Yeakle for City Council At-Large and Wendy Durrwachter for City
Council District 1.

These candidates have a real shot at winning and building a strong
progressive bloc of local power in Minnesota, and we can’t let an
opportunity like this pass us by!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1032&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

Our Revolution is endorsing progressive grassroots organizer Leah Perkel
for City Council in Vancouver, WA (Position 6)!

Leah is an Our Revolution member and a former Bernie delegate. She has
firsthand experience with medical debt resulting from our lousy private
health insurance system, and she wants to be an agent of change to help
create healthier people and communities.

Leah will stand up to the big money interests and be a voice for the
people on affordable housing, the environment, equity, and more. She has
also been endorsed by OneAmerica, founded by US Rep. Pramila Jayapal.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9759?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1033&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1034&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

VICTORY! Mayor Brandon Johnson on Monday delivered on his campaign promise
to eliminate the “subminimum wage” for tipped workers!

The new law calls for tipped workers — currently paid 60% of Chicago’s
minimum wage — to receive 8% annual increases beginning next July until
they reach 100% parity in 2028, the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9767?t=1035&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ]Chicago Sun-Times reports.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1036&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

In July, Mayor Brandon Johnson joined us to serve up food to restaurant
workers and raise awareness in this fight. Our own members submitted
testimony directly, and we just won!

Our Revolution organizers also testified at a hearing in Montgomery
County, MD this week to build pressure for the tipped wage bill voters
overwhelmingly supported to be implemented without letting restaurants
shift the burden to diners under the guise of “service charges.”

And, stay tuned! In Ohio and Arizona, Our Revolution has teams canvassing
for signatures for petition drives that will put a $20+ MINIMUM WAGE
directly on the ballot in 2024.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9721?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1037&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ]Our movement is critical to advancing policies to address the many
crises facing our country. If you’re not already a monthly member of Our
Revolution, sign up today!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1038&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

“This strike is an opportunity for the President to say to the Big Three,
‘You’re incredibly profitable, we’re going to invest in you, but the
return on investment we need to see is for working class Americans,’” Our
Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9768?t=1039&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ]The Hill this
week.

“Failure to do so risks losing working class voters. They either sit it
out or they vote for a Donald Trump-like figure who won his election by
promising to champion the deindustrialized Midwest,” Joseph said.

Joseph represented Our Revolution to speak at the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9769?t=1040&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ]LIVE Solidarity
Summer Rally with UAW last week with United Auto Workers President Sean
Fain, Working Families Party, and a powerful coalition of progressive
organizations supporting the striking workers.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1041&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

Bernie Sanders, Barbara Lee, Ayanna Pressley, and many more of our
progressive allies also joined United Auto Workers on the picket lines
this week, calling for a fair contract with pay, benefits, and working
conditions that reflect their worth and their humanity. We are proud to
stand in solidarity with workers today and every day.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1042&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

Our Revolution is waging a massive campaign with activists around the
country to End Medical Debt — and we just won a great first step from the
White House.

Thanks to pressure from organizers and a growing coalition of medical debt
activists around the country, the Biden administration is taking the first
steps toward removing medical bills from people’s credit scores, which
could improve ratings for millions.

The proposal would also prevent creditors from using medical bills when
deciding on loans and stop debt collectors from using credit ratings to
pressure people with health care-related debt, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9770?t=1043&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ]The Associated Press
reports.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9759?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1044&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/OR_townhall_leesf_2310/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1045&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

Barbara Lee will be in-person at Our Revolution’s Education for All Town
Hall in San Francisco on Tuesday, Oct. 2nd. If you’re nearby, sign up to
join us!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/OR_townhall_leesf_2310/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1046&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/OR_townhall_leekhanna_2310/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1047&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

Barbara Lee will be joined by Ro Khanna at Our Revolution’s LIVE End
Fossil Fuels Town Hall on Oct. 17th. Reps. Lee and Khanna have worked
together to fight for climate action, and now they’re working to keep oil
drilling out of backyards of schools, hospitals, nursing homes and more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/OR_townhall_leekhanna_2310/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1048&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/OR_Healthcare_TH_2310/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1049&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

Medicare for All, ending medical debt, lowering drug prices — Barbara Lee
and our progressive movement are fighting on many fronts for healthcare
justice.

Join Our Revolution’s LIVE Healthcare for All Town Hall with US Reps.
Barbara Lee, Pramila Jayapal, and Ro Khanna, and CA Assemblyman Ash Kalra.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/OR_Healthcare_TH_2310/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1050&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1051&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1052&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230923_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.efPIXA&t=1009&akid=4695%2E5885482%2EsWEkaw ]GIVE MONTHLY

Ro Khanna, Cori Bush, Mark Pocan and Ayanna Pressley, Minnesota AG Keith Ellison! [ ]READ ALL ABOUT IT IN THE NATION ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ELECTING A PROGRESSIVE ICON TO THE SENATE “At the end of the day, Barbara Lee is the movement candidate,” Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ ]The Nation’s John Nichols in an exclusive interview about our endorsement. She’s a lifelong organizer who has been in the trenches with working people from Day 1. Representative Lee has been ranked the most progressive member of the US House, she’s been one of the most effective progressives in the country, and she has stood for what’s right even when she’s had to stand alone. Many remember Barbara Lee’s lone vote against the War in Afghanistan, and she has been a constant voice for people, peace, and the planet throughout her life and career. [ ][IMG] Barbara Lee comes from the working class and she would be the only black woman in the Senate. Her lived experience fuels her fight for single moms, abortion rights, economic justice, and more. “When I’m elected I’m going to fight like you all are fighting - with this movement behind me - to expand voting rights, push for ambitious climate change policy, put a cap on corporate monopolies, and finally to pass Medicare for All,” [ ]she told us Tuesday. Rep. Lee was an original cosponsor of Medicare for All and the first to introduce a single payer healthcare bill in California. She was also one of the first climate champions — working to end taxpayer-funded giveaways to Big Oil and pledging to not take money from the fossil fuels industry. In fact, she’s not taking any corporate PAC money! Barbara has worked closely with Bernie Sanders for many years — and he needs her as a partner in the Senate. Together, they co-founded the Congressional Progressive Caucus and, just recently, introduced a bill to tax the wealthy. She was among the first to the Fight for $15 and a Union, joining Bernie and Keith Ellison on the picket lines with workers when no one else would stand with them — and she is still fighting alongside labor in California. If we do all of the things Our Revolution is going to do, Barbara can win,” Ro Khanna said. “We’re going to make history, we’re going to put a true icon in the US Senate, I’m honored to co-chair her campaign, as honored as I was to co-chair Bernie Sanders’ campaign.” [ ]WATCH OUR FULL TOWN HALL WITH BARBARA LEE HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Barbara Lee has been a leader in setting the agenda for our movement, she has been marching with us in the streets and she’s been mentoring movement leaders in Congress. “I find myself almost daily asking 'what would Barbara Lee do?' and I plan to move with the same foresight, accountability, and commitment to community that has guided not only her time in public office but truly her life’s work,” said Rep. Ayanna Pressley. “She will be California’s senator, but she’ll be all of our senator. She will be the people’s senator!” Rep. Cori Bush told us that when she first entered Congress, Barbara Lee was right there to welcome and guide her — even speaking on her behalf when others tried to keep her off of the Judiciary Committee. “Barbara Lee truly speaks for me,” Cori said. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Rep. No doubt.” Progressive movement leaders are in Barbara Lee’s corner and the grassroots are, too. In order to win this and defeat the big money trying to buy this seat, we’ve got to organize. I developed a keen nose for bullsh*t as an Army officer.
In the military when you are in uniform you always have to wear your hat (we call it a ‘cover’) when you are _outside_. I had a couple of soldiers who never seemed to be at their stations, but their covers were always there - implying they were somewhere inside the hangar and nearby.
It didn’t take long for me to check those covers out of curiosity, and wouldn’t you know they were brand-spanking-new and they were trying to pull one over on me while they walked around outside, with their first cover on and spare ones hanging inside.
So the next time they left those decoy covers at their desk, I soaked them in water and put them in the freezer for them to find. Safe to say, they stayed at their stations after that.
**Just like I could tell those soldiers were trying to see how much BS they could get away with – I can tell Brian Fitzpatrick is pulling the same bullsh*t with his fake claims of being a "moderate."**
A moderate doesn't block abortion freedom.
A moderate doesn't block our right to vote.
A moderate doesn't block gun safety.
A moderate doesn't enable extremists like Matt Gaetz and Marjorie Taylor Green.
**But freezing a few hats isn't going to get the job done this time. Nope, to teach Fitzpatrick a lesson, we have to get really tough – and kick him out of office.**
[We deserve honest leaders who will fight for Pennsylvanians — not the same old bullsh*t we’ve been handed for years from Fitzpatrick. Will you please contribute $10 to my campaign to flip PA-01 blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70238891/428742534/-1962024584?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20230923_fr_frozenhats_cand_mf_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzAzNDk1Ny0zODVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TWEZpBY29WAs358L3m2ZS9OZoQ7z1bYxs3XFC--FQH8=)

name: Mark Warner
subject: What do kindness, the harmonica, and optimism have in common?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Tim Kaine.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70239114/428743048/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmRmYTk2MS0zOTVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wi0VDbPdzgix5ZGmr4m6rHyvGEZYvWKNiwApJcqH5G0=&emci=f92bfe35-8859-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=abdfa961-395a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, I’ve had the honor of being Tim Kaine’s friend since we met at Harvard Law School in 1980. For over 40 years, I’ve watched him wholeheartedly serve Virginia, first as mayor of Richmond, then as my Lieutenant Governor, and later Governor, before serving together in the United States Senate. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70239115/428743049/-852698088?refcode=mw_em_230923_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmRmYTk2MS0zOTVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wi0VDbPdzgix5ZGmr4m6rHyvGEZYvWKNiwApJcqH5G0=) (We also make a pretty good band – here’s us jamming at the Floyd Country Store in VA) This means I’ve spent _a lot_ of time with Tim and gathered plenty of intel on him. So as I sat down to write this email __[**asking you to support Senator Kaine’s re-election campaign,**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70239116/428743050/-852698088?refcode=mw_em_230923_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmRmYTk2MS0zOTVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wi0VDbPdzgix5ZGmr4m6rHyvGEZYvWKNiwApJcqH5G0=)__ I found myself wondering exactly what I should say to you to assure you that Tim is the right choice to represent Virginia in Congress. And then it dawned on me: **I want to tell you the top 3 things that annoy me the most about Tim Kaine.** First off, Tim is way too nice! As a former civil rights attorney and missionary, he’s spent his entire career committed to social justice, being driven by the value of kindness and the belief that it can change peoples’ lives. And he’s a genuinely good guy on top of that. Second, he’s ridiculously good at playing the harmonica. Seriously, he carries them in his briefcase, just in case a jam session breaks out on the Senate floor. Third and finally, and I’ve said this before, he’s a deeply optimistic person. Sometimes I can be a glass half-empty kind of guy, but Tim’s always seems about 2⁄3 full. We need someone like Tim Kaine in the Senate. Tim’s value of kindness and decency is what drives his undying dedication to serving the people of Virginia. And in a Congress plagued by partisan division, Tim’s relentless optimism keeps him from giving up in the crucial fights to protect voting rights, safeguard a woman’s right to choose, and more. Now the harmonica... that one might not always translate to his work as a Senator, it’s just really great to watch. The thing is, Tim’s seat could very well determine if the GOP takes control in 2024. Republicans are working overtime to oust him next year and take back control of the Senate. **__[**So I’m asking you today if you can split a $5 donation between my campaign and Tim Kaine’s so we can send him, his kindness, impressive harmonica playing, and optimism back to the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70239117/428743051/-852698088?refcode=mw_em_230923_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmRmYTk2MS0zOTVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wi0VDbPdzgix5ZGmr4m6rHyvGEZYvWKNiwApJcqH5G0=)__** I know Tim very well, and I know he’s not done building a Virginia that works for all. **__[**Help re-elect Senator Kaine and defend our Democratic Senate majority by splitting a contribution today >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70239118/428743052/-852698088?refcode=mw_em_230923_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmRmYTk2MS0zOTVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wi0VDbPdzgix5ZGmr4m6rHyvGEZYvWKNiwApJcqH5G0=)__** Thank you, Mark ** ** clean_body: Tim Kaine. | | | Derek, I’ve had the honor of being Tim Kaine’s friend since we met at Harvard Law School in 1980. For over 40 years, I’ve watched him wholeheartedly serve Virginia, first as mayor of Richmond, then as my Lieutenant Governor, and later Governor, before serving together in the United States Senate. = (We also make a pretty good band – here’s us jamming at the Floyd Country Store in VA) This means I’ve spent a lot of time with Tim and gathered plenty of intel on him. So as I sat down to write this email = I found myself wondering exactly what I should say to you to assure you that Tim is the right choice to represent Virginia in Congress. And then it dawned on me: I want to tell you the top 3 things that annoy me the most about Tim Kaine. First off, Tim is way too nice! As a former civil rights attorney and missionary, he’s spent his entire career committed to social justice, being driven by the value of kindness and the belief that it can change peoples’ lives. And he’s a genuinely good guy on top of that. Second, he’s ridiculously good at playing the harmonica. Seriously, he carries them in his briefcase, just in case a jam session breaks out on the Senate floor. Third and finally, and I’ve said this before, he’s a deeply optimistic person. Sometimes I can be a glass half-empty kind of guy, but Tim’s always seems about 2⁄3 full. We need someone like Tim Kaine in the Senate. Tim’s value of kindness and decency is what drives his undying dedication to serving the people of Virginia. And in a Congress plagued by partisan division, Tim’s relentless optimism keeps him from giving up in the crucial fights to protect voting rights, safeguard a woman’s right to choose, and more. Now the harmonica... that one might not always translate to his work as a Senator, it’s just really great to watch. The thing is, Tim’s seat could very well determine if the GOP takes control in 2024. Republicans are working overtime to oust him next year and take back control of the Senate. = I know Tim very well, and I know he’s not done building a Virginia that works for all. = Thank you, Mark ******=**** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
