This week, the hard work continued during Nikki’s New Hampshire swing where she attended back-to-back events, met with hundreds of voters, and unveiled her economic freedom plan. With the second debate taking place in 4 DAYS and first-in-the-nation Iowa caucuses in 114 DAYS, Nikki isn’t slowing down for one second. Check out the highlights below: Nikki returned to the Granite State this weekend ahead of her second presidential debate this week. Her swing was nothing short of incredible as she met with voters who flooded into overflow rooms and were eager to hear what she had to say. During her trip she attended the Bedford County GOP breakfast, spoke at the Portsmouth Rotary Club meeting, hosted a packed town hall in Hampton, and capped off the week delivering a major policy speech in Manchester, NH. Nikki delivered a major policy speech where she slammed “Bidenomics” and unveiled her plan for economic freedom. Here’s a glimpse of Nikki’s plan to unlock American freedom: - Provide thousands of dollars in tax relief for every middle-class family. - Eliminate the federal gas tax to help families struggling with high gas prices. - Cut income tax rates for working families! - Veto any bill that doesn’t take us back to pre-COVID spending levels. - Send more power to the states. - If Congress fails to pass a budget on time, they will fail to get a paycheck. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=62e95a9853ed0437044b8c80dd3d36fcfac8d893c6399a6bb1d7485a680dc46d424cac998f9803a2729aaf8a6f4da30c78570b983e080b4d9685faffeb42c55d Will you join me today and help me save our country? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=62e95a9853ed0437044b8c80dd3d36fcfac8d893c6399a6bb1d7485a680dc46d424cac998f9803a2729aaf8a6f4da30c78570b983e080b4d9685faffeb42c55d DONATE Paid for by Nikki Haley for President. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=62e95a9853ed0437182a89bb031022ba04eb2527af28bc579d5f4082de932e600e52971485302d015754091085863f03055042b80888052f3ce5cb032e887e62 www.nikkihaley.com By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided from each of Nikki Haley for President, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, Team Stand For America, SFA Fund, Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. They need to get in a room, they need to figure it out.” CONTINUE READING >> If you haven’t followed Nikki Haley on social media yet, make sure to follow her for more of the latest updates! Facebook Twitter Instagram - Team Haley DONATE GET YOUR SHIRT VOLUNTEER More About Nikki Haley My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future. Will you join me today and help me save our country? DONATE Paid for by Nikki Haley for President. www.nikkihaley.com By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided from each of Nikki Haley for President, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, Team Stand For America, SFA Fund, Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply.

Our FEC fundraising deadline is coming up in just a few short days, and right now, we’re not on track to meet our goal.

This deadline is important to us for a number of reasons, but most importantly, it’s our first major deadline since we’ve had multiple extreme Republican challengers enter the race.

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Truly incredible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends, it’s been more than a year since the Supreme Court’s ruling in Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization - the ruling that overturned Roe v. Wade .
But that ruling didn’t just overturn Roe .
For so many of us, the Dobbs ruling overturned our lives and our futures. It shattered the way we think about our bodies and our rights.
And it transformed how many of us engage in the political process. We saw truly incredible passion and action last November in the midterm elections - a direct result of the anger and fear that the Dobbs ruling created. Thanks to that action and those votes, we kept Democratic control of the Senate and came pretty darn close to holding the House, despite predictions of a major red wave across the board.
Now - as we’re watching state legislatures enact brutal and extreme abortion bans around the country - is the time to hold onto that passion and action.
So I have to ask: Are you with me in the fight for reproductive freedom? Add your name to my petition today if I can count on your support in this battle. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/swGgRUanwkaCan87HlPqoQ2?contactdata=65ok/BPzHV9u4Om3G3HLzkkPiYLqL08iOWrg2UaNpTnpwQRf/Xz1B5bwIaEuqc89j/hjHOHDWbgEObvS7cp8lGBua8HAg0m3aEnHQgh+Dt2O3HQR0sNQoYaOO/45Rgvzo3p/NAXk/k+9BQ+AWBCy1Q==]
We may be over a year out from our next federal elections, but I can tell you that the folks who are trying to push extreme anti-choice and anti-abortion laws aren’t wasting a single moment of this time - so we can’t afford to, either.
I’m doing everything I can inside the House to fight for bodily autonomy and human rights - from pushing to codify Roe to reintroducing my reproductive and sexual health data privacy legislation, the My Body, My Data Act , which prevents our private data from being used against us.
But I need to know you’re by my side - not just next November, but right now .
Sign my petition to keep fighting for reproductive freedom and the right to access safe abortion care. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/swGgRUanwkaCan87HlPqoQ2?contactdata=65ok/BPzHV9u4Om3G3HLzkkPiYLqL08iOWrg2UaNpTnpwQRf/Xz1B5bwIaEuqc89j/hjHOHDWbgEObvS7cp8lGBua8HAg0m3aEnHQgh+Dt2O3HQR0sNQoYaOO/45Rgvzo3p/NAXk/k+9BQ+AWBCy1Q==]
Thank you so much.
-Sara
https://secure.ngpvan.com/XzSv_TfqL0OUElJPtqwRFw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/XzSv_TfqL0OUElJPtqwRFw2]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

subject: URGENT: WE NEED YOUR HELP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24
body:
We’re so close to making next week’s debate.
| | |
---
| | | [ ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=5cb23652e4&e=0be619cbaa)
---
|
# URGENT: WE NEED YOUR HELP
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Fellow Patriots, **_We are so close._** To qualify for next week’s GOP presidential debate in my home state of California, we need 3% in two national polls and 50,000 unique donors. **But I’ll be honest with you, just like I always am. To qualify, I’m going to need your help.** [**So I’m asking you to donate whatever you can - $5, $20, or even $50 dollars - so that I exceed the qualifying requirements and present our America First agenda to millions of Americans watching the debate. Can I count on you?**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=7ec8f0fef7&e=0be619cbaa) The American people want bold solutions to the crises we’re facing. If we don’t confront those problems and explain to voters how we’re going to solve them, we will lose this election. Your donation can change that. So I’m asking you to dig deep and give what you can to make sure that I make it on to that debate stage. Remember: I’m an independent conservative with a long record of standing up to the Radical Left. I have a plan to address our border crisis, to restore law and order, and to restore economic opportunity and prosperity. I won’t be intimidated by those who would push the myth of “systemic racism” to keep our great country divided. I will fight for you. [**We have an opportunity to bring about a new American Golden Age. Can I count on your support?**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=e164c4677b&e=0be619cbaa) Thanks,
Larry Elder
GOP Candidate for President
---
[P.S. This race, like so many before it, is filled with career politicians and billionaires. We’re so close to changing that! With your help, I can be the voice for **WE THE PEOPLE** in the next presidential debate, outlining common sense solutions that empower the American people to live in peace and prosperity. But, I can’t do it alone. What can you give **TODAY** to help me secure my spot on that stage? ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=b9389aea91&e=0be619cbaa)

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: Your right to vote is fundamental.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
Period.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70240844/428749035/-849459103?refcode=ea.da10f54e-3d5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.da10f54e-3d5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTEwZjU0ZS0zZDVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rPeXcIDXSjRtXwnMQw7vfe7_t8bxYXyun3OpnwDJMic=&emci=1d58c1b7-2b5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=da10f54e-3d5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)
---
Y'all, our democracy relies on YOU. _Each_ of you, in Tennessee and beyond, deserves a voice in our government. That’s how we make sure our leaders address the issues that matter to us. It shouldn’t matter what party you are. It shouldn’t matter where you live. It shouldn’t matter if you need to vote by mail or plan to go in person on Election Day. **Every eligible voter should get to have their say.** That shouldn’t be controversial, but radicals like Marsha Blackburn want to take that choice away from you. Instead of protecting voters’ rights, they’re lying about mass voter fraud — all so they can pass restrictive laws to keep some of us, like young people and people of color, from being heard at all. As your Senator, I’ll make it my mission to pass legislation that protects your fundamental rights. That means legislation like the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, which Democrats recently re-introduced in the House. **[Folks, I need you to show your support for critical voting rights protections. Add your name to my petition to demand leaders in Washington pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act before we head to the polls in 2024>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70240845/428749036/-1469620852?refcode=ea.da10f54e-3d5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.da10f54e-3d5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTEwZjU0ZS0zZDVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rPeXcIDXSjRtXwnMQw7vfe7_t8bxYXyun3OpnwDJMic=&emci=1d58c1b7-2b5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=da10f54e-3d5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70240846/428749037/-1469620852?refcode=ea.da10f54e-3d5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.da10f54e-3d5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTEwZjU0ZS0zZDVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rPeXcIDXSjRtXwnMQw7vfe7_t8bxYXyun3OpnwDJMic=&emci=1d58c1b7-2b5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=da10f54e-3d5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)

Thanks!
Gloria
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70240847/428749038/-1469620852?refcode=ea.da10f54e-3d5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.da10f54e-3d5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTEwZjU0ZS0zZDVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rPeXcIDXSjRtXwnMQw7vfe7_t8bxYXyun3OpnwDJMic=&emci=1d58c1b7-2b5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=da10f54e-3d5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)
| Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

[There’s a movement afoot for change — join us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70240848/428749039/-849459103?refcode=ea.da10f54e-3d5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.da10f54e-3d5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTEwZjU0ZS0zZDVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rPeXcIDXSjRtXwnMQw7vfe7_t8bxYXyun3OpnwDJMic=&emci=1d58c1b7-2b5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=da10f54e-3d5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483) | [**DONATE TODAY**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70240849/428749040/248091834?amount=25&refcode=ea.da10f54e-3d5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.da10f54e-3d5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTEwZjU0ZS0zZDVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rPeXcIDXSjRtXwnMQw7vfe7_t8bxYXyun3OpnwDJMic=)

clean_body: Period. | Y'all, our democracy relies on YOU. Each of you, in Tennessee and beyond, deserves a voice in our government. That’s how we make sure our leaders address the issues that matter to us. It shouldn’t matter what party you are. It shouldn’t matter where you live. It shouldn’t matter if you need to vote by mail or plan to go in person on Election Day. Every eligible voter should get to have their say. That shouldn’t be controversial, but radicals like Marsha Blackburn want to take that choice away from you. Instead of protecting voters’ rights, they’re lying about mass voter fraud — all so they can pass restrictive laws to keep some of us, like young people and people of color, from being heard at all. As your Senator, I’ll make it my mission to pass legislation that protects your fundamental rights. That means legislation like the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, which Democrats recently re-introduced in the House. | Thanks! Gloria | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

name: =?utf-8?B?Q29uZ3Jlc3NtYW4gUmHDumwgR3JpamFsdmE=?=
subject: Swing seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
Hi Peter, it’s Congressman Raúl Grijalva.
I wanted to take a minute to tell you about a race in Southern Arizona that isn’t just important for our state — it’s important for the whole country.
Right now, this seat is occupied by a Republican who has voted to limit abortion rights, cut funding for veterans and seniors, and slow down our transition to lower-cost clean energy.
But this is one of the most vulnerable seats in the country — and there is no one better equipped to flip it blue than Kirsten Engel.
Kirsten is a mom, teacher, and environmental lawyer. Despite being counted out in 2022, she came within 1% point of winning.
I know that with a little more support, she can flip this seat blue and help us take back control of the House in 2024 — so we can get real work done for our communities.
Like me, Kirsten doesn’t accept a dime from corporate PACs. That means we need grassroots support from folks like you. I have to ask: will you split a donation between my campaign and Kirsten Engel’s before our big fundraising deadline at the end of the month? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-grijalva?refcode=X_092223_EngelGrijalva_act]
Chip in now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-grijalva?refcode=X_092223_EngelGrijalva_act]
Throughout my career, I have always fought for underrepresented voices. Kirsten has done the same.
As a lawyer, she stood up to polluters who were poisoning our families and communities. And when she saw how the Arizona Legislature was failing our school kids, she ran for state office — and won.
With Kirsten in the House, we can make real progress for Arizona.
The path to taking back the House goes through our state. By splitting a donation between Kirsten Engel and me, you can help turn Arizona blue. Whether it is $2 or $20, will you donate now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-grijalva?refcode=X_092223_EngelGrijalva_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-grijalva?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=X_092223_EngelGrijalva_act_5] Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-grijalva?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=X_092223_EngelGrijalva_act_10]
Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-grijalva?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=X_092223_EngelGrijalva_act_25] Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-grijalva?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=X_092223_EngelGrijalva_act_50]
Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-grijalva?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=X_092223_EngelGrijalva_act_100] Donate Other [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-grijalva?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_092223_EngelGrijalva_act_other]
Donate $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-grijalva?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=X_092223_EngelGrijalva_act_5] Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-grijalva?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=X_092223_EngelGrijalva_act_10]
Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-grijalva?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=X_092223_EngelGrijalva_act_25] Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-grijalva?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=X_092223_EngelGrijalva_act_50]
Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-grijalva?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=X_092223_EngelGrijalva_act_100] Donate Other [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-grijalva?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_092223_EngelGrijalva_act_other]
Peter, I've always believed that when we come together and use our voices, we can make a better world.
Peace,
Raúl Grijalva
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-grijalva?refcode=X_092223_EngelGrijalva_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-grijalva?refcode=X_092223_EngelGrijalva_act] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-grijalva?refcode=X_092223_EngelGrijalva_act]

name: Jon Tester
subject: This joke never gets old
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Do you know how many days are left until the end of September?

| Peter: Do you know how many days are left until the end of September?
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70241570/428750602/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230923-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkNTlhNDc1LTNmNWEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bCudv9jkEW5uZKWvFx_LJizVQidT9rpeg1xE1sctmBM=)
**It’s seven! Get it?**

Ah, that joke never gets old, but I’m not kidding around when I say we need your help.

Mitch McConnell and his billionaire allies see my race as a top target for 2024.

Now, I could cozy up to the special interests who write the big checks and ask for the millions of dollars we’ll need to compete with the GOP. But that’s just not the way I roll.

I’m accountable to the people, and I’m proud of the fact that hard-working folks across the country have supported this campaign, chipping in a few bucks when they can.

**The fight is just beginning, Peter. We need your support to help grow our momentum and fight back, so that’s why I’m asking:**

[_**Will you chip in $7 to help us jumpstart our end-of-quarter fundraising push and keep me in the U.S. Senate working for all Montanans? Your donation will be split between Fight for Progress and my campaign.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70241571/428750603/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230923-1-EM&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkNTlhNDc1LTNmNWEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bCudv9jkEW5uZKWvFx_LJizVQidT9rpeg1xE1sctmBM=)

And he’s going to lecture us about what’s lawful? You've got to be kidding me. | = If Jim Jordan is going to not respond to a congressional subpoena when he was witness to one of the largest and most prosecuted crimes this nation has ever seen, he has no credibility to be telling anyone to abide by the rule of law. In fact, it should disqualify him from leading a House Judiciary Committee panel in the first place. But here’s the deal: Jim Jordan is going to keep spewing lies and deceit every time he gets close to a microphone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you for standing with me, Eric | | | = = Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy. | | = Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Only 89 gray wolves remain in Yellowstone and they need your help
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend, ** | **An entire pack of Yellowstone gray wolves is gone forever. Protect the remaining 89 wolves and the planet: Donate $27 today in honor of National Public Lands Day! ** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007796?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007797?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007798?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007799?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
I have devastating news to share. We thought gray wolves were recovering after receiving protections in Yellowstone. But a trophy hunter rampage violently wiped out 25 wolves just last year. **That’s an entire pack.** Now, **only 89 gray wolves remain in Yellowstone.** And the second a wolf sets its little paws over park lines, it’s fair game for brutal hunters to massacre them. [**Don’t let another wolf meet the same fate. Help protect the remaining Yellowstone wolves and the planet: donate $27 and help us reach our $60,00 goal before National Public Lands Day ends at midnight tonight! **](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007800?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
The Northern Rockies states bordering Yellowstone National Park have limited safeguards to keep gray wolves safe. Trophy hunters are targeting and gunning down these helpless creatures. What’s worse -- they use the most brutal methods imaginable. Choking wolves to death with neck snares. Chasing them down with helicopters. Even dynamiting nursing wolf mamas and their baby pups inside their dens. **And it’s all completely legal.**
All the while, hunters and Big Polluters are fighting against protections for wolves. Why? So they can keep killing for “fun” and take over the land for mining and logging. This system is broken, Friend. But it’s not too late to fix it. Thanks to members like you, we still have the chance to make real change happen. **Today is National Public Lands Day, and there’s never been a better time to act! We’ve set an ambitious $60,000 goal to fight for wolves and our planet before the loss is too great. Will you join us today? **
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007801?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
**These inhumane hunting practices can’t continue. Help protect wolves and the planet and donate $27 before National Public Lands Day ends at midnight tonight! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007796?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007797?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007798?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007799?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
When federal protections were cut for gray wolves, trophy hunters went on a _killing spree._ **Hundreds of wolves were murdered in a matter of days!** Colorado conservationists are working against the odds to protect wolves and the forests they call home. But Colorado’s wolves aren’t bound by state lines. They can legally be tortured and killed as soon as they leave the state.
Not to mention, trophy hunters and Big Oil lobbies are actively pushing against protections for these precious creatures. Their hope is to kill them for sport and invade their habitats. Big Polluters want to open up wolf habitat for mining and logging. All of this blood and destruction -- just for the sake of corporate greed.
These actions have contributed to the gutting of the Endangered Species Act and protections for wolves, bears, and other vulnerable species. Now, **only 6,000 wolves remain** in the lower 48 states. The time to act is now, while there are still wolves left to save!
**Help stop the slaughter before wolves are lost forever. Rush your $27 donation now to help us reach our National Public Lands Day goal for wolves and the planet. **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007796?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007797?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007798?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007799?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Believe it or not, wolves are vital to the ecosystems they live in. They help keep elk and deer populations in check, allowing other plant and animal species to thrive. What’s more, the remains of their kills redistribute nutrients and feed scavengers. They truly are a keystone species!
That’s why each death of this iconic species is a big deal. Since a recent rule rolled back federal protections for gray wolves, the trophy hunting lobby has pushed for even more cruel and inhumane laws throughout wolves’ natural habitats. And even worse, **the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service could reinstate federal protections for these creatures -- but has still failed to do so! **
We can’t stand aside while our wolves are under attack. If even young pups aren’t safe from brutal hunters, this majestic species won’t stand a chance. Friends of the Earth is fighting back to end the bloody violence against our last surviving wolf packs. That means we’re fighting with everything we have to protect the Endangered Species Act. These protections blocked greedy fossil fuel companies from exploiting the land they call home for profit. But it’s at risk to be opened up to fracking, drilling, and mining that create pollution and __harm wildlife and nearby communities, too. __
But we’re up against the powerful hunting lobby and their big industry allies, and we urgently need the help of activists like you to make sure we hit our crucial $60,000 National Public Lands Day goal. Please, Friend: if just 7 more generous supporters from your area make a $27 membership gift, we can reach our goal and help save wolves and the planet before time is up. Will you make your membership contribution in honor of National Public Lands Day before this opportunity expires?
**Protect the remaining wolves and our planet from greedy private interests. Donate $27 before the clock strikes midnight and help us reach our National Public Lands Day goal. **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007796?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007797?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007798?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007799?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia
Senior fossil fuels and lands campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights
subject: all eyes on Ohio
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
_**CBS: “Focus turns to abortion rights amendment on November ballot”**_ Derek – We’re Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights. Our grassroots coalition has our eyes set on one goal: **fighting to make sure we protect abortion access in November.** And after our landslide victory in the August election defeating a cynical effort to make it harder to pass our measure, **we’ve been feeling on top of the world and are ready for the next fight in November.** With this massive hurdle out of the way, the road to victory for our amendment to protect abortion rights has never been clearer. But we’ll be real for a second: there will _ABSOLUTELY_ be more roadblocks thrown into our path by the anti-abortion side. **They’ve already tapped their wealthiest donors to start slandering our campaign.** We have to finish the job, Derek. We have to expand abortion rights in Ohio. We have to win in November. [_**But in order to do that, we need the funds to help us get there. Can you please rush a donation to OURR’s grassroots campaign and Josh Shapiro? clean_body: CBS: “Focus turns to abortion rights amendment on November ballot” Derek – We’re Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights. Our grassroots coalition has our eyes set on one goal: fighting to make sure we protect abortion access in November. And after our landslide victory in the August election defeating a cynical effort to make it harder to pass our measure, we’ve been feeling on top of the world and are ready for the next fight in November. With this massive hurdle out of the way, the road to victory for our amendment to protect abortion rights has never been clearer. But we’ll be real for a second: there will ABSOLUTELY be more roadblocks thrown into our path by the anti-abortion side. They’ve already tapped their wealthiest donors to start slandering our campaign. We have to finish the job, Derek. We have to expand abortion rights in Ohio. name: Wes Moore
subject: My question for Tommy Tuberville
body:
Hey team,

For months, a single Republican U.S. Senator named Tommy Tuberville has held up hundreds of promotions for senior military jobs, just to make a political statement.

In the last 48 hours, the Senate has been able to maneuver around Tuberville’s obstruction and fill some of these top military posts, but the damage — which includes real risk to our national security — is already done.

As a U.S. Army combat veteran and a public servant, I want to be very clear about what I believe:

Real leadership is about service.

Look to the brave Americans in our military. They’re not in it for themselves — they put their lives on the line in service of their country. I saw the shared value of service every day when I was in Afghanistan.

In Maryland, we believe service will save us, too. Service gives us purpose. We’re even working to create a program where every high school graduate can spend a year in paid service, because it will empower the next generation in their careers and all their lives.

So my question for any Senator who would undermine our military’s leadership for a political agenda: who are YOU serving?

Martin Luther King Jr. once preached that “If you want to be important — wonderful. If you want to be recognized — wonderful. If you want to be great — wonderful. But recognize that he who is greatest among you shall be your servant.”

When it comes to keeping our country safe, it should never be about Democrats or Republicans. It should be about serving the American people.
When my fellow soldiers were in distress on the front lines, nobody asked what party they belonged to.

That’s not how we did things in the Army, it’s not how we do them in Maryland, and it’s not how we should do them in Congress, either.

Elevate,
Wes Moore

P.S. Maryland is going to keep leading the way — and if you support everything we’re accomplishing for Marylanders, I’d be grateful if you could chip in today to fuel our work. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moore-em-20230923?refcode=em20230923]
Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moore-em-20230923?refcode=em20230923]

---

Wes Moore for Maryland

body:
There are exactly 8 days left until government funding runs out.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70248751/428756814/972226503?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmRjOGQ4Yy00NTVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S9gIJKWcnVSE8bgYcnkPfVh_gpHVvWqcEg0M32H0Akg=) There are exactly 8 days left until government funding runs out.

**As of today, it sure looks like extreme Republicans in control of the House are going to force us into a reckless government shutdown.**

Earlier this year, Democrats and Republicans had a bipartisan deal to keep the government open and responsibly address the national debt. But now, Speaker McCarthy has ripped up that bipartisan agreement and instead brought us to the brink of another government shutdown.

That’s not how Congress is supposed to work.

**If we’re going to put an end to the childish games in Washington and make government work for the people again, Democrats NEED to win back the House in 2024.**

My race for re-election is going to be one of the most competitive in the country, and Democrats can’t afford to lose. **[So I’m asking you: if you want a Congress that actually governs, will you chip in to defend my seat in Congress and help Democrats take back the House in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70248752/428756815/2025394003?refcode=email_092323_shutdown&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmRjOGQ4Yy00NTVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S9gIJKWcnVSE8bgYcnkPfVh_gpHVvWqcEg0M32H0Akg=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70248753/428756816/2025394003?refcode=email_092323_shutdown&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmRjOGQ4Yy00NTVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S9gIJKWcnVSE8bgYcnkPfVh_gpHVvWqcEg0M32H0Akg=)

Last Congress, our Democratic majority accomplished a lot. We capped the price of insulin, forced Big Pharma to negotiate and lower the cost of prescription drugs, invested in infrastructure and passed the landmark CHIPS and Science bill to create good-paying, manufacturing jobs.

**Unfortunately, with Republicans in control of the House now, our progress has been brought to a halt, and instead we’re facing the very real threat of a government shutdown.**

We can get back to having a Congress that does its job, but only if we put an end to the GOP’s circus and take back the House next year. And we’re going to need your help to do it.

**If you’re with me and want to win back Congress for Democrats, I hope you’ll chip in whatever you can today:

[https://go.dankildee.com/a/shutdown](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70248766/428756822/2025394003?refcode=email_092323_shutdown&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmRjOGQ4Yy00NTVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S9gIJKWcnVSE8bgYcnkPfVh_gpHVvWqcEg0M32H0Akg=)**

Thanks,

Dan

name: Stop GOP Gerrymandering (via the NDRC)
subject: More humiliating news for Ron DeSantis >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|

Team, Ron DeSantis is crashing and burning: | **FIRST:**
Just before he launched his presidential campaign, Ron DeSantis pushed through a series of far-right MAGA policies – including a congressional map that _FiveThirtyEight_ called “an extreme gerrymander.”

**BUT THEN:**
Instead of seeing a surge with Republican voters, **DeSantis _tanked_ in national polls.**

**AND:**
Just when it seemed like things couldn’t get worse for Ron, a judge **ruled his gerrymandered map unconstitutional** – and ordered lawmakers to draw a new one.

**NOW:**
We have a chance to stop MAGA extremists like Ron DeSantis by fighting for fair maps all across the country!

[**_As many as 19 congressional districts across 12 states could be reshaped ahead of 2024 – more than enough to swing control of the House. Will you rush an urgent donation to help the NDRC fight for the fairest maps possible?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70248878/428756862/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230923_FR_9K_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0ZGM4ZDhjLTQ1NWEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tejOLKxqFJFfgP1hQQqALoVdKB-8qddY4H5mqhojFbQ=)

clean_body: | Team, Ron DeSantis is crashing and burning: | FIRST: Just before he launched his presidential campaign, Ron DeSantis pushed through a series of far-right MAGA policies – including a congressional map that FiveThirtyEight called “an extreme gerrymander.” BUT THEN: Instead of seeing a surge with Republican voters, DeSantis tanked in national polls. AND: Just when it seemed like things couldn’t get worse for Ron, a judge ruled his gerrymandered map unconstitutional – and ordered lawmakers to draw a new one. NOW: We have a chance to stop MAGA extremists like Ron DeSantis by fighting for fair maps all across the country! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = “Our democracy is stronger because of what we have accomplished. States that were once gerrymandered . . . are now highly competitive, allowing voters to choose their representatives instead of the other way around. But the movement doesn’t stop here. We must continue the work until we have fair maps in every state.” – President Barack Obama = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

Hi, it’s Roland Gutierrez, the Democratic TX State Senator running for U.S. Senate against Ted Cruz.
As of this week, the U.S. has now reached over 500 mass shootings this year.
This is the fourth consecutive year that the country has eclipsed 500 mass shootings.
We cannot go on like this.
As the TX State Senator who saw up close the carnage of what happened in Uvalde, I know what gun violence does to a community. I’ve seen what our elected officials have done to look the other way so they can appease their NRA donors.
I’m running for Senate to change the dynamic. Will you pitch in $10 or more to help my campaign defeat Ted Cruz and take on gun violence in our state and our country? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

Hi there – My name is Jennifer Garcia, and I’m Andrea Salinas’ new Finance Director. It’s so great to meet you! I wanted to reach out personally to introduce myself.
A few things about me: I love the outdoors and the National Parks, I enjoy live music (I’ve played the drums for a decade!), and I like to read in my free time.

**But most importantly: I love fighting to elect and re-elect Democratic women of color to office. And that’s what brought me here.**

I know I don’t have to remind you that Andrea is the strong, dependable, pragmatic leader that Oregonians deserve.**But in a highly-targeted, ultra-competitive district like ours, it’s going to require the support of each-and-every one of us to ensure she can stay, fighting for Oregon, in Congress.**

[**Look, our ability to re-elect Andrea hinges on the support of grassroots donors like you. And with our most important end-of-quarter deadline yet just one week away, I have to ask: Is there any amount you can pitch in today? Every single dollar goes a long way.** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70249443/428757517/-796242365?refcode=em_fr_2023.09.24_b1_jg_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWU2ZmU3Yi00ODVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ie30YNRsL8VD-Eb-mjueIQt9xSSoYF6isaNLjgd_AnE=)

Peter, As Democrats, we believe that voting is a sacred and fundamental right. That’s why our candidates are fighting for every single vote this November. From town festivals to large parades, our local candidates are in their communities connecting with voters and spreading their messages. [_**The other side might have nearly unlimited resources, but we have people power. Fellow Conservative,

**I won’t mince words:** if we don’t pick up the pace for our online fundraising today, we’re not going to hit our goal before next week’s end of quarter fundraising deadline.

We all knew August would be slow with everyone enjoying the end of summer but as it turns out, **September has been the most troubling month for our campaign**.

_**Who knew?**_

I certainly didn’t expect all our fundraising appeals to fall flat this month, so now I'm using what time we have left ahead of next Saturday’s fundraising deadline to shore up our position and end the quarter on a strong note!

**Why Wisconsin Republicans are talking about impeaching a new state Supreme Court justice – AP** [**WHAT EXACTLY DID PROTASIEWICZ SAY?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70249757/428758760/-240684510?refcode=20230921_AOTL_F_WISCOTUSRedux_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViNmFhMmQzLTRiNWEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=e2xVrM5h2LpTSiqWvqTNbytMYiKs94XY_3VFztOGO0w=) Protasiewicz frequently spoke about redistricting during the campaign, calling the current Republican-friendly maps "unfair" and "rigged." "Let's be clear here," she said at a January forum. "The maps are rigged here, bottom line." "They don't reflect people in this state," Protasiewicz said at the same forum. "I don't think you could sell any reasonable person that the maps are fair. I can't tell you what I would do on a particular case, but I can tell you my values, and the maps are wrong."

clean_body: To silence her. | Team – have you seen this? ➡️ Why Wisconsin Republicans are talking about impeaching a new state Supreme Court justice – AP = Protasiewicz frequently spoke about redistricting during the campaign, calling the current Republican-friendly maps "unfair" and "rigged." "Let's be clear here," she said at a January forum. "The maps are rigged here, bottom line." "They don't reflect people in this state," Protasiewicz said at the same forum. "I don't think you could sell any reasonable person that the maps are fair. I can't tell you what I would do on a particular case, but I can tell you my values, and the maps are wrong." In a stunning turn of events, conservative lawmakers are pushing for the impeachment of a newly sworn in Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice. This audacious move is a blatant attempt to derail progress towards a more equitable and fair democracy by chipping away at the independence of our judicial system. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The efforts to unseat this justice stem from a deep-seated resistance to fair maps that aim to level the playing field and ensure fair representation for all people. Conservative lawmakers are determined to do whatever it takes to obstruct the path to fairness. We will not stand idly by in the face of this blatant attempt to undermine our democratic institutions. The conservative opposition is banking on our complacency, team. = = In solidarity, Marco Dorado Reform Director All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. body:
show your thanks
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53357?t=6&akid=10673%2E878179%2Emq_so3) We can’t believe how much Biden has made for our country, so we’re sending him a HUGE card to thank him for his hard work!

[**So you’ve been personally selected to sign our letter thanking President Biden for fighting for the American people! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53357?t=7&akid=10673%2E878179%2Emq_so3) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53357?t=8&akid=10673%2E878179%2Emq_so3)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I’m so grateful.

**Dear President Biden,

I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!

**Despite MAGA turmoil, over the last two and a half years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs for the people.**

I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, but it is always the right thing to do.

So as the 2024 race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country!

[**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53357?t=9&akid=10673%2E878179%2Emq_so3)** | [SPACE RUNNING OUT: Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53357?t=10&akid=10673%2E878179%2Emq_so3)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=10673%2E878179%2Emq_so3). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=10673%2E878179%2Emq_so3).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=10673%2E878179%2Emq_so3) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=10673%2E878179%2Emq_so3). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=10673%2E878179%2Emq_so3)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=10673%2E878179%2Emq_so3)

The Cook Political Report – one of the most respected names in politics – has __upgraded__ our chances of defeating Lauren Boebert.
**Our race against Lauren Boebert has officially moved from “Lean Republican” to true “Toss-Up!”**
[**If you’re all-in to help me send Lauren Boebert packing in 2024, then please, chip in $5 or more to my campaign right now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70250161/428760228/1610638071?refcode=em20230923pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=36111b39-4d5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjExMWIzOS00ZDVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c0TRPuZycYs_avU46xDE_jKQOMzSWMFL4pdFgunBMHk=)

But last year, we came just 546 votes shy of defeating Lauren Boebert. It was the closest race in the entire country, and the latest poll shows another extremely close race: 50% to 48%.
A huge part of why we lost in 2022 was just that we got out-spent by millions and millions of dollars – and Boebert’s allies are preparing to spend _even more_ this time to tell ridiculous lies about me on every television across the district.
I’ve already clocked over 30,000 miles in my red pickup truck, meeting with thousands of voters across the district. **But if we’re going to counter the Super PAC lies and win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**
[**I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs, so I have nowhere else to turn. name: Team Kennedy
subject: Joe Rogan says his vote is for RFK, Jr.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Yesterday, on a live podcast, comedian and media sensation Joe Rogan admitted that he will vote for RFK, Jr. to be president in the 2024 presidential election if given the chance.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=joe_rogan_will_vote_for_rfk_j3&n=1)
---
Peter, Yesterday, on a live podcast, comedian and media sensation Joe Rogan admitted that he will vote for RFK, Jr. to be president in the 2024 presidential election _if given the chance_. **Unfortunately, Rogan, who speaks to 190 million monthly listeners on his popular podcast, doesn’t believe that he will fairly be afforded the opportunity.** Rogan fears Mr. Kennedy’s efforts to get on the ballot are being sabotaged. _“I have a feeling they’ve got some rascally tricks up their sleeves to keep him from ever challenging. And there’s not going to be any debates, that’s for sure,”_ Rogan said. [](https://www.kennedy24.com/i-would-vote-for-him-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=joe_rogan_will_vote_for_rfk_j3&n=2) Rogan’s cynicism is understandable, but our campaign is changing the math. Mr. Kennedy’s message is resonating with people across the country in every demographic, and the upwelling of support has put him on the map despite the efforts of the party establishment to ignore him. **Right now, we have an urgent September 30****th****FEC deadline coming up – in less than 6 days. Let’s work together to show the media and political establishment how broad, deep, and committed our support really is. If you plan to donate, this is the week to do it.** Peter, we need your help today to get our message to every town and city across America. **Chip in today to help put RFK, Jr. in the White House!** | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=joe_rogan_will_vote_for_rfk_j3&n=3 "Give $5 ->") [Give $5 ->](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=joe_rogan_will_vote_for_rfk_j3&n=3)

Rogan, who interviewed RFK, Jr. earlier this summer, was impressed with Mr. Kennedy’s integrity and his lifelong commitment as an environmental attorney. He goes on to explain further why he’d vote for RFK, Jr. for president.
**“He’s a fascinating guy,” Rogan said**. “I really enjoyed talking to him. What’s really important is his work as **an environmental attorney, what he did with the Hudson River**. **He cleaned up the Hudson River, a lot of it based on him winning cases**. And he really cares about people. Genuinely does. I think he’s a good person. I really do,” Rogan explained.
**You are crucial to our campaign to get RFK, Jr. to the White House. Help us reclaim democracy.**
Thanks for your continued support!
Team Kennedy

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Don’t let orphaned bear cubs starve to death
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend, ** | **Fight back against trophy hunting and Big Industry attacks on bears, their cubs, and our planet. Donate $27 today before National Public Lands Day ends!** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007866?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007867?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007868?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007869?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
One bullet. It takes just one bullet to kill a mama bear. One bullet to leave her orphaned cubs struggling, starving, and unable to fight off predators. One bullet to completely decimate an entire bear family. Our country’s bears are under attack. As they prepare for winter hibernation this fall, it could be their last. **[This National Public Lands Day, protect mama bears, their cubs, and the planet: Make a $27 contribution to Friends of the Earth and help us reach our $60,000 goal by midnight tonight!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007870?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
Maryland already DOUBLED the bear slaughter last hunting season. 103 black bears were killed in the state. Pennsylvania could see similar increases. That would be devastating given that last year, 3,659 black bears were killed in the state. But clearly, this is not enough for trophy hunters. They want to push the massacre to new heights.
Trophy hunters in the Northern Rockies are chomping at the bit to remove ESA protections for iconic grizzly bears. They’ve made numerous attempts to delist them. This would allow them to ruthlessly murder them during the hunting season, and they show no signs of letting up. We can’t let them get away with this, Friend.
| **PUBLIC LANDS DAY SUPPORTER RECORD**
---
**EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com**
**MATCH EXPIRING: **11:59 p.m. on September 23rd
**PUBLIC LANDS DAY GOAL: ****FALLING SHORT ** **SUPPORTERS FROM YOUR AREA NEEDED: 3 MORE **
| | [MAKE MY GIFT NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007871?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Records reflect most recent available data. 11:59 p.m. deadline._
---
**We need to act fast to protect grizzlies. Protect vulnerable species and our planet with a $27 donation before National Public Lands Day ends at midnight! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007866?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007867?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007868?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007869?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
It’s bad enough that bloodthirsty trophy hunters want to MURDER innocent bears for fun. But their cruelty means extreme danger for the next generation of cubs. **Bear cubs rely on their mothers for at least two full years. If these mama bears are killed, their babies will be ORPHANED. They’ll be left to starve, freeze, or become easy prey for other predators. If that happens, the future of this iconic species will be lost. **
We can’t afford for trophy hunters to keep decimating bear families like this. Grizzly bears and their vital habitats are already in a dire situation. At their peak, they numbered 50,000. But by 1975, reckless human activity -- hunting, trapping, and habitat loss -- already decimated bear populations. Their numbers dropped to 1,000 individuals in the lower 48 states. **Now, they occupy just 2% of their original range! **
I know these numbers are shocking, Friend. But still, the pro-hunting lobby and their anti-environment allies are working overtime to strip these endangered animals of essential legal protections. The Endangered Species Act provides critical protection for America’s iconic animal species. These protections are some of our most effective safeguards in the fight to protect our public lands and curb catastrophic climate change.
**Without these protections in place, trophy hunters could brutally kill bears without consequence. What’s more, destructive industries like Big Oil, logging, and factory farming could swoop in and wreak havoc on endangered species’ habitats. That means losing some of the last pristine wilderness we have left.**
**National Public Lands Day is the perfect time to stand up for bears and the planet before the damage is too great. Donate $27 now! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007866?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007867?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007868?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007869?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
You may be wondering why it matters if bears are lost forever. Well, the fact is that bears are intelligent creatures, Friend, and they hold a critical place in our ecosystems. They enhance biodiversity, enrich soils, regulate prey populations, and transport nutrients through vast swaths of wilderness. **And now, by simply existing, they’re standing between massive corporate pollution and a sustainable future for our planet. **
For the sake of our wildlife and the future of our planet, we can’t let Big Polluters and their cronies in Congress destroy our public lands and wipe out our endangered species.
At Friends of the Earth, we are using every tool available to protect endangered species and our planet -- not Big Industry’s profits. We know how to fight and win, and that’s exactly what we plan to do. Today is National Public Lands Day, and we are asking you to stand with us as we continue this work with your membership gift today.
**We must protect our bears for all our sakes, but there’s not a minute to lose.** We all need to raise our voices in defense of vulnerable species. Together, we have the power to stop these killings, defend wildlife and protect vital species before we lose them for good. We’ve set an ambitious goal to raise $60,000 to fuel our work to save bears, their lands, and the planet. But National Public Lands Day ends tonight at midnight. And we won’t reach our goal without your help. Make your $27 contribution now, before this opportunity expires and we lose any more bears.
**Join the fight to protect bears, endangered species, and our planet. Donate $27 in honor of National Public Lands Day now! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007866?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007867?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2007868?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia
Senior fossil fuels and lands campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**

The Endangered Species Act provides critical protection for America’s iconic animal species. These protections are some of our most effective safeguards in the fight to protect our public lands and curb catastrophic climate change. Without these protections in place, trophy hunters could brutally kill bears without consequence. What’s more, destructive industries like Big Oil, logging, and factory farming could swoop in and wreak havoc on endangered species’ habitats. That means losing some of the last pristine wilderness we have left. National Public Lands Day is the perfect time to stand up for bears and the planet before the damage is too great. Donate $27 now! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == You may be wondering why it matters if bears are lost forever. Well, the fact is that bears are intelligent creatures, Friend, and they hold a critical place in our ecosystems. They enhance biodiversity, enrich soils, regulate prey populations, and transport nutrients through vast swaths of wilderness. And now, by simply existing, they’re standing between massive corporate pollution and a sustainable future for our planet. For the sake of our wildlife and the future of our planet, we can’t let Big Polluters and their cronies in Congress destroy our public lands and wipe out our endangered species. At Friends of the Earth, we are using every tool available to protect endangered species and our planet -- not Big Industry’s profits. We know how to fight and win, and that’s exactly what we plan to do. Today is National Public Lands Day, and we are asking you to stand with us as we continue this work with your membership gift today. We must protect our bears for all our sakes, but there’s not a minute to lose. We all need to raise our voices in defense of vulnerable species. Together, we have the power to stop these killings, defend wildlife and protect vital species before we lose them for good. We’ve set an ambitious goal to raise $60,000 to fuel our work to save bears, their lands, and the planet. But National Public Lands Day ends tonight at midnight. And we won’t reach our goal without your help. Make your $27 contribution now, before this opportunity expires and we lose any more bears. Join the fight to protect bears, endangered species, and our planet. Donate $27 in honor of National Public Lands Day now! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Standing with you, Raena Garcia Senior fossil fuels and lands campaigner, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

subject: What your gift would mean to my campaign:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I need your help [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Friends – in a moment, I'm going to ask you to chip in $5 to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue. But first, let me explain why this moment is so important. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Together, we're building a powerful grassroots movement to protect the Dignity of Work for all Americans. This movement is made up of thousands of folks just like you, giving $5 or whatever they can because they know this fight matters.
But I'll be honest: We're in for a tough race. Right now, polls show me neck and neck with the GOP field, and Republicans are already launching attack ads to defeat me. With our entire Senate majority on the line, I'm counting on supporters like you to power this campaign to victory.
So please, will you split $5 between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand’s so we can win this race? Here's a personalized link for you: [[RAW LINK]]
I truly appreciate your support. Thanks for being on my team.
Sherrod

name: Bob Casey
subject: The price of a water ice, a Hershey bar, or half of a cheesesteak
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=733%2E552475%2EcfmN1C)
Hi Peter, I'm writing to ask if you will make a $5 contribution to our campaign today.
**[I want to take a minute to explain why this request matters right now, but if you are ready to help us hold Pennsylvania and stand up to our new GOP opponent, you can chip in at this link now. I'm grateful for your support.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230923-2?refcode=em20230923-2&refcode2=733_552475_cfmN1C&akid=733%2E552475%2EcfmN1C)**
$5 may not sound like much. It's about the price of a water ice, a Hershey bar, or half of a cheesesteak. But the truth is, when enough folks chip in a few dollars whenever they can -- whether it's $50, $25, or even $5 — it makes a difference.
**Now that a mega-millionaire Republican is running against us, the stakes of this race are even higher.**
Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are going to pull out all the stops to flip PA -- and since our opponent could self-fund his campaign, we're sure to face millions spent against us. They see the Commonwealth as key to their path to taking back the Senate majority and the White House, which is why we have to build a strong campaign now.
I know we have what it takes to fight back against whatever the GOP throws at us. We made history by electing Josh Shapiro and John Fetterman in 2022, and we're going to need that same momentum on our side to win 2024.
**[So if you're able, will you chip in $5 to our re-election campaign? I'm in a tough race against a mega-millionaire opponent here in Pennsylvania, and every dollar makes a difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230923-2?refcode=em20230923-2&refcode2=733_552475_cfmN1C&akid=733%2E552475%2EcfmN1C)**
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230923-2?refcode=em20230923-2&refcode2=733_552475_cfmN1C&akid=733%2E552475%2EcfmN1C)**
We are building a campaign of supporters across Pennsylvania and the country, and I'm proud to have you on our team.
With gratitude,
Bob

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

clean_body: The race is tightening up and we must keep pace!| | | | | Donald Trump is skipping the second debate next week because he lacks the courage to engage in a face-to-face confrontation with Governor Christie. Even worse, Trump is trying to kick Chris off the next debate stage because he knows that Chris will expose his lies and finally make him face the music. Here's the catch. It was just announced that Chris needs 70,000 donations to keep a spot on the stage for the next debate. He's close but not there yet. Don't let Chris miss the 3rd debate because of the RNC's requirements. In important states like New Hampshire Chris is polling in 2nd place, so we can't allow him to lose that momentum now. Thank you, Jordan | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---

clean_body: Help us catch up before our upcoming deadline! | | | Hi Peter, We wanted to check in today and give you a quick update on our upcoming end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, which is coming up in just one week. Look, we won’t beat around the bush: fundraising is a little slower than we had hoped. That’s why we’re reaching out today. We need everyone reading this (including you, Peter) to chip in any amount to help us catch up before our upcoming deadline. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thanks for doing all you do to keep this momentum going. When we win in November 2024, it will be because of supporters like you, Peter. Team Biden-Harris

name: TammyBaldwin.com
subject: Picture this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Imagine Mitch McConnell reinstated as Senate majority leader.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1220%2E35263%2EGDUnMT)
Picture this, Peter: it’s November 6, 2024, and Republicans just won back control of the Senate — by a single seat. Mitch McConnell is reinstated as Senate majority leader. Democratic priorities like voting rights, abortion rights, and LGBTQ+ rights go out the window. And the GOP is back to advancing their dangerous right-wing agenda. _Wouldn’t you wish you had donated $5 when it mattered most?_ **That’s exactly what could happen if we don’t have the resources to defend this Wisconsin U.S. Senate seat and reelect Tammy. Wisconsin’s last Senate race was decided by less than 1% and this one could be just as close — so we’re asking:** **[Will you donate $5 or any amount to Tammy’s campaign today? democracy

Derek, do you
have a minute?

My campaign is facing a make-or-break milestone in just one week: our
end-of-quarter FEC deadline. This is a big deal.

Once that deadline passes, all of our fundraising numbers will be released
for everybody to see — from the talking heads on Fox News, to Donald Trump
and his cronies.

As we’ve seen in the past few months, there’s nothing that Donald Trump
and MAGA Republicans want more than to sabotage this campaign, starting by
poring over every line of this FEC report.

If they sense that our momentum is slowing down, they won’t hesitate to
drop in money to try and defeat me.

So let’s give them something to look at,
Derek.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2320?c0=sep2023_abs_em.AJy9jY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20230923_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1017&akid=4016%2E5257348%2EDjReXD ]My team is setting a goal of earning 50,000 grassroots donations by
midnight next Saturday to get us back on track. Will you help me get there
by donating any amount now?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

Last quarter, Republicans tried to throw every dirty trick in the book at
our campaign.

They censured me. Donald Trump personally threatened to primary anybody
who didn’t fall into line. Fox News spread baseless conspiracy theories.

Yet here we are — still standing, still fighting. I need your help to show
them that our grassroots momentum is only beginning.
