I've got to say I was a little embarrassed when I gave an update to our generous donor that there were only 53 people who accepted his generous 1500% match.

Ever since I broke the news to my supporters, I've been shaking in my boots because this fundraising push was supposed to obliterate every fundraising worry this campaign's had for months, and contributions have just totally undermined our expectations.

**I 'm going to make this short, the data folks have crunched the numbers and we need at least 300 more contributions by MIDNIGHT to reach our projections.**

I 'm going to make this short, the data folks have crunched the numbers and we need at least 300 more contributions by MIDNIGHT to reach our projections. | Best, John Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. | | Patriot,

---
The minute I announced my 2024 campaign the Fake News hacks began claiming that the Democrats “want to run against Trump.”
---
These clowns couldn’t be any more full of it.
---
But now, with the evidence so irrefutable, even the failing _New York Times_ is forced to _finally_ admit what the American people knew from the start...
---
_**“****...Mr. Biden’s top aides and advisers have believed... Mr. Trump would be a tougher general-election opponent than Mr. DeSantis or any of the other Republican presidential candidates.”**_
---
With poll after poll showing us CRUSHING the RINOs’ Deep State-approved puppet candidate, the primary is _effectively_ over.
---
_And the nightmare scenario that Crooked Joe and the Left thought they could pretend did not exist, is now very much their _REALITY_ _...__
---
** _“Trump would comfortably beat Biden by_**** _49 percent to 45 percent_**** _. ”_**
---
[Source: _Daily Express_]
---
With 2024 _ALREADY_ shifting to the general election, we can’t afford to waste a moment as a truly desperate Crooked Joe will go to unimaginable lengths to try and stop us.

---
**Which is exactly why I recently set a new goal for our campaign ahead of the 9/30 FEC-mandated quarterly deadline of 100,000 grassroots contributions... **
---
**_...Even if it’s $1 at a time!_**
---
Between you and me, Patriot, I might actually enjoy seeing the $1 contributions the most! There’s no greater reminder than a $1 donation that our movement truly is a movement of _THE PEOPLE_.
---
_If you’re struggling right now due to Crooked Joe’s moronic and disastrous policies, believe me, I understand. And I don’t want you to even think about donating! Just hit the back button and go about your day._
---

We defied history and _expanded_ our Senate majority last year because we partnered with folks like you. Now, we NEED your help to do it again.

We're launching a high-priority focus group that's ONLY open to Democrats who've proven their commitment to winning -- **and you’re in the top 10% of Democrats who made the cut. So please, accept your invitation by taking this survey right away:

[www.dscc.org/GrassrootsDemocraticStrategists/#9716520](https://go.dscc.org/go/15577?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230923-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup23RFv2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230923-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup23RFv2-Pros-sl1&akid=11923%2E9716520%2EaqSIYs)**

| | **Today I announced that I'm running to represent New Jersey in the United States Senate**. I wanted you to know and I want to tell you why. **I've long said that no one in America is above the law** , regardless of their job title or personal politics. That's the foundation of our justice system. So when elected officials of either party are accused of abusing the public trust, as Senator Bob Menendez was earlier this week, I take those charges very seriously, and I hope the judicial system works thoroughly and quickly to bring this truth to light. In the meantime, I do not have confidence that the Senator can properly focus on our state and its people while responding to the allegations. But, facing multiple calls to resign from leaders in both parties and at all levels of government, Senator Menendez defiantly announced, "I am not going anywhere." New Jersey deserves better leadership in Washington. **That's why I am stepping up.****[Will you chip in today to help our movement rebuild faith in our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70251662/428765576/-1197072038?refcode=2023-09-23-senateannounce&recurring=0&amount=9&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=d3f7b29d-615a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2Y3YjI5ZC02MTVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-hT9dsNXfg5fJKPfHBXaww2FBpICcp4iRvdDk2_Srp0=)** Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70251666/428765580/-1197072038?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2023-09-23-senateannounce&refcode2=d3f7b29d-615a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2Y3YjI5ZC02MTVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-hT9dsNXfg5fJKPfHBXaww2FBpICcp4iRvdDk2_Srp0=) | [$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70251670/428765584/-1197072038?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2023-09-23-senateannounce&refcode2=d3f7b29d-615a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2Y3YjI5ZC02MTVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-hT9dsNXfg5fJKPfHBXaww2FBpICcp4iRvdDk2_Srp0=)

New Jerseyans need hard-working, trustworthy elected leaders focused on the common good and bringing integrity and civility back into our politics. **I don't take this on lightly – I didn't intend to run for Senate – but we can't jeopardize the Senate or compromise our country's integrity.**
**I hope you'll support our campaign; it's going to be a tough fight, but I know that together, we will make sure New Jersey has the leadership we deserve.** As always, I'm honored to stand at your side in this work.
More soon,
_Andy_

name: Shawn Wilson
subject: I’m asking you for just $3. Here’s why.

body:
It all comes down to this, Peter.

Peter – Just 3 weeks from today, Louisianans will head to the polls and cast their ballots for our primary, and I can’t emphasize this next part enough: **I need __every__ ounce of support you can give to beat the odds.** **_[That’s why I have to ask: Will you chip in $3 — just $1 a week — to help me clear the primary and make the runoff next month?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70251707/428765656/218720461?amount=3&refcode=ea.deec5a30-625a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.deec5a30-625a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGVlYzVhMzAtNjI1YS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sWRRgwdyzSx2f0u0s4IXPG6KB1DOpro7fHEFu7wJFdg=)_** Look, I won’t sugarcoat anything. This race is an uphill battle for us — the Democrat won the last governor’s race by less than 3 percentage points, and right now, national Republicans are pouring out-of-state MAGA money into bogus attack ads against me. But we _have_ to beat them because the GOP is full steam ahead on their efforts to install a MAGA governor who will drag our state backward. **And Peter, I can’t win without grassroots support from working folks like you!** **_[So please, with 3 weeks to go until the primary — and our filing deadline at midnight tomorrow — will you chip in just $3 to my grassroots campaign for governor? I’m counting on your support now, more than ever!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70251708/428765657/218720461?amount=3&refcode=ea.deec5a30-625a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.deec5a30-625a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGVlYzVhMzAtNjI1YS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sWRRgwdyzSx2f0u0s4IXPG6KB1DOpro7fHEFu7wJFdg=)_** name: Elizabeth Warren HQ
subject: Three reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=74%2E4032634%2ERg-129)
---
**[Your first donation of $22.27 or anything you can chip in to support Elizabeth Warren would go a long way right now — for a few reasons:](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/630?t=8&akid=74%2E4032634%2ERg-129)**
* The important FEC fundraising deadline is in one week — your contribution this quarter will help show Elizabeth and her plans have strong support on our public fundraising report.
* We're using every donation we receive today to hit our quarterly goal and make key investments that will help grow our campaign and fight for our plans: like getting student debt cancelation across the finish line, passing a wealth tax, ending the filibuster to pass national abortion protections and gun safety laws, and much more.
* $22.27 is our average online contribution so far this quarter. We're keeping track of how many grassroots donations we receive every single day this quarter so that we reach voters in Massachusetts, help Elizabeth win re-election, and champion our ideas for big, structural change across the country.

That critical work is only possible with your support — and when a large group of supporters chip in $22.27 at a time, it all adds up quickly to make a powerful difference. If every single person reading this email chips in $22.27 or more right now, we'll reach our goal in no time. But we know that not everyone is in a place to make a donation right now. If you can't, we understand — and we’re grateful for your support no matter what. **[But that’s why if you’re able to make your first contribution right now, it would make a powerful impact. So if you’re able to, will you make your first contribution to help hit our fundraising goal before September’s FEC deadline?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/630?t=9&akid=74%2E4032634%2ERg-129)** | [**Donate $22.27**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/630?t=10&akid=74%2E4032634%2ERg-129)
---
[**Donate Other Amount**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/631?t=11&akid=74%2E4032634%2ERg-129)
---
Thanks for all you do,
Team Warren

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: [Deadline Approaching] Can we count on your support before National Public Lands Day ends?
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | | | | | **BEFORE NATIONAL PUBLIC LANDS DAY ENDS :
YOUR URGENT GIFT IS NEEDED TO PROTECT WOLVES AND THE EARTH**
---
| | [RUSH A GIFT](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2008390?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Friend,****_we were hoping_ to share a positive update on our fight to protect gray wolves and the wilderness habitats they need to thrive in honor of **National Public Lands Day.** **But instead, this is disturbing news. And we have to face it to move our urgent work forward. **
**Bloodthirsty trophy hunters shot down three young gray wolves near the Colorado-Wyoming border, brutally murdering them all. To make this tragedy even worse, these special wolves were some of Colorado’s FIRST wild-born pups in more than 80 YEARS. Now, their surviving pack mates are at even greater risk for being hunted and deliberately DESTROYED. **
The situation gets bleaker. The **trophy hunting lobby is doubling down on attacking the Endangered Species Act.** This legislation is our strongest tool in the fight to protect vulnerable species and the lands they call home. But Friends of the Earth won’t stand aside while trophy hunters go after vulnerable animals and wreak havoc on our wilderness ecosystems.
**We’ve set an urgent goal to raise $60,000 in honor of National Public Lands Day to continue our fight to protect threatened species and the only planet we’ll ever get. Earth’s most vulnerable inhabitants need our help, and we must stand up on their behalf. [So please, before National Public Lands Day ends, will you make a membership gift of $27 or more to Friends of the Earth to help protect priceless species, the habitats they need to thrive, and our planet?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2008391?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2008390?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
The awful news of these wolf killings comes after federal protections for gray wolves were slashed.** That tragically unleashed a massive KILLING SPREE that claimed the lives of hundreds of these majestic creatures.** Now, despite a partial restoration of legal protections in some areas, vital wolf populations are still vulnerable to senseless slaughter at the hands of merciless trophy hunters.
If that weren’t enough, **dirty industries like Big Oil and Gas plus logging and mining companies are joining forces with the trophy hunting lobby. Together, their anti-environment coalition could weaken the Endangered Species Act and greenlight unprecedented destruction of wolves’ wilderness habitats – all for the extraction of planet-killing fossil fuels. **
**Friends of the Earth is fighting with everything we have to protect the Endangered Species Act in service of wolves and our planet. Our goal is to**** shield our last surviving wolves and other vulnerable species from senseless violence and block destructive industries like Big Oil, logging, and factory farming from destroying vital habitats for profits. But we can't continue this urgent work without your support. **
**[Please: We can't afford to fall short of our National Public Lands Day goal. Will you make your membership gift of $27 or more now to help Friends of the Earth fight back against anti-environment special interests and protect our planet and its inhabitants for generations to come?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2008391?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2008392?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2008393?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2008394?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2008390?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Thank you for your urgent support,
Raena Garcia
Senior Fossil Fuels and Lands Campaigner
Friends of the Earth
|

Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](http://foe.org/about-us/contact/)

name: Team Evers
subject: Did you see Tony's message?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek, did you see
Tony's message? Extreme Republicans are escalating their fight to destroy
fair elections and seize power at all costs. That's why our end-of-quarter
deadline one week from today is so important.

No state is more critical than Wisconsin, and we'll lose our democracy if
we fall short.

| | | **I need you to read this email until the very end.**

Peter, we’re looking at our numbers, and right now, we’re not where we need to be in Florida for our **[end of quarter goal.](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=c4805c9b337a492eb93ca9f19ec9cd78&_e=Q4GpvZk4K0bzFzySuHDGLGy9eLwxHUgTnaDxAh7DO3q9puge79iUwy8OJEzfyW-rcFU2orY-vV0hPTZkKDXmkJfDzX_aqalg3l0sBRP_hmfKxntL4ALkjmXtuvIi602EgzdRakr4Op4oN1rIlY8OzqcRmmSsmGWZ2X8Qm8uvBy_Ve3NcshcF3m09dvbxw_jwYZfYkXtgYOZPHeMKy7377HDEOp-kyd6sRRHvvBUcnHUQQn36mqCxtpGM7zijoy3QmKn5citSLz3GM6us0xbGqGL3WCqfRDsPMHlXsszQOmydDqQvE1yplUl1SkHpppjehlCpb_4XFYKFhxkcNBolUC3gQUyO_MTaMlqMu4ZvLVg%3D)**

_But we’re not worried - because we know we can count on patriots like you to step up for one of the most critical states in the race for the Senate in 2024._

**We have no choice - we MUST meet every single end of quarter goal from now until Election Day.**

Your contribution ensures we have the resources we need to take on the radical Left and WIN, but right now we’re running out of time.

**[All it takes is a couple of dollars to make a MAJOR difference. Please, pitch in NOW and help us meet our end of quarter goal!](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=c4805c9b337a492eb93ca9f19ec9cd78&_e=Q4GpvZk4K0bzFzySuHDGLGy9eLwxHUgTnaDxAh7DO3q9puge79iUwy8OJEzfyW-rcFU2orY-vV0hPTZkKDXmkJfDzX_aqalg3l0sBRP_hmfKxntL4ALkjmXtuvIi602EgzdRakr4Op4oN1rIlY8OzqcRmmSsmGWZ2X8Qm8uvBy_Ve3NcshcF3m09dvbxw_jwYZfYkXtgYOZPHeMKy7377DLbPXLrWG9cUiyQ02K2wSDVhN9YCn1lIV7JPDSNrwBbNHnVS4nSAvTg45UOaetmYpRV8NzAWenXgNXEKjt5wFStuMxS2Ul_C6LtSypD1RhW6IOq-4EYtdSr2PdqFwimYC5kblF2uphH-op2O6Ur7zo%3D)**

subject: Our next end-of-quarter deadline is one week from today

body:
Every donation is a sign of strength
#
Peter — our next major end-of-quarter deadline is ONE WEEK from today.
After that deadline, we’ll submit our quarterly report to the FEC and it will become public information. That means everyone — voters, members of the media, and every GOP insider keeping a close eye on our race — will be able to see exactly how much grassroots support is behind our movement to elect Lucas Kunce to the U.S. Senate.
**Every donation is a sign of strength.** So we’re asking:
**[Will you add your very first donation of absolutely any amount toward our campaign today? If we’re going to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this Senate seat, we can’t afford to lose any of our record-breaking momentum.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36681?refcode=em20230923-3834&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3834%2E614464%2Ex_TYzM)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36682?refcode=em20230923-3834&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=3834%2E614464%2Ex_TYzM) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36682?refcode=em20230923-3834&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=3834%2E614464%2Ex_TYzM) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36682?refcode=em20230923-3834&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=3834%2E614464%2Ex_TYzM) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36682?refcode=em20230923-3834&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=3834%2E614464%2Ex_TYzM) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36682?refcode=em20230923-3834&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=3834%2E614464%2Ex_TYzM) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36682?refcode=em20230923-3834&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=3834%2E614464%2Ex_TYzM) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36681?refcode=em20230923-3834&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=3834%2E614464%2Ex_TYzM)
